subFeatures.description: Presenter-only start URLs are stored apart from learner join URLs, so hosts always get host privileges and learners never do.

subFeatures.name: Personalized participant join links
subFeatures.description: Join links tied to each participant's real name give you accurate in-meeting rosters and attendance.

subFeatures.name: Schedule conflict check
subFeatures.description: Before scheduling, check whether a host account is already booked at the requested time — for a single slot or across a whole recurring series.

subFeatures.name: Provider webhooks
subFeatures.description: Zoom and Google Meet events such as meeting ended and recording ready flow back into Vacademy automatically, keeping recordings and attendance current.

features.name: Built-in Video Classroom
features.tagline: A full virtual classroom with zero external accounts
features.description: Vacademy ships its own hosted virtual classroom, so institutes can run live classes without buying Zoom or Meet licenses. Rooms are created automatically at class time with whiteboard, webcam, screen share and recording, and Vacademy manages the classroom servers behind the scenes for reliability.

subFeatures.name: One-click rooms, no account needed
subFeatures.description: Choose the built-in classroom when scheduling and the room is created automatically — no license, link pasting or setup.

subFeatures.name: Recording controls
subFeatures.description: Per-class toggles to record the session and to auto-start recording the moment class begins.

subFeatures.name: Moderator controls
subFeatures.description: Mute all participants on join, restrict webcams so only the host is on camera, and set a guest policy — always accept, ask moderator, or always deny.

subFeatures.name: Personalized learner join
subFeatures.description: Learners join with their real name and identity so the in-class roster and attendance are accurate; guests get their own supervised join flow.

subFeatures.name: Automatic attendance from the classroom
subFeatures.description: When class ends, the classroom reports who attended and for how long, and attendance is recorded automatically.

subFeatures.name: Recordings archived to your library
subFeatures.description: Classroom recordings are processed and uploaded to secure cloud storage so learners can rewatch them later.

subFeatures.name: Managed classroom server fleet
subFeatures.description: Vacademy operates a pool of classroom servers with capacity and scaling controls, so classes stay smooth even at peak hours.

features.name: Volt — Live Presentation Studio
features.tagline: Build interactive presentations with AI in minutes
features.description: Volt is Vacademy's built-in presentation tool for teachers. Create decks on an infinite whiteboard-style editor, import existing PowerPoint files with layouts intact, or have AI generate a complete presentation — slides plus quiz questions — from just a topic. Every deck can then be presented live to an interactive audience.

subFeatures.name: Presentation library
subFeatures.description: Create, search, edit, duplicate and delete presentations, each with its own title, description and cover.

subFeatures.name: Whiteboard-style slide editor
subFeatures.description: Slides are drawn on a free-form canvas — freehand drawing, shapes, text, images and diagrams — with a slide list for reordering.

subFeatures.name: Rich slide types
subFeatures.description: Title, text, blank canvas, text-plus-media, fullscreen media, web link, quiz, feedback and interactive-video slides in one deck.

subFeatures.name: Quiz and feedback slides
subFeatures.description: Embed live questions directly into the deck — single and multi-select multiple choice, true/false, one-word, numeric and long-answer formats — plus open feedback prompts.

subFeatures.name: AI presentation generation
subFeatures.description: Type a topic, pick a language and AI model, and get a complete deck of designed slides with auto-generated quiz questions, ready to edit.

subFeatures.name: AI slide regeneration
subFeatures.description: Regenerate any individual slide with AI when it needs a fresh take.

subFeatures.name: PowerPoint import
subFeatures.description: Import existing PPT and PPTX files; each slide becomes its own fully editable whiteboard scene, keeping deck order and per-slide backgrounds.

subFeatures.name: High-fidelity slide conversion
subFeatures.description: Shapes, text boxes, images, tables, connectors and grouped objects are recreated as native editable elements, with fonts, colors, alignment and positions carried over.

subFeatures.name: Public share link
subFeatures.description: Share a read-only public link so anyone can flip through a presentation without logging in.

subFeatures.name: Session history per deck
subFeatures.description: Every live run of a presentation is kept in history with its participants and results, available long after the session ends.

features.name: Volt Live Sessions — Presenter Cockpit
features.tagline: Present live with polls, leaderboards and an AI co-pilot
features.description: Start any Volt deck as a live session and the audience joins instantly from any browser with a short code — no account or install required. Slides sync to every participant's screen in real time, responses stream into the presenter's dashboard as they arrive, and an AI co-pilot suggests slides based on what the teacher is actually saying. Sessions run reliably for hours with automatic reconnection, built for audiences of hundreds.

subFeatures.name: Start live with a join code
subFeatures.description: One click generates a short invite code; enrolled learners and guests alike join from any browser by entering the code and a name — codes auto-uppercase and Enter submits, so entry takes seconds.

subFeatures.name: Session rules and gamification settings
subFeatures.description: Per-session switches for joining mid-session, showing results on the last slide, learner hand-raise, chat, session recording, default seconds per question, attempts allowed per learner, points per correct answer and negative marking with a configurable penalty.

subFeatures.name: Real-time slide control and sync
subFeatures.description: Move forward, back or jump to any slide and every participant's screen follows instantly, with heartbeats and automatic reconnection keeping late joiners and flaky networks in step.

subFeatures.name: Waiting room
subFeatures.description: Participants who join early sit in a waiting room and are pulled in automatically the moment the presenter begins.

subFeatures.name: Live participant roster
subFeatures.description: See who is in the room in real time, with heartbeat-based presence so drop-offs are immediately visible.

subFeatures.name: Live response views
subFeatures.description: Watch answers arrive as an overlay, open a response-distribution chart per question, view text answers as a word cloud, and drill into a per-slide list of every participant's response with correctness.

subFeatures.name: Live leaderboard with CSV export
subFeatures.description: A points leaderboard updates throughout the session, can be shown to the room, and exports to CSV afterwards.

subFeatures.name: Quick question on the fly
subFeatures.description: Fire an instant poll or quiz question mid-session without leaving the presentation — AI helps prepare it in seconds.

subFeatures.name: Insert and annotate slides mid-session
subFeatures.description: Drop a new slide — including a new question — into a running session at any position, and draw over the current slide with a live annotation overlay; changes appear for all participants immediately.

subFeatures.name: Automatic answer checking
subFeatures.description: Objective answers are evaluated against the answer key the moment they arrive; open-ended answers are flagged for review.

subFeatures.name: AI-assisted evaluation
subFeatures.description: AI can help evaluate free-text responses that a simple answer key cannot judge.

subFeatures.name: Session audio recording
subFeatures.description: Record the presenter's audio with pause and resume, a live duration indicator, and download as WebM or MP3.

subFeatures.name: AI slide recommendations from speech
subFeatures.description: The AI listens to what is being taught and periodically suggests ready-made summary slides and a feedback question the presenter can insert with one click.

subFeatures.name: Live transcript
subFeatures.description: A transcript of the class audio is generated in the background and can be viewed during or after the session.

subFeatures.name: AI summary email on finish
subFeatures.description: On ending, optionally transcribe the recording, generate a session summary and email each participant a personalized report including every question and the answer they gave.

subFeatures.name: Marathon-length sessions
subFeatures.description: Sessions support hours of continuous streaming and are built for hundreds of simultaneous participants.

features.name: Engage — Live Polls, Quizzes & Leaderboards
features.tagline: Turn passive listeners into active competitors
features.description: Polls, graded MCQs, speed quizzes, word clouds and real-time leaderboards embed directly into live-class slides, with every response scored the moment it arrives. Engage runs natively in the browser or layers on top of an existing Zoom, Google Meet or built-in classroom call, and pushes all scores into learner report cards automatically.

subFeatures.name: Polls, MCQs and short answers as slide types
subFeatures.description: Quick opinion polls, graded single and multi-select MCQs, one-word, numeric and short-answer questions live inside the deck, so lecture and assessment mix without breaking flow.

subFeatures.name: Speed-quiz mode
subFeatures.description: Time-boxed questions where answering faster earns bonus points.

subFeatures.name: Per-question timers
subFeatures.description: Mix quick speed rounds, longer thoughtful MCQs and untimed polls within a single deck.

subFeatures.name: Real-time leaderboard
subFeatures.description: Ranks update after every question with animated position changes; names can be hidden for privacy or shown for gamification, and standings can persist across the week or month.

subFeatures.name: Word cloud and sentiment polls
subFeatures.description: Open-text answers render as a live word cloud for recaps, brainstorms and sentiment checks.

subFeatures.name: Auto-grading with report-card push
subFeatures.description: In-class scores flow into learner report cards and analytics, and can trigger automations such as remedial content, top-performer cohorts or parent digests after class.

subFeatures.name: Hand-raise and moderated chat
subFeatures.description: Configurable raise-hand, public chat and a private mentor channel let moderators surface the best questions.

subFeatures.name: Layer on Zoom, Meet or the built-in classroom
subFeatures.description: Run slides and interactions on top of an existing video call — no platform migration needed.

subFeatures.name: Reconnect-safe session state
subFeatures.description: The current slide, timers and scores live on the server, so refreshes, network blips and mobile suspends lose nothing.

features.name: Interactive Whiteboard
features.tagline: Sketch, annotate and teach together in real time
features.description: A shared infinite canvas inside every live class for diagrams, math, brainstorms and slide annotation. Multiple participants can draw together with live cursors, the board survives disconnects, and the finished canvas can be saved straight back into the course for replay.

subFeatures.name: Infinite canvas toolkit
subFeatures.description: Shapes, text, freehand pen, arrows, images, sticky notes, frames and group selection on an unbounded canvas.

subFeatures.name: Multi-user drawing with presence
subFeatures.description: Multiple participants draw with live cursors; choose teacher-only mode, full collaboration, or invite specific learners to the board.

subFeatures.name: LaTeX and code blocks
subFeatures.description: Live-rendered math formulas, syntax-highlighted code and chemistry diagrams — built for real subjects.

subFeatures.name: Annotate any slide
subFeatures.description: Drop the whiteboard layer onto any slide; replays show exactly what was drawn over what.

subFeatures.name: Save back into the course
subFeatures.description: One click converts the end-of-class canvas into a new slide attached to the chapter.

subFeatures.name: Reconnect-safe server state
subFeatures.description: Network blips, mobile suspends and refreshes reconnect everyone to the exact same canvas.

features.name: In-App Class Experience
features.tagline: Learners attend class inside your branded app
features.description: Classes open embedded inside the learner app instead of bouncing learners to another website. YouTube streams play in a distraction-free player with institute-controlled playback rules, Zoom classes run in-browser without the Zoom app, and teachers can host Zoom right from the admin portal.

subFeatures.name: Embed or redirect, per class
subFeatures.description: Choose whether each class opens inside the app or redirects to the meeting platform.

subFeatures.name: Embedded YouTube live player
subFeatures.description: YouTube live streams play in-app with institute-controlled restrictions — allow or block pausing and rewinding to keep everyone at the live edge.

subFeatures.name: Zoom in-browser player for learners
subFeatures.description: Learners join Zoom classes directly in the browser or app with no Zoom install, and the meeting passcode is handled automatically.

subFeatures.name: Host Zoom from the admin portal
subFeatures.description: Teachers start and run their Zoom class as host from a dedicated full-screen page inside the admin dashboard.

subFeatures.name: Zoho embedded player and Google Meet launcher
subFeatures.description: Zoho classes embed in-app, and Google Meet classes open through a streamlined launcher.

subFeatures.name: Simulated live (pre-recorded) classes
subFeatures.description: Schedule a pre-recorded video to 'go live' at a set time — learners experience it as a live class, with play, pause and rewind rules enforced by the institute.

features.name: Learner Live Class Hub
features.tagline: Every class, recording and reminder in one place
features.description: Learners get a dedicated live-class home showing today's and upcoming classes grouped by date, with times auto-converted to their timezone and one-tap join buttons that route them correctly to the waiting room, embedded player or external platform. Past classes appear in list and calendar views with recordings ready to replay, and public sessions welcome guests too.

subFeatures.name: Date-grouped schedule in local time
subFeatures.description: What's live now and what's coming next, with class cards showing time, subject and thumbnail — times auto-converted to the learner's timezone.

subFeatures.name: One-tap multi-provider join
subFeatures.description: Join buttons route learners correctly — waiting room, embedded player or external platform — for Zoom, Google Meet, Zoho, YouTube live and the built-in classroom.

subFeatures.name: Past classes with recordings
subFeatures.description: Browse past sessions in a list or calendar view and replay their recordings in the in-app player.

subFeatures.name: Default class link cards
subFeatures.description: Recurring classes surface the day's default class card, so learners always know where today's class happens.

subFeatures.name: Custom action buttons
subFeatures.description: Institute-configured buttons — worksheets, WhatsApp groups and more — appear on class cards where enabled.

subFeatures.name: Post-class feedback prompts
subFeatures.description: After class, learners are guided to the feedback form when the institute has enabled it.

subFeatures.name: Guest join links
subFeatures.description: Non-enrolled guests join open sessions via public links, with an embed mode for external websites and their own waiting room.

subFeatures.name: Public live-class registration pages
subFeatures.description: Shareable registration pages for open live classes with a registration form, email verification and a session countdown — a lead-generation tool for webinars.

features.name: Waiting Room & Pre-Join
features.tagline: A branded countdown lobby before every class
features.description: Learners who arrive early land in a branded waiting room with a live countdown, class details and background music, then flow into class the moment it opens. Institutes control how early the room opens, can set a last-entry cutoff, or switch to a direct pre-join mode that skips the lobby entirely.

subFeatures.name: Configurable open time
subFeatures.description: Set how many minutes before the start time the waiting room opens for each class.

subFeatures.name: Live countdown timer
subFeatures.description: A real-time countdown to class start keeps early arrivals informed and engaged.

subFeatures.name: Background music
subFeatures.description: Play an institute-selected background score in the waiting room; custom waiting-room media can be set per schedule.

subFeatures.name: Waiting room or direct pre-join
subFeatures.description: Choose between a classic waiting-room screen or a pre-join mode where learners enter the live class directly during the pre-class window.

subFeatures.name: Last-entry cutoff
subFeatures.description: Optionally set a last entry time after which late learners can no longer join the class.

subFeatures.name: Attendance from the lobby
subFeatures.description: Joining from the waiting room automatically marks the learner present and logs the join.

features.name: Attendance Tracking & Reports
features.tagline: Live classes record their own attendance
features.description: Attendance is captured automatically the moment learners join, enriched with join and dwell data synced from Zoom, Zoho and the built-in classroom, and backed by manual and bulk marking for corrections. Rich reports break attendance down by session, batch and individual learner over any date range, and attendance events can trigger notifications and automations.

subFeatures.name: Automatic attendance on join
subFeatures.description: Learners are marked present the moment they join a class from the app, including guests on public sessions.

subFeatures.name: Sync from meeting platforms
subFeatures.description: Zoom participant reports, Zoho session data and built-in classroom analytics are pulled automatically to record who attended and for how long.

subFeatures.name: Threshold-based marking rules
subFeatures.description: Grace periods, dwell time and join rules mark learners present, late or absent automatically, including across recurring cohorts.

subFeatures.name: Manual and bulk marking by staff
subFeatures.description: Teachers mark or correct attendance for individuals or whole lists in one action from an attendance-marking table.

subFeatures.name: Per-occurrence attendance for recurring classes
subFeatures.description: Recurring series can count attendance per occurrence, so every class day is tracked separately.

subFeatures.name: Session-wise and batch-wise reports
subFeatures.description: View attendance for one session or across a batch, with filters, pagination and date ranges.

subFeatures.name: Individual learner report
subFeatures.description: Pull one learner's attendance across a batch for any date range — ideal for parent conversations.

subFeatures.name: Guest attendance tracking
subFeatures.description: Public-session guests have their attendance recorded against their registration for follow-up.

subFeatures.name: Attendance notifications and summaries
subFeatures.description: Optionally notify learners and parents when attendance is marked, with customizable messages and branded WhatsApp, email or dashboard summaries — no exports needed.

subFeatures.name: Attendance-triggered automations
subFeatures.description: Fire WhatsApp nudges on missed-class streaks, alert mentors, unlock assessments at an attendance threshold, or start CRM workflows on drop-off.

subFeatures.name: Audit-ready records
subFeatures.description: Versioned attendance records with timestamps and device information support accreditations and compliance reviews.

features.name: Class Recordings Hub
features.tagline: Every class recorded, archived and replayable
features.description: Recordings from Zoom, Google Meet, Zoho and the built-in classroom are collected automatically after each class and archived to the institute's secure cloud storage, safe from provider retention limits. Learners replay past classes from their app, while admins control retention, cleanup and re-sync.

subFeatures.name: Automatic recording sync
subFeatures.description: Zoom cloud, Google Meet and Zoho recordings are pulled automatically on a schedule and attached to the right class occurrence.

subFeatures.name: Archive to institute cloud storage
subFeatures.description: Recordings are copied from the meeting provider into Vacademy's storage so they survive provider retention limits, with a manual sync-to-storage action available.

subFeatures.name: Built-in classroom recording upload
subFeatures.description: Recordings from the built-in classroom are processed and uploaded automatically after class ends.

subFeatures.name: Learner replay
subFeatures.description: Learners browse past sessions in list and calendar views and play recordings in an in-app player.

subFeatures.name: Recording expiry and cleanup
subFeatures.description: Per-recording expiry dates with automatic cleanup keep storage costs controlled.

subFeatures.name: On-demand re-sync
subFeatures.description: Admins trigger an immediate recordings sync for any class if a recording hasn't appeared yet.

features.name: Post-Class Feedback
features.tagline: Structured learner feedback after every class
features.description: Configure a feedback form per class and learners are prompted to rate the session the moment it ends. Institutes choose the questions, star scales and whether feedback is skippable, then review every response in a searchable inbox with statistics and CSV export.

subFeatures.name: Configurable feedback forms
subFeatures.description: Enable feedback per class and compose questions — star ratings with custom scales and optional half-stars, plus text answers — each optional or mandatory.

subFeatures.name: Compulsory or skippable
subFeatures.description: Decide whether learners can skip the form or must submit feedback before moving on.

subFeatures.name: Learner feedback page
subFeatures.description: A clean, mobile-friendly form with star ratings and comments shown to learners after class.

subFeatures.name: Feedback inbox with search and filters
subFeatures.description: Browse all feedback with search, date-range presets, subject filters and multi-select filtering.

subFeatures.name: Feedback statistics
subFeatures.description: Per-session statistics summarize ratings so teaching-quality trends are visible at a glance.

subFeatures.name: CSV export
subFeatures.description: Export feedback data to CSV for further analysis or reporting.

subFeatures.name: Institute-wide defaults
subFeatures.description: Set default feedback questions and behavior once in settings; new classes inherit them.

features.name: Live Class Settings & Defaults
features.tagline: Set your live-class policies once, apply everywhere
features.description: An institute-level settings panel defines the rules every new live class inherits — allowed platforms, waiting-room and registration policy, Zoom and built-in classroom presets, recording and transcription behavior, reminder timings and notification channels. It also controls exactly which recording and material features learners see.

subFeatures.name: Allowed streaming platforms
subFeatures.description: Control which platforms — Zoom, Google Meet, Zoho, YouTube embeds, the built-in classroom — teachers can schedule classes on.

subFeatures.name: Waiting room and registration policy
subFeatures.description: Choose always accept, manually approve, automatically approve or always deny guests — or require no registration at all.

subFeatures.name: Scheduling and recurring defaults
subFeatures.description: Defaults for weekly recurring schedules, per-day default class links, daily attendance counting and the class description field.

subFeatures.name: Zoom presets
subFeatures.description: Institute defaults for recording destination (cloud, local or off), audio mode, waiting room, join-before-host, required login, entry muting, video states, breakout rooms, focus mode, multi-device join and watermark.

subFeatures.name: Built-in classroom presets
subFeatures.description: Defaults for recording, auto-start recording, mute on join and host-only webcams.

subFeatures.name: Recording transcription
subFeatures.description: Automatically transcribe class recordings.

subFeatures.name: Class reminder timing
subFeatures.description: Pick reminder timing — 5, 10, 30 minutes or 1 hour before class, or none.

subFeatures.name: Notification channel defaults
subFeatures.description: Default channels (email, WhatsApp, push, in-app) and moments (on create, on live, on attendance) for class notifications.

subFeatures.name: Feedback defaults
subFeatures.description: Enable feedback forms and compulsory feedback by default, with institute-wide default questions.

subFeatures.name: Default custom action button
subFeatures.description: Add your own call-to-action button on the class screen by default, such as 'Download worksheet'.

subFeatures.name: Learner display controls
subFeatures.description: Toggle what learners see — the custom action button card, recording processing options, adding recordings to courses, and the class materials section.

subFeatures.name: Class description and course connection
subFeatures.description: Standardize class descriptions and connect live sessions to course content.

subFeatures.name: Default timezone
subFeatures.description: One institute timezone applied to all new live-class schedules.

features.name: Volt Public Site & Self-Serve Signup
features.tagline: Volt sells itself — landing, pricing and signup built in
features.description: Volt ships with its own polished public presence: an animated landing page with live feature demos, a transparent multi-currency pricing page, and a self-serve signup funnel that takes a visitor from first look to a working workspace in minutes. Anyone with a session code can also jump straight into a live session from these pages — no account or install required.

subFeatures.name: Animated product landing page
subFeatures.description: A responsive, animation-rich page that walks visitors from a bold hero pitch through features and use cases to a closing sign-up banner, with a sticky navigation header and footer quick links.

subFeatures.name: Live animated feature demos
subFeatures.description: Eight self-playing demos show Volt working before signup — audience quizzing from a phone, AI deck generation from a prompt, live analytics and leaderboards, audio transcription, real-time recommendations, the whiteboard editor, PowerPoint import and auto-sent session summaries.

subFeatures.name: Use-case storytelling for educators and trainers
subFeatures.description: A tabbed section pitches Volt separately to educators — live polls, formative checks, flipped classrooms — and to corporate trainers — energized workshops, onboarding comprehension checks, instant all-hands feedback.

subFeatures.name: Join a live session by code
subFeatures.description: A front-and-center join box and a compact header popover let anyone enter a session code — auto-uppercased, Enter to submit — and land in the live participant experience with no login or download.

subFeatures.name: Three-tier pricing lineup
subFeatures.description: Free, Pro and Business plans compared side by side with per-plan feature checklists, a highlighted Most Popular tier, and tier-appropriate calls-to-action from Start for Free to Contact Sales.

subFeatures.name: Monthly / yearly billing toggle
subFeatures.description: Flip all plan prices between monthly and yearly rates, with yearly savings flagged and the effective billed-per-year total shown under each paid plan.

subFeatures.name: Multi-currency price display
subFeatures.description: A currency selector instantly re-renders all prices in US Dollars, Indian Rupees, Euros or British Pounds with the correct symbol.

subFeatures.name: Self-serve signup funnel
subFeatures.description: Every call-to-action drops visitors into the guided signup and onboarding wizard with learning and assessment modules pre-enabled, while a persistent Sign In shortcut serves returning users.

demo.intro: Schedule a live class, run it as an interactive Volt session, watch a learner join from their phone — and let attendance write itself.

fields.label: Schedule
fields.value: Weekly · Mon, Wed, Fri · 6:00 PM IST · ends 20 Dec

widgets.title: Slide 9 — Torque on a rigid body (annotating live)

steps.title: Every live class starts here
steps.text: One list of everything live, upcoming, past and drafted — with a calendar view and CSV bulk import when you're scheduling a whole term at once.

steps.title: Host on any platform — or none
steps.text: Pick Vacademy's built-in classroom (no Zoom licence needed), Zoom with multi-account support, Google Meet, Zoho, a YouTube live stream or any custom link. Meetings for the whole recurring series are auto-created in the background.

steps.title: Recurring series in two steps
steps.text: Step one sets basics — weekly Mon/Wed/Fri at 6 PM with per-day links and timings. Step two adds the batch, registration and reminders via email, WhatsApp, push or in-app before you publish.

steps.title: Teach on a live whiteboard
steps.text: Volt decks are whiteboard-style slides — draw, drop LaTeX and diagrams, or annotate over any slide mid-class. Import an existing PPTX or let AI generate the whole deck, quiz questions included, from a topic.

steps.title: Answers stream in live
steps.text: Learners join from any browser with a short code — no install. MCQ, true/false, one-word, numeric and long-answer questions grade the instant responses arrive, and you can fire a quick poll on the fly without leaving the deck.

steps.title: A leaderboard that fuels the room
steps.text: Points per correct answer, optional speed bonuses and negative marking rank learners in real time. Show it to the room for energy, export to CSV, and let AI email each participant a personalized summary when you end.

steps.title: Class lives inside your app
steps.text: Learners join with one tap and stay in your branded app — a waiting room with countdown and music before class, then Zoom in-browser, embedded YouTube or the built-in classroom. No links pasted into WhatsApp.

steps.title: Schedule, replays and worksheets
steps.text: Today's and upcoming classes show in the learner's own timezone, past classes carry auto-synced recordings archived to your storage, and custom action buttons put worksheets or group links right on the class card.

steps.title: Attendance takes itself
steps.text: Join and dwell data sync back from Zoom, Zoho and the built-in classroom; threshold rules mark present, late or absent automatically. Correct in bulk, pull per-learner reports for parents, or trigger WhatsApp nudges on missed-class streaks.

pillars.name: CRM, Sales & Admissions
pillars.tagline: Capture every lead, empower counsellors, convert admissions
pillars.description: An education-native CRM that takes every enquiry from first click to enrolled student. Capture leads from your website, ads, forms, walk-ins and spreadsheets into one auto-scored, auto-routed pipeline; give counsellors a focused workbench with SLA clocks, follow-up queues and complete lead histories; and run enquiries, applications, admissions and bookings on the same platform that teaches your students. Built for institutes — parents and children, demo classes, batches and counsellor pools come standard, not as workarounds.

features.name: Lead Capture Campaigns & Forms
features.tagline: Capture every lead from every source into one pipeline
features.description: Build lead-capture campaigns with custom forms in minutes and share them anywhere — as public links, website embeds, QR-friendly pages or API endpoints. Leads from website forms, ad platforms, form vendors, walk-ins and staff entries all land in one pipeline, deduplicated automatically, with each campaign keeping its own response list. Confirmation emails and team notifications fire the moment a lead arrives.

subFeatures.name: Campaign builder
subFeatures.description: Create campaigns with a name, type (Website, Google Ads, Social Media or custom), objective (lead generation, event registration, course inquiry, demo request, newsletter, webinar, contact-us or custom), start/end dates and status.

subFeatures.name: Custom form fields
subFeatures.description: Attach any set of custom fields to a campaign's form, rendered in your chosen order and grouping with required-field validation. Every field becomes a filterable column in the lead list.

subFeatures.name: Shareable public form link
subFeatures.description: Every active campaign has a no-login public form showing the campaign's name and context — ideal for ads, WhatsApp, QR codes and social bios. Submissions become leads instantly.

subFeatures.name: Website embed widget
subFeatures.description: Generate embed code as a customizable button-plus-popup (text, colors, border radius, popup title) or a direct iframe with configurable size, with live preview.

subFeatures.name: API integration kit
subFeatures.description: A built-in dialog generates ready-to-use API commands and documentation so Zapier, Make or custom apps can push leads into any campaign.

subFeatures.name: Ad-platform and form-vendor intake
subFeatures.description: Bring in leads from Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Lead Ads, Google Lead Form Extensions and third-party form tools alongside your own forms, so every source feeds the same pipeline.

subFeatures.name: Lead deduplication
subFeatures.description: Match incoming leads by phone or email — scoped to selected lead lists or institute-wide — so the same person never becomes two leads.

subFeatures.name: Confirmation emails and team alerts
subFeatures.description: Optionally auto-email each respondent a confirmation on submission and notify chosen staff whenever a response arrives.

subFeatures.name: Add response on behalf
subFeatures.description: Staff can fill and submit the campaign form for a walk-in or phone prospect without using the public link.

subFeatures.name: Per-campaign lead table
subFeatures.description: Each campaign has a detailed responses table with dynamic columns from its custom fields, fast pagination and CSV export.

subFeatures.name: Quick automations
subFeatures.description: From a campaign card, set an instant confirmation message or a follow-up that goes out N days later — and see which workflows are attached to the campaign — without opening the full workflow builder.

subFeatures.name: Campaign lifecycle and search
subFeatures.description: Campaigns move through Active, Paused, Completed and Archived states (only active campaigns accept leads), with search by name and filters by status and dates.

subFeatures.name: Audience surveys
subFeatures.description: Public survey pages with dynamic question sets collect structured responses from audiences and feed survey reports.

features.name: Website Lead Capture
features.tagline: Turn website visitors into enquiries automatically
features.description: Built-in lead collection on your course catalogue website: gate browsing behind a lead form or keep it optional, style it as a single page or multi-step wizard, and route every submission straight into your CRM. An enquiry mode lets visitors raise their hand for a course without paying first.

subFeatures.name: Site-wide lead collection form
subFeatures.description: Enable a lead form across your site, choose whether it's mandatory before browsing, and connect it to an enrollment invite link so leads flow into the platform.

subFeatures.name: Single-page or multi-step forms
subFeatures.description: Choose a one-shot form or a multi-step wizard with a progress indicator (bar, dots or steps) and slide/fade transitions.

subFeatures.name: Custom form fields
subFeatures.description: Define exactly which fields the website form collects.

subFeatures.name: Enquiry mode
subFeatures.description: Let visitors submit an enquiry for a course instead of (or in addition to) paying — built for high-touch sales.

subFeatures.name: Contact and newsletter widgets
subFeatures.description: Drop-in contact forms with required-field control and newsletter signup sections anywhere on the site.

subFeatures.name: Lead-focused hero sections
subFeatures.description: Hero buttons can open the lead-collection form directly ('Talk to Us') alongside browse calls-to-action.

features.name: Bulk Lead Import
features.tagline: Upload hundreds of leads from a spreadsheet
features.description: Import leads in bulk from a CSV file into any campaign. The importer generates a template from the campaign's own form fields, understands natural column names, and reports per-row results so you can fix and retry failures — nothing fails silently.

subFeatures.name: CSV template download
subFeatures.description: Download a ready-made template whose columns match the campaign's custom fields, including optional Lead Owner and Lead Status columns.

subFeatures.name: Smart column matching
subFeatures.description: Column headers are matched flexibly — 'Counsellor', 'Lead Owner Email' or 'Status' all work — and email, phone and name are auto-extracted from mapped fields.

subFeatures.name: Owner and stage on import
subFeatures.description: Assign each imported lead to a counsellor and place it on a pipeline stage directly from columns in the file.

subFeatures.name: Phone-only rows supported
subFeatures.description: Rows without an email are still imported, so phone-first lead lists never lose records.

subFeatures.name: Per-row results
subFeatures.description: The import reports exactly which rows succeeded and which failed with reasons, so partial imports are always visible.

features.name: Multi-Center Lead Attribution
features.tagline: Every captured lead stamped with the right branch
features.description: For multi-center institutes: map each lead-capture connector to a physical center with defaults like center name and manager contact, so every lead arrives pre-attributed to the right branch alongside its campaign.

subFeatures.name: Connector-to-center mapping
subFeatures.description: Assign center name, center manager name and manager mobile as default values on each lead connector.

subFeatures.name: Multi-vendor support
subFeatures.description: Works across Zoho Forms, Meta Lead Ads, Google Lead Ads, Google Forms and Microsoft Forms connectors.

subFeatures.name: Campaign linkage
subFeatures.description: Center defaults combine with campaign lists so lead attribution includes both campaign and center.

features.name: Lead Inbox & Lead List
features.tagline: Every lead, filterable, actionable, in one table
features.description: A central workspace showing leads across all campaigns with rich filtering, bulk actions and one-click calling. Open any lead in a side panel to see their full profile, form answers, notes and journey without leaving the list — built to keep counsellors working leads, not switching tabs.

subFeatures.name: Powerful filters
subFeatures.description: Filter by campaign, lead tier, pipeline status, assigned counsellor (including unassigned), converted state, active/deleted state, date presets or custom ranges, and by any custom form field's values.

subFeatures.name: Action-deadline filters
subFeatures.description: One click shows every lead whose first-contact or follow-up deadline is due or missed.

subFeatures.name: Lead detail side panel
subFeatures.description: Click a lead to open a full profile drawer — contact info, form responses, notes, status, score and timeline — without losing your place in the list.

subFeatures.name: Bulk assign and unassign
subFeatures.description: Select many leads and assign them to a counsellor, or remove the owner, in one action.

subFeatures.name: Click-to-call and AI call
subFeatures.description: Place a phone call or an AI agent call to a lead directly from its row (see the Voice & AI Calling pillar for the full calling suite).

subFeatures.name: Tier tagging
subFeatures.description: Mark leads hot, warm or cold inline from the table.

subFeatures.name: Quick notes
subFeatures.description: Add a note to any lead straight from the table row.

subFeatures.name: Soft delete and restore
subFeatures.description: Remove leads from view without losing data and restore them later; both actions are recorded on the lead's timeline.

subFeatures.name: Lead profile editing
subFeatures.description: Edit a lead's profile details after capture, with every change logged.

subFeatures.name: Configurable CSV export
subFeatures.description: Export leads with a column picker, including an optional lead-journey column that flattens every status change, note and call into the export.

subFeatures.name: Fast at any scale
subFeatures.description: Server-side sorting and pagination keep the table responsive even with very large lead databases.

features.name: Automatic Lead Scoring
features.tagline: Know which leads deserve attention first
features.description: Every lead gets a 0–100 score computed in real time from source quality, profile completeness, recency and engagement, plus a percentile rank refreshed every 15 minutes. Tune the weights to match how your institute sells, and override any score by hand when your team knows better.

subFeatures.name: Four-factor scoring
subFeatures.description: Scores combine source quality (e.g. ad leads and walk-ins rank above manual entries), profile completeness, how recent the lead is, and how much activity it has generated.

subFeatures.name: Configurable weights and decay
subFeatures.description: Adjust how much each factor contributes and set a recency-decay factor so fresh engagement counts more.

subFeatures.name: Percentile ranking
subFeatures.description: Leads are ranked against each other so you always see the top slice of your pipeline, recalculated automatically every 15 minutes.

subFeatures.name: Manual score override
subFeatures.description: Set a score by hand; the old and new score, and who changed it, are recorded on the lead's timeline.

subFeatures.name: Campaign-wide recalculation
subFeatures.description: Recalculate scores for an entire campaign on demand.

subFeatures.name: Score change history
subFeatures.description: Every automatic or manual score update is logged as a journey event on the lead.

subFeatures.name: Score badge visibility
subFeatures.description: Choose whether lead-score badges are shown to the team.

features.name: Custom Sales Pipeline
features.tagline: Your funnel, your stages, your labels
features.description: Define your own pipeline stages — a sensible starter set is created automatically — and move leads through them from the lead list or in bulk. Every stage change is time-stamped and kept as history, powering funnel reports and the lead journey view. Conversion outcomes are tracked independently of the working stage.

subFeatures.name: Custom stage editor
subFeatures.description: Create, rename, reorder and delete pipeline stages per institute; stages feed filters, reports and automations.

subFeatures.name: One-click stage changes
subFeatures.description: Set a lead's current stage straight from the lead table or detail drawer.

subFeatures.name: Bulk stage updates
subFeatures.description: Update the stage of many leads or enquiries at once.

subFeatures.name: Full stage history
subFeatures.description: Every from-to stage movement is stored and shown on the lead's journey timeline.

subFeatures.name: Conversion tracking
subFeatures.description: Converted and lost outcomes are tracked separately from the working stage, feeding conversion reports.

subFeatures.name: Analytics definitions
subFeatures.description: Set the report timezone and define which call statuses count as 'connected' and which lead statuses count as 'interested' in analytics.

features.name: Lead Response SLAs & Alerts
features.tagline: Never let a lead go cold again
features.description: Set service-level rules for how fast your team must make first contact with a new lead and how quickly follow-ups must be completed. The platform reminds the right roles before deadlines hit and flags overdue leads across the CRM, so no enquiry sits unanswered.

subFeatures.name: First-contact turnaround time
subFeatures.description: Set a first-contact deadline in hours for every new lead, with multiple 'remind me N minutes before' warning windows.

subFeatures.name: Follow-up SLA
subFeatures.description: A separate deadline for completing follow-ups, with its own pre-deadline reminder window.

subFeatures.name: Role-based notifications
subFeatures.description: Choose which roles — counsellors, admins, managers — get notified for each SLA reminder.

subFeatures.name: Overdue visibility everywhere
subFeatures.description: Leads that missed first contact or follow-up are filterable in the lead list and surfaced on dashboards.

subFeatures.name: Automation-ready events
subFeatures.description: Reminder and overdue events can trigger notifications and workflows, so escalations run themselves.

features.name: Follow-up Task Management
features.tagline: Today's call list, ready when you log in
features.description: Counsellors schedule follow-ups against leads and land on a focused task view that buckets everything into Pending, Today, Upcoming and All. A calendar view shows the month's follow-up load, and managers can drill into any rep's queue.

subFeatures.name: Schedule follow-ups
subFeatures.description: Create dated follow-up tasks on any lead; tasks move through pending, ongoing, overdue and completed states.

subFeatures.name: Bucketed task view
subFeatures.description: Stat tiles for Pending / Today / Upcoming / All drive the page, so a counsellor instantly sees today's workload.

subFeatures.name: Calendar view
subFeatures.description: Switch to a month calendar of follow-ups and click any day to see that day's list.

subFeatures.name: Complete with outcome
subFeatures.description: Close a follow-up in place with a completion note, optionally scheduling the next touch in the same step.

subFeatures.name: My-queue by default
subFeatures.description: Counsellors automatically see only their own assigned leads; admins can switch to any counsellor's queue.

subFeatures.name: Quick actions inline
subFeatures.description: Call, note, counsellor assignment and tier updates are available directly from each follow-up row.

features.name: Counsellor Pools & Auto-Assignment
features.tagline: New leads route themselves to the right rep
features.description: Group counsellors into pools attached to specific campaigns and let the system assign each incoming lead automatically — round-robin, by shift schedule, or by performance and load. Weekly shift rosters, per-rep monthly targets and safe deactivation with lead handover are built in, so every lead lands with the right person at the right time.

subFeatures.name: Pool management
subFeatures.description: Create pools, attach one or more campaigns to each, and add or remove counsellors; changes apply all-or-nothing so pools never end up half-configured.

subFeatures.name: Assignment modes
subFeatures.description: Choose per pool: Manual (leads wait for a human), Round-Robin (rotate through members in order), or Time-Based (only reps currently on shift receive leads). New assignees are notified instantly.

subFeatures.name: Advanced distribution strategies
subFeatures.description: The routing engine also supports weighted rotation, performance-based routing (send leads to the best converter) and least-loaded routing (send to the rep with fewest active leads).

subFeatures.name: Rotation order control
subFeatures.description: Drag to set the exact rotation order of counsellors — one order for all campaigns or a separate order per campaign.

subFeatures.name: Weekly shift scheduler
subFeatures.description: Author shifts per day or apply the same hours to all seven days, with multiple shift blocks per day; the system validates full coverage before saving so no lead ever arrives with nobody on duty.

subFeatures.name: Monthly target matrix
subFeatures.description: Set a monthly lead target per counsellor per campaign in a simple grid.

subFeatures.name: Safe deactivation with handover
subFeatures.description: Mark a rep inactive in one or many pools at once, name a backup, and optionally reassign their existing leads — every handover is logged with the right actor.

subFeatures.name: Workflow triggers from pools
subFeatures.description: Fire an automation workflow for pool events straight from the pool screen.

features.name: Counsellor Workbench
features.tagline: Manage your sales team and their pipelines
features.description: A team-management hub listing every counsellor with their open leads, activity, calls, performance and targets. Managers see their own reporting line; admins see the whole institute. Reassign entire books of leads between reps with a safe preview step before anything changes.

subFeatures.name: Counsellor roster
subFeatures.description: Card or list view of all counsellors with open-lead counts, active status, rating badges and search; managers automatically see only the reps in their reporting line.

subFeatures.name: Per-counsellor drawer
subFeatures.description: Open any counsellor to tabs for their Leads, Activity feed, Calls, AI Coaching, Performance and Targets.

subFeatures.name: Assign leads with preview
subFeatures.description: Assign unowned leads to a counsellor, with a dry-run preview showing exactly what will change before you commit.

subFeatures.name: Bulk reassign between reps
subFeatures.description: Move some or all of one counsellor's leads to another — again with preview-then-apply.

subFeatures.name: Lead transfer history
subFeatures.description: Expand any lead to see its full chain of counsellor handovers, oldest first.

subFeatures.name: Mark counsellor inactive
subFeatures.description: Flip a counsellor to inactive (e.g. on leave) and hand their leads to a backup in the same step.

subFeatures.name: Activity feed
subFeatures.description: A per-counsellor feed of recent actions — status changes, notes, calls and assignments.

subFeatures.name: Hierarchy-aware permissions
subFeatures.description: What each manager can see and reassign is scoped by their team hierarchy; admins see institute-wide.

features.name: Counsellor Targets
features.tagline: Set goals, track them live
features.description: Give each counsellor measurable targets — conversions closed, leads handled or calls made — for a week, a month or a custom date range. Progress is computed live from actual CRM and call data and shown as target-vs-achieved everywhere the counsellor appears.

subFeatures.name: Three target metrics
subFeatures.description: Target conversions closed, leads assigned, or calls made — each measured automatically from real activity.

subFeatures.name: Flexible periods
subFeatures.description: Recurring weekly or monthly targets that auto-apply to the current period, or one-off targets bound to a custom date range.

subFeatures.name: Bulk apply to a team
subFeatures.description: Set the same target across many counsellors in one action.

subFeatures.name: Live progress tracking
subFeatures.description: Target-vs-completed progress bars per counsellor, with a period selector to review past windows.

features.name: Counsellor Ratings & Leaderboard
features.tagline: Objective rep ratings, computed from results
features.description: Each counsellor carries a rating computed automatically from their conversion ratio and how fast they convert, refreshed on a schedule. Pick a preset strategy or tune the formula, switch any rep to a manual rating when circumstances warrant, and rank the whole team on a leaderboard.

subFeatures.name: Auto-computed ratings
subFeatures.description: A strategy-based score derived from each rep's conversion ratio and time-to-convert, refreshed on a schedule.

subFeatures.name: Preset strategies
subFeatures.description: One-click presets: Balanced, Reward closers, or Reward fast callers.

subFeatures.name: Fine-grained tuning
subFeatures.description: Set the conversion-vs-speed weighting, ideal and worst response-time thresholds, starting score, minimum activity before a rep is rated, and how many days of history the rating considers.

subFeatures.name: Manual override
subFeatures.description: Switch any counsellor to a hand-set rating when needed.

subFeatures.name: Team leaderboard
subFeatures.description: A ranked leaderboard of counsellors by rating, also surfaced as a widget on the sales dashboard.

subFeatures.name: On-demand recompute
subFeatures.description: Trigger a recalculation any time, in addition to the scheduled refresh.

subFeatures.name: Rating badges
subFeatures.description: Ratings appear as badges throughout the workbench and dashboards.

features.name: Lead Timeline & Journey
features.tagline: The complete story of every prospect
features.description: Every lead carries a unified timeline mixing automatic lifecycle events with manual notes, call logs and meetings — from first form submission through assignment, stage changes, scoring, conversion, payment and enrollment. Notes can be pinned to the top, and the whole journey can be exported.

subFeatures.name: Automatic journey events
subFeatures.description: System-logged milestones: lead submitted, duplicate merged, deleted/restored, counsellor assigned or unassigned, status changed, follow-up, outreach, score updated, converted, lost, payment received and enrollment completed.

subFeatures.name: Manual activity logging
subFeatures.description: Staff add notes, call logs, follow-ups and meeting records against any lead.

subFeatures.name: Pinned notes
subFeatures.description: Pin the most important note so it always appears first for the next person who opens the lead.

subFeatures.name: Cross-stage timeline
subFeatures.description: One continuous timeline follows the person across enquiry, application and enrollment — not just one stage.

subFeatures.name: Latest-note previews
subFeatures.description: Lead tables show each lead's most recent note and note count inline.

subFeatures.name: Journey export
subFeatures.description: Flatten a lead's entire journey — status changes, notes, calls — into an export column for offline analysis.

features.name: Contact Communication Timeline
features.tagline: Every message ever exchanged with a contact, in order
features.description: Open any lead or learner and see a unified chronological timeline of every email, WhatsApp message, push notification and SMS — outbound and inbound — with per-message delivery status. Perfect for a counsellor resuming a conversation or support resolving a dispute.

subFeatures.name: All-channel timeline
subFeatures.description: Email, WhatsApp, push and SMS for a contact merged into one time-ordered view, filterable by channel.

subFeatures.name: Direction and status
subFeatures.description: Each entry shows outbound/inbound direction and a chronological status trail — pending, sent, delivered, read, failed, bounced.

subFeatures.name: Message preview and full body
subFeatures.description: See a preview of each message inline and expand to the full content.

subFeatures.name: Source attribution
subFeatures.description: Every entry records which feature produced it — an announcement, chatbot flow, OTP or campaign — with a link back to the source.

features.name: Enquiry Management
features.tagline: Track every admission enquiry to a decision
features.description: A structured enquiry desk for schools and institutes: capture enquiries with fee expectations, transport needs and parent details, score interest, work a checklist, and move each enquiry through stages from New to Admitted. Counsellors can be linked to enquiries for clear ownership.

subFeatures.name: Rich enquiry records
subFeatures.description: Each enquiry captures reference source, mode, fee-range expectation, transport requirement, parent's relation to the child, interest score, notes and a tracking ID.

subFeatures.name: Enquiry stages
subFeatures.description: Move enquiries through New, Contacted, Not Eligible, Qualified, Follow up, Closed, Converted and Admitted.

subFeatures.name: Built-in checklist
subFeatures.description: A per-enquiry checklist tracks required steps — documents, visits, calls — toward admission.

subFeatures.name: In-app entry and public link
subFeatures.description: Front-desk staff create enquiries in-app, or share a public enquiry form link; a kiosk mode suits reception desks.

subFeatures.name: Walk-in registration
subFeatures.description: Register walk-in visitors as a lead plus an enquiry in a single submission.

subFeatures.name: Counsellor linking
subFeatures.description: Link a counsellor to an enquiry source so ownership and performance tracking are clear.

subFeatures.name: Bulk status updates
subFeatures.description: Update many enquiries' statuses in one action with per-item results.

subFeatures.name: Filters and search
subFeatures.description: Filter enquiries by date presets, status and source type, with name search.

features.name: Online Applications & Applicant Pipeline
features.tagline: Online applications with a staged admissions workflow
features.description: Accept applications through a public online form and move each applicant through configurable stages — Form, Payment, Test, Verification, Admission. Application fees can be collected online, parents and children stay linked, and bulk imports migrate existing applicant lists.

subFeatures.name: Public application form
subFeatures.description: Prospective families submit applications online with child and parent details; a printable application template is generated.

subFeatures.name: Configurable stage pipeline
subFeatures.description: Define application stages of type Form, Payment, Test, Verification and Admission, and advance each applicant stage by stage.

subFeatures.name: Application fee payment
subFeatures.description: Initiate online payment for the application fee directly from the applicant record.

subFeatures.name: Parent-child records
subFeatures.description: One parent account can hold multiple child applicants, viewable together.

subFeatures.name: Enquiry lookup and linking
subFeatures.description: Search existing enquiries while creating an application so prior history carries over instead of duplicating the family.

subFeatures.name: Bulk application import
subFeatures.description: Import many applications from a file with per-row success and failure results.

subFeatures.name: Applicant list with filters
subFeatures.description: A filterable, paginated applicant list with a full applicant profile side panel.

subFeatures.name: Staff-side onboarding
subFeatures.description: Admins can onboard an applicant directly without the public form.

features.name: Admissions Desk
features.tagline: From application to enrolled student, end-to-end
features.description: Process admissions through a guided form wizard or in bulk, review each admission with statuses like Under Review, Approved, Waitlisted or Rejected, and enroll approved students into their batch in one step. A full online-application workflow and a quick manual-admission workflow run in parallel and feed the same pipeline.

subFeatures.name: Admission form wizard
subFeatures.description: A step-by-step wizard collects the complete admission form, with a printable admission template.

subFeatures.name: Two admission workflows
subFeatures.description: Online Application (application first, then admission) and Manual Admission (direct entry) both feed the same pipeline.

subFeatures.name: Admission review statuses
subFeatures.description: Each admission carries a status: Pending, Under Review, Approved, Rejected, Waitlisted or Cancelled.

subFeatures.name: Bulk admission import
subFeatures.description: Submit many admissions from a spreadsheet with row-level results.

subFeatures.name: Responses list and detail
subFeatures.description: Browse all admission submissions with filters and open a full detail view of any one.

subFeatures.name: One-step enrollment
subFeatures.description: Convert an approved admission into an enrolled student, with payment details, in a single step.

subFeatures.name: Custom application stages
subFeatures.description: Add and label the stages applications move through, with display text per stage.

subFeatures.name: UPI payment collection
subFeatures.description: Attach a payment QR code with payee name and UPI ID (VPA) to collect application fees.

subFeatures.name: Counsellor auto-assignment
subFeatures.description: Auto-assign counsellors to applications with a selectable assignment strategy and a chosen counsellor pool.

features.name: Enrollment Invites & Self-Registration
features.tagline: One link that sells, collects payment, and enrolls
features.description: Create shareable enrollment links for any course batch that carry the enrollment form, pricing and payment options, and optional referral rewards. Prospects open the link, see a course preview, fill the form, pay and get enrolled — no staff involvement required. Open self-signup and partner registration wizards cover every other path onboard.

subFeatures.name: Invite link builder
subFeatures.description: Create invites tied to one or more course batches, with validity dates, currency, learner access duration and a short URL for sharing.

subFeatures.name: Payment options per batch
subFeatures.description: Attach one or several payment plans to each batch on the invite so the prospect chooses how to pay.

subFeatures.name: Custom enrollment form
subFeatures.description: Configure the fields prospects fill during enrollment; submissions are stored with the enrollee.

subFeatures.name: Course preview page
subFeatures.description: The invite renders a public course preview so prospects see what they're buying before enrolling.

subFeatures.name: Referral rewards on invites
subFeatures.description: Link referral programs to an invite's payment plans so enrollees can earn or give referral benefits.

subFeatures.name: Bundled course invites
subFeatures.description: One invite can cover a bundle of multiple batches or courses.

subFeatures.name: Default invite per batch
subFeatures.description: Each batch keeps a default enrollment invite whose configuration can be updated centrally.

subFeatures.name: Invite management
subFeatures.description: Search, filter, update and delete invites; look up invites by learner or payment plan.

subFeatures.name: Open self-signup
subFeatures.description: Open registration pages let new learners create accounts directly, with institute-defined registration questions rendered dynamically; invitees land in the right batch automatically.

subFeatures.name: Partner (sub-organization) registration wizard
subFeatures.description: A reusable open link takes partner organizations through a multi-step wizard — details, custom fields, OTP verification, KYC, terms acceptance and payment — and mints a new sub-organization with its own admin and learner invites.

features.name: Bookings & Appointments
features.tagline: Schedule visits, demos and counselling on a calendar
features.description: Define your own booking types — school visits, counselling sessions, demo classes, enquiry meetings — and manage bookings in list or calendar view. Each booking carries a schedule, participants, an optional meeting link and recurrence, with availability checks that prevent double-booking staff.

subFeatures.name: Custom booking types
subFeatures.description: Use global defaults like School Visit or Enquiry Meeting, or create institute-specific types with a name, unique code and description.

subFeatures.name: Create bookings
subFeatures.description: Schedule an event with title, subject, rich description, date, start/end times, timezone, recurrence and an optional meeting link.

subFeatures.name: Participants and attendees
subFeatures.description: Add individual users — leads, parents, learners — or whole batches as participants on a booking.

subFeatures.name: Availability check
subFeatures.description: Check whether a time slot is free before confirming, avoiding double-booked staff.

subFeatures.name: Reschedule and cancel
subFeatures.description: Move a booking to a new time or cancel it, with status tracking through draft, live, completed and cancelled.

subFeatures.name: Calendar and list views
subFeatures.description: Browse bookings on a month calendar with day drill-down, or as a filterable list of upcoming, live and past events.

subFeatures.name: Linked pipeline records
subFeatures.description: Bookings can reference a source record — a lead or enquiry — so appointments stay connected to the pipeline.

features.name: Contacts Directory
features.tagline: Everyone you know, in one searchable place
features.description: A unified directory combining enrolled users and campaign respondents into one contact list. Search by name; filter by campaign, region, gender, enrollment status, batch or payment status; and see each contact's custom-field data at a glance.

subFeatures.name: Unified contact list
subFeatures.description: Toggle inclusion of institute users and lead-form respondents to see students, prospects or both in one table.

subFeatures.name: Rich filtering
subFeatures.description: Filter by campaign, campaign status/type/dates, email, phone, region, gender, enrollment status, batch, payment status and organization type.

subFeatures.name: Search and sort
subFeatures.description: Name search with server-side sorting and pagination for large databases.

subFeatures.name: Custom fields on contacts
subFeatures.description: Each contact row carries its captured custom-field values and flags whether the person is an enrolled user, a lead respondent, or both.

features.name: User Tags & Segmentation
features.tagline: Label anyone, then act on the whole segment
features.description: Create tags and apply them to any set of users — by picking users, pasting IDs or uploading a CSV. Tags power segmentation across the platform: count and list tagged users, feed messaging and workflows, and even bulk-assign courses to everyone carrying selected tags.

subFeatures.name: Tag library
subFeatures.description: Create institute tags with name and description alongside platform defaults; deactivate tags you no longer need.

subFeatures.name: Bulk tagging
subFeatures.description: Add one or many tags to many users at once — by user list, by tag name (missing tags are auto-created), or by CSV upload with validation and a failed-rows download.

subFeatures.name: Tag statistics
subFeatures.description: See user counts per tag and pull detailed lists of users carrying any tag combination.

subFeatures.name: Untagging
subFeatures.description: Deactivate tags on selected users without deleting history.

subFeatures.name: Courses by tag
subFeatures.description: A wizard assigns course batches to every user holding selected tags — select courses, configure enrollment, preview, then apply with results.

subFeatures.name: Segments for automation
subFeatures.description: Fetch all users behind a tag or tag set to power downstream messaging and workflows.

demo.intro: Follow an enquiry from the moment it lands in the lead inbox to the funnel report that shows it converting — through a counsellor's workbench and a complete lead timeline.

widgets.title: Aarav Mehta
widgets.subtitle: NEET 2027 Batch A · Score 87 · Hot · Owner: Priya Nair

items.title: Pinned note
items.sub: Father decides; prefers evening calls after 7 PM

items.title: Demo class booked — Sat 11 AM
items.sub: Booking linked to this lead · Physics demo

items.title: Lead submitted via Meta Lead Ads
items.sub: Campaign: NEET Early Bird · Andheri center

cols.name: Aarav Mehta (father)
lines: Outcome logs to timeline on hang-up

steps.title: Every enquiry lands in one inbox
steps.text: Meta Lead Ads, Google Lead Forms, website forms, walk-ins and CSV imports all feed one deduplicated pipeline — matched by phone or email so the same person never becomes two leads.

steps.title: SLA clocks keep leads warm
steps.text: Set first-contact and follow-up deadlines in hours. One click filters every lead that's due or missed, and reminders go to the right roles before the clock runs out.

steps.title: Scored, staged and owned
steps.text: Each lead carries a live 0–100 score from source quality, completeness, recency and engagement. Change stage, tag hot/warm/cold, add a note or place a call — right from the row.

steps.title: Your funnel, your stages
steps.text: Define your own pipeline stages and move leads through them one by one or in bulk. New leads route themselves via counsellor pools — round-robin, by shift roster, or to the best converter.

steps.title: Today's call list, ready at login
steps.text: Follow-ups bucket into Pending, Today and Upcoming, with a month calendar view. Close one with an outcome note and schedule the next touch in the same step.

steps.title: The complete story of every prospect
steps.text: One timeline mixes automatic events — stage changes, score updates, bookings, payments — with notes and call logs. Pin the note the next counsellor must read first.

steps.title: Call without leaving the lead
steps.text: Click-to-call or send an AI agent call from the lead itself; every email, WhatsApp, SMS and push also lands on the contact's communication timeline with delivery status.

steps.title: See exactly where leads drop off
steps.text: Every stage change is time-stamped, so the funnel is built from real history — not guesses. Conversion and lost outcomes are tracked separately from the working stage.

steps.title: Targets and ratings, computed live
steps.text: Set weekly or monthly targets per counsellor — conversions, leads or calls — measured from actual activity. Ratings blend conversion ratio and speed, ranked on a team leaderboard.

pillars.name: Marketing & Website
pillars.tagline: Websites, campaigns, coupons and referrals that fill your funnel
pillars.description: Everything an institute needs to attract, capture and convert learners — without hiring a web agency or stitching together five tools. Build a branded website and course storefront with a drag-and-drop editor, run sales pages with built-in checkout, pull ad leads straight from Meta and Google, and grow through email campaigns, coupons, referrals and shareable branded links. Every touchpoint runs on your own domain and feeds directly into your CRM.

features.name: Website & Course Catalogue Builder
features.tagline: Build your institute's website with drag-and-drop, no developer needed
features.description: An Elementor-style visual builder for creating your institute's public website and course catalogue. Assemble multi-page sites from a library of 40+ ready-made sections, watch a pixel-accurate live preview as you edit, and publish when ready. Every site is drafted, versioned and role-permissioned, so your team can work safely before anything goes live.

subFeatures.name: Multiple websites per institute
subFeatures.description: Create and manage several independent sites, each with its own name and Active/Draft/Archived status — for example a main site plus campaign microsites.

subFeatures.name: Multi-page sites with clean URLs
subFeatures.description: Add unlimited pages such as /about, /pricing and /policy, each with its own auto-sanitized URL slug, page title and publish toggle. Rename, duplicate, reorder or delete pages at any time.

subFeatures.name: Drag-and-drop canvas with live preview
subFeatures.description: Arrange sections on a canvas while a real, pixel-accurate preview of the live site renders alongside; clicking a section highlights it in the preview.

subFeatures.name: Desktop, tablet and mobile preview
subFeatures.description: Switch the preview between desktop, tablet and mobile widths to check responsiveness before publishing.

subFeatures.name: 40+ ready-made section widgets
subFeatures.description: Header with navigation and CTA, hero, course catalogue grid, footer, media showcase, stats, testimonials, FAQ accordion, video embed, CTA banner, pricing table, contact form, team, announcement feed, image gallery, tabs, logo cloud, trust chips, map embed, countdown timer, feature grid, newsletter signup, steps, scrolling marquee, custom HTML block and more.

subFeatures.name: Bookstore widgets
subFeatures.description: Dedicated book catalogue, book details, cart and buy/rent sections plus a policy renderer — enough to run a small book store on the same site.

subFeatures.name: Multi-column layout containers
subFeatures.description: 2, 3 and 4 column layouts (including asymmetric splits) that nest other widgets inside, with adjustable gaps, vertical alignment and automatic stacking on mobile.

subFeatures.name: Section layout variants
subFeatures.description: Each widget ships multiple style presets — switch a hero from Split to Centered to Full-Width, or a catalogue from grid to list, without losing content.

subFeatures.name: Page and section templates
subFeatures.description: Start from full page templates (Landing Page, Course Landing, About Page, Book Store) or drop in pre-built section combos like Social Proof or Course Showcase.

subFeatures.name: Live course catalogue section
subFeatures.description: The catalogue widget pulls your real courses automatically, with configurable filters, card fields, grid or list layout and hover effects — no manual updates when courses change.

subFeatures.name: Per-page SEO settings
subFeatures.description: Set meta title, meta description and a social-share (Open Graph) image on every page so it looks right in search results and link previews.

subFeatures.name: Rich text, images and link picker
subFeatures.description: Edit copy with a rich-text editor, upload images directly into any section, and pick link targets — pages, external URLs or in-page anchors — from a link picker.

subFeatures.name: Anchor links and conditional visibility
subFeatures.description: Give any section an anchor ID so navigation buttons smooth-scroll to it, and enable, disable or conditionally show any section.

subFeatures.name: Undo/redo and layers panel
subFeatures.description: Full edit history with keyboard shortcuts, plus a structural tree of every section on the page for quick selection and reordering.

subFeatures.name: Draft-to-publish workflow
subFeatures.description: Save work as a draft visitors never see, then publish the exact version live in one click; discard a draft to fall back to the published site.

subFeatures.name: Version history and one-click restore
subFeatures.description: Browse every saved draft and published revision, restore any old version into the editor, and re-publish it.

subFeatures.name: Role-based editing permissions
subFeatures.description: Read, write, delete and publish rights are gated by role — admins can publish and delete while other staff are limited to editing.

subFeatures.name: Sticky header and back-to-top
subFeatures.description: Optional site-wide sticky navigation header and a floating back-to-top button.

features.name: Website Themes & Design Studio
features.tagline: Agency-grade design: themes, fonts, gradients and animation
features.description: Deep design controls make institute sites look professionally designed rather than templated. Pick from named color themes or set your own brand color, choose typography pairings from a curated font library, and layer in modern effects like glassmorphism, gradients and scroll-in animations — all without touching code.

subFeatures.name: 9 color themes plus custom brand color
subFeatures.description: Default, Ocean, Forest, Sunset, Midnight, Rose, Violet, Amber and Slate presets, or override with any custom primary color — with light and dark site modes.

subFeatures.name: Curated Google Fonts library
subFeatures.description: 17 hand-picked typefaces with separate body and heading fonts, so you can pair a display serif over a clean sans.

subFeatures.name: Typography scale controls
subFeatures.description: Heading size scale (compact to display), body font-size override, and site-wide compactness settings.

subFeatures.name: Corner style
subFeatures.description: Sharp, rounded or pill corner radius applied consistently across the whole site.

subFeatures.name: Page atmosphere backgrounds
subFeatures.description: Whole-page canvas treatments — flat, soft, mesh or aurora — with adjustable intensity for a premium, non-flat look.

subFeatures.name: Layered backgrounds and gradients
subFeatures.description: Per-section background stacks: linear and radial gradients, solid layers, and background images with legibility overlays.

subFeatures.name: Glassmorphism, glow and gradient borders
subFeatures.description: Frosted-glass panels, soft brand-colored glow shadows, and gradient border effects on any section.

subFeatures.name: Entrance animations
subFeatures.description: Scroll-in animations per section with cascading stagger across child items, and a site-wide motion personality that scales all animation from calm to dynamic.

subFeatures.name: Decorative ornaments
subFeatures.description: Placeable background ornaments — blobs, rings, dot fields, grids and glow orbs — positioned freely behind content.

subFeatures.name: Section shape dividers
subFeatures.description: Wave, angle and curve dividers on the top or bottom edge of any section for smooth transitions between blocks.

subFeatures.name: Section width presets
subFeatures.description: Content-column width presets per section, including full-bleed, with custom max-width override.

subFeatures.name: What you design is what visitors see
subFeatures.description: The editor and the live site share one style engine, so the published page matches the design exactly.

subFeatures.name: Audience mode
subFeatures.description: Tune the site's presentation for children, adults or all audiences.

features.name: Sales & Product Pages with Checkout
features.tagline: Landing pages that sell courses and take payment
features.description: Purpose-built sales pages: pick the courses and payment plans to sell, design the page with the same visual builder, attach coupons and custom form fields, and share a short branded link. Every detail of the funnel — starting step, terms acceptance, invoices, upsells and redirects — is configurable per page.

subFeatures.name: Course and plan bundling
subFeatures.description: Map any combination of courses and payment plans onto one page, mark items preselected, and control display order.

subFeatures.name: Visual page design
subFeatures.description: Design the sales page with the full widget library — header, hero, product course grid, footer and any other section — in a dedicated design tab.

subFeatures.name: Page-specific coupon codes
subFeatures.description: Create coupons scoped to the page with percentage or fixed discounts and an optional cap, and toggle whether the coupon box shows at checkout.

subFeatures.name: Custom checkout fields
