subFeatures.description: Add or remove custom fields collected from buyers during checkout on that page.

subFeatures.name: Funnel start step
subFeatures.description: Choose whether visitors land on the catalog, the cart, or straight on payment.

subFeatures.name: 'People also buy' upsells
subFeatures.description: Configure suggested-course cross-sells per offering, with a custom heading, shown on the cart, the checkout form, or both.

subFeatures.name: Terms and conditions gate
subFeatures.description: Require acceptance of inline terms or an external terms URL before purchase.

subFeatures.name: Automatic invoices
subFeatures.description: Send purchase invoices automatically by email and/or WhatsApp.

subFeatures.name: Branded short link
subFeatures.description: Every page gets an auto-generated short URL on your own domain, with one-click copy for sharing.

subFeatures.name: Post-purchase behaviour
subFeatures.description: Custom success-page content, an after-payment redirect URL, an optional login button, back-navigation control during checkout, and allow/disallow deselecting bundled courses.

subFeatures.name: Draft status and buyer preview
subFeatures.description: Keep pages in draft, preview them exactly as buyers will see them, and activate when ready.

features.name: Lead Ads & Form Connectors
features.tagline: Every ad and form lead lands in your CRM automatically
features.description: Connect Facebook/Instagram Lead Ads, Google lead forms and third-party form tools so every lead flows straight into your campaigns and audience lists — no CSV exports. A guided Meta sign-in picks the page and form, field mapping shapes each lead to your custom fields, and health monitoring plus backup polling keep leads arriving even when an ad platform hiccups.

subFeatures.name: Guided Meta connection
subFeatures.description: One-click sign-in with Meta that lists the Pages you manage, warns when your account lacks full control of a Page, and returns you to your own white-label admin domain. Add several connectors in one session without repeating sign-in.

subFeatures.name: Lead form and field mapping
subFeatures.description: Browse each Page's lead forms, see their exact fields, and map every ad-form field to your campaign's custom fields — with auto-matching by name and unmapped fields kept under their original names.

subFeatures.name: Real-time lead delivery
subFeatures.description: Once connected, new leads from Meta ads land in your lead list within seconds via push delivery.

subFeatures.name: Backup polling and manual sync
subFeatures.description: A scheduled poller keeps re-fetching leads even if Meta's push delivery breaks, and a 'Sync leads now' button pulls the last 24 hours on demand — so nothing is lost.

subFeatures.name: Connector health monitoring
subFeatures.description: Per-connector health checks with diagnostics, last-lead-received time, automatic token refresh and a one-click re-subscribe fix — broken connectors surface honestly instead of silently dropping leads.

subFeatures.name: Google Lead Form connector
subFeatures.description: Generate a webhook URL and unique key to paste into Google Ads lead form extensions — no sign-in needed — routing submissions into a chosen campaign.

subFeatures.name: Third-party form webhooks
subFeatures.description: Receive submissions from Zoho Forms, Google Forms, Microsoft Forms or any generic webhook, with field mapping into your campaign's custom fields.

subFeatures.name: Public campaign response forms
subFeatures.description: Each marketing campaign gets a shareable public form — branded with your logo and colors, built from your own custom fields with validation — that captures respondents as leads with no login required.

subFeatures.name: Routing and per-connector defaults
subFeatures.description: Choose which audience list or campaign each connector feeds, and attach default values (like a branch or center name) so every lead is auto-tagged at capture.

subFeatures.name: Connector lifecycle management
subFeatures.description: List all active connectors with Meta/Google platform badges, edit, deactivate and copy webhook URLs from one place.

subFeatures.name: Source tracking and deduplication
subFeatures.description: Every lead is stamped with its source — website, Google Ads, Meta ads, manual entry and more — and repeat submissions from the same person are merged into the existing lead with the merge recorded on its timeline.

subFeatures.name: Website enquiry capture
subFeatures.description: Enquiries submitted from your public course catalogue pages are captured as leads automatically.

subFeatures.name: Encrypted credential storage
subFeatures.description: All connected-account tokens are encrypted at rest and never leave the server.

features.name: Email Campaigns
features.tagline: Design, target, schedule and send email blasts
features.description: A dedicated email campaigning workspace for marketing and engagement emails. Start from a designed template or write your own, target precise audiences — including lead lists captured from your campaigns, not just enrolled users — and send now or on a schedule. Big blasts are rate-controlled automatically, and scheduled campaigns stay editable until they go out.

subFeatures.name: Campaign composer
subFeatures.description: Separate internal campaign name and customer-facing subject line, rich-text or raw-HTML body, and hidden inbox preview text that appears next to the subject in recipients' inboxes.

subFeatures.name: Template re-use
subFeatures.description: Start a campaign from any saved email template — its subject auto-fills and stays editable — instead of designing from scratch.

subFeatures.name: From-address and email classification
subFeatures.description: Choose which configured sender address and display name the campaign goes out from; emails are classified as marketing, transactional or notification, each with its own deliverability treatment.

subFeatures.name: Audience targeting with estimates
subFeatures.description: Target by role, specific users, batches, tags, custom fields or captured lead lists, and see estimated recipient counts before sending.

subFeatures.name: Exclusions
subFeatures.description: Exclude specific people, batches or tags from any audience selection.

subFeatures.name: Send now or schedule
subFeatures.description: Immediate, one-time or recurring sends with timezone selection and quick picks like 'in 1 hour', 'tomorrow 9 AM' or 'next Monday 9 AM'.

subFeatures.name: Review step and device preview
subFeatures.description: A final review summarizes audience, schedule and content before confirming, with the rendered email previewable at mobile, tablet and laptop widths.

subFeatures.name: Edit, reschedule and resend
subFeatures.description: Open any not-yet-sent campaign back in the editor and change anything until its start time passes, or reopen a past campaign to adapt and send again.

subFeatures.name: Bulk sending with rate control
subFeatures.description: Large sends are processed as background batches with a configurable send rate, so big blasts don't trip provider limits.

subFeatures.name: Attachments
subFeatures.description: Emails can carry file attachments, including automatically generated documents like invoices.

features.name: Drag-and-Drop Template Designer
features.tagline: Build branded message templates without touching code
features.description: A visual, block-based designer for creating reusable message templates. Drag in text, images, buttons and layout sections, insert personalisation variables from a picker, and save templates that then power announcements, campaigns and automated notifications.

subFeatures.name: Visual block editor
subFeatures.description: Compose emails from drag-and-drop blocks — headings, text, images, buttons and sections — on a canvas with a formatting toolbar.

subFeatures.name: Personalisation variables
subFeatures.description: Insert merge fields like learner name or payment link from a picker; they're filled automatically per recipient at send time.

subFeatures.name: Image uploads
subFeatures.description: Upload and embed images directly inside the template editor.

subFeatures.name: Template library with editing
subFeatures.description: Create new templates and reopen any saved template later to edit it.

subFeatures.name: Multi-channel template store
subFeatures.description: The template library supports Email, WhatsApp, SMS and Push template types, each with its own variable list.

features.name: Course Catalog & Discovery
features.tagline: A branded storefront where learners browse and enroll
features.description: A public course storefront where learners and anonymous visitors browse, search and filter your catalog and open rich course detail pages before enrolling. Build any number of curated catalogues — including tag-based collections that stay current automatically — edit them safely as drafts with full revision history, and serve everything on your own custom domain.

subFeatures.name: Public course catalog
subFeatures.description: A browsable storefront of published courses with hero section, course cards, instructor call-to-action and supporter sections.

subFeatures.name: Search, sort and filters
subFeatures.description: Full-text course search with sorting, a filter panel (level, session, tags, price and more) and pagination.

subFeatures.name: Multiple and tag-based catalogues
subFeatures.description: Create any number of catalogues including a default one, plus shareable tag-scoped pages (like /jee or /neet) so campaigns can point buyers at a curated list that updates itself.

subFeatures.name: Draft, publish and revision history
subFeatures.description: Edit catalogues safely in a draft, publish atomically, discard drafts, and browse or restore from full revision history.

subFeatures.name: Rich course detail pages
subFeatures.description: Banner media, description, what-you-learn sections, the full curriculum structure — subjects, modules, chapters and slide counts — plus instructor info and stats, all viewable before enrolling.

subFeatures.name: Ratings and reviews
subFeatures.description: Average rating, rating distribution and learner reviews shown on the course page; enrolled learners can submit their own.

subFeatures.name: Course leaderboard preview
subFeatures.description: Course pages can showcase the batch leaderboard to build competitive excitement.

subFeatures.name: Live seat availability
subFeatures.description: Batch listings can reflect real-time seat availability from the seat inventory system.

subFeatures.name: White-label catalog on your domain
subFeatures.description: Domain-aware routing serves the catalog under the institute's own web domain with the institute's logo, colors and terminology.

subFeatures.name: App-store compliant purchasing
subFeatures.description: On iOS the app automatically adjusts paid-purchase UI where required, keeping the mobile app store-compliant.

features.name: Discount Coupons
features.tagline: Targeted promo codes with limits, scopes and expiry
features.description: Create promotional codes that apply percentage or flat discounts at checkout. Control exactly who can use each code, on which courses, how many times and for how long — and the code is validated live on the public checkout before payment.

subFeatures.name: Percentage or flat discounts
subFeatures.description: Each coupon applies either a percentage (with an optional maximum discount cap) or a fixed amount in a chosen currency.

subFeatures.name: Redemption window
subFeatures.description: Set a start and end date; codes outside the window are rejected automatically.

subFeatures.name: Usage limits
subFeatures.description: Cap total redemptions per code or leave it unlimited.

subFeatures.name: Email-restricted coupons
subFeatures.description: Restrict a code to a specific list of email addresses for private offers.

subFeatures.name: Course and batch scoping
subFeatures.description: Limit a coupon to specific batches or enrollment invites so it only works where intended.

subFeatures.name: Live validation at checkout
subFeatures.description: The public checkout verifies the code instantly and shows the exact discounted amount before the learner pays.

subFeatures.name: Coupon lifecycle management
subFeatures.description: Create, edit, activate, deactivate and delete coupons; every applied discount is recorded against the payment for auditing.

subFeatures.name: System-issued codes
subFeatures.description: Coupons can also originate from registration flows, product pages or referral programs, not just manual creation.

features.name: Referral Programs
features.tagline: Turn learners into your best acquisition channel
features.description: Run configurable refer-a-friend programs where both the referrer and the new learner earn rewards. Choose from five benefit types, stack them into reward tiers, protect payouts with vesting, and deliver bonus content automatically by email or WhatsApp when a referral converts. Learners share and track everything from a referral screen in their app.

subFeatures.name: Five reward types
subFeatures.description: Percentage discount, flat discount, bonus content (a file or link), free membership days, and reward points — configurable separately for the referrer and the referee.

subFeatures.name: Reward tiers and thresholds
subFeatures.description: Create tiered programs — for example bigger rewards after 5 referrals — with per-tier benefits, qualification rules, and points-per-referral thresholds.

subFeatures.name: Vesting period
subFeatures.description: Referrer rewards can vest only after a set number of days, protecting against refunds and fake signups.

subFeatures.name: Offer stacking control
subFeatures.description: Decide whether referral benefits can combine with other discounts or must apply alone.

subFeatures.name: Automated reward delivery
subFeatures.description: Bonus content and benefits are delivered automatically via email or WhatsApp using selectable message templates.

subFeatures.name: Learner referral page
subFeatures.description: Learners get an in-app screen with their copyable referral code and invite links, a table of who joined through them, and their earned rewards and points.

subFeatures.name: Program templates and default
subFeatures.description: Start from ready-made program templates, run multiple programs at once, and mark one as the institute default.

subFeatures.name: Referral tracking and logs
subFeatures.description: Every referral mapping and benefit payout is logged with status, beneficiary and timestamps; admins can query points balances per learner.

features.name: Branded Short Links
features.tagline: Short, trackable links on your own domain
features.description: The platform automatically mints short, human-readable links for everything you share — sales pages, enrollment invites, learner invitations, coupons and notification links — and serves them from your own custom domain. Destinations can be updated later, so links people already have never break.

subFeatures.name: Automatic short links everywhere
subFeatures.description: Sales pages, enrollment invites, learner invitations and coupon share links all get compact short codes automatically.

subFeatures.name: Readable link slugs
subFeatures.description: Short codes are generated from the content's name (like 'compiler-design') rather than random characters, with automatic suffixes when a name is taken.

subFeatures.name: Your domain, not ours
subFeatures.description: Short links resolve on the institute's own registered domain, keeping every shared URL on-brand.

subFeatures.name: Self-healing destinations
subFeatures.description: When the underlying page or invite changes, the short link updates in place — shared links never break, and deleted items clean up their links.

subFeatures.name: One link per item, forever
subFeatures.description: Requesting a link for the same course or invite always returns the same short URL — no duplicate links floating around.

subFeatures.name: Instant redirect with info lookup
subFeatures.description: Visiting a short link redirects immediately; an info mode also lets apps look up where a link points without redirecting.

subFeatures.name: Usage logging and deactivation
subFeatures.description: Each link records when it was last opened, and links can be deactivated so they stop resolving.

subFeatures.name: Short links in messages
subFeatures.description: Outbound notifications embed the short form of long deep links for cleaner SMS, WhatsApp and email content.

features.name: YouTube Channel Publishing
features.tagline: Class recordings upload themselves to your YouTube channel
features.description: Connect the institute's YouTube channel once and publish platform videos to it — including automatic publishing of live-class recordings. Set institute-wide upload defaults, trigger manual uploads, retry failures with one click, and audit the full upload history.

subFeatures.name: One-time channel connection
subFeatures.description: Securely connect the institute's YouTube account with clear status states (connected, needs reconnect, not connected) and check health anytime; disconnecting is admin-only.

subFeatures.name: Upload defaults
subFeatures.description: Set default privacy (Public, Unlisted, Private), category, license, language, tags and an optional default playlist applied to every upload.

subFeatures.name: Automatic recording publishing
subFeatures.description: Class recordings can be published to the channel automatically, with each upload traceable back to the live-class schedule it came from.

subFeatures.name: Manual upload and retry
subFeatures.description: Trigger an upload on demand and retry any failed job with one click.

subFeatures.name: Upload history
subFeatures.description: Track every video through Uploading, Uploaded, Failed or Cancelled states in a full history view.

features.name: Public Webinars & Guest Registration
features.tagline: Run open demo classes that capture every registrant
features.description: Make any live class public and share it as a registration link — perfect for demo classes, webinars and open houses. Visitors register through a custom form, verify their email, and join as guests without creating an account, while the institute captures every registrant's details as a ready-made follow-up list.

subFeatures.name: Public or private access per class
subFeatures.description: Mark a class private (enrolled batches only) or public, where anyone with the registration link can sign up.

subFeatures.name: Custom registration forms
subFeatures.description: Build the registration form from many field types — text, dropdown, number, email, URL, phone, date, long text, checkbox, radio and file upload — each optional or required.

subFeatures.name: Email verification and duplicate check
subFeatures.description: Registrants verify their email, and the system detects when an email is already registered for the session.

subFeatures.name: Branded registration page with countdown
subFeatures.description: The public page shows class details, institute branding, session status and a live countdown to start time.

subFeatures.name: Guest join without an account
subFeatures.description: Registered guests join through their own guest flow — including the built-in classroom, waiting room and in-page viewing — with attendance recorded separately.

subFeatures.name: Registrant data for follow-up
subFeatures.description: Admins can view all registration responses per session — a ready-made lead list for counsellors to work.

features.name: Public Onboarding & Instant Demo Workspaces
features.tagline: Prospects go from a link to a live demo in minutes
features.description: Shareable onboarding links let prospects answer a short qualification form — or skip it entirely — and drop straight into a live demo workspace matched to their organization type: school, distance learning, corporate or university. Every submission lands in a sales pipeline with instant alerts to your team.

subFeatures.name: Three link styles
subFeatures.description: General links ask the full question set, custom links show hand-picked questions with prefilled answers, and direct-demo links skip questions entirely and go straight to the demo.

subFeatures.name: Question form builder
subFeatures.description: Links are assembled from a question catalogue supporting text, email, phone, long text, URL, single-select, multi-select, yes/no and even brand-color picker fields.

subFeatures.name: Demos matched to institute type
subFeatures.description: Four seeded demo environments — School, Distance Learning, Corporate and University — so every prospect sees a workspace that looks like their world.

subFeatures.name: Instant demo handoff
subFeatures.description: On submitting, the prospect is handed demo credentials and taken into the product immediately.

subFeatures.name: Submission pipeline
subFeatures.description: Submissions move through New, Viewed, Contacted, Won and Lost, with per-stage counts and filters by institute type.

subFeatures.name: Instant team alerts
subFeatures.description: A managed recipient list gets an email the moment a new prospect submits, so follow-up starts immediately.

subFeatures.name: Link and demo management
subFeatures.description: Create, edit and retire links with unique slugs, and update the demo accounts behind each institute type centrally without breaking existing links.

features.name: Conversion Tracking (GTM & UTM)
features.tagline: Measure ad ROI end-to-end without engineering help
features.description: Wire your own analytics and ad pixels into every enrollment touchpoint. Add a Google Tag Manager container institute-wide or per sales page so GA4, Meta Pixel and remarketing tags fire on your pages, and generate UTM-tagged share links straight from the editor for clean campaign attribution.

subFeatures.name: GTM container per institute
subFeatures.description: Paste a Container ID once and every tag you manage in GTM — GA4, Meta Pixel, remarketing — goes live on your platform pages.

subFeatures.name: GTM per sales page
subFeatures.description: Attach a separate GTM container to an individual sales page for campaign-specific conversion tracking.

subFeatures.name: UTM tracking link generator
subFeatures.description: Generate share links with utm_source, medium, campaign, term and content baked in, straight from the page editor toolbar.

features.name: Shareable Media Links
features.tagline: Send a video or file as a simple expiring link
features.description: Share individual videos and documents as short public links that open in a lightweight viewer — optionally tied to a recipient's phone number and auto-expiring after a set period. Ideal for WhatsApp distribution of sample lectures and notices.

subFeatures.name: Public media viewer
subFeatures.description: A clean viewer page for shared videos (including YouTube embeds) and files — no login required.

subFeatures.name: Phone-personalized links
subFeatures.description: Links can embed the recipient's phone number for tracking and personalization.

subFeatures.name: Auto-expiring links
subFeatures.description: Shared links expire automatically after a set period to keep content controlled.

features.name: Vertical Solutions & Switching Support
features.tagline: Purpose-built for every kind of education business
features.description: Vacademy is packaged and positioned for specific education verticals, with dedicated solution configurations for exam coaching, schools, corporate training and more — plus free migration from existing tools and rapid go-live support. Localized presence spans India, the GCC, Australia and New Zealand.

subFeatures.name: Exam-coaching solutions
subFeatures.description: Tailored configurations for IELTS (module-wise mocks, teacher-reviewed Writing and Speaking), NEET (auto-graded test series, PYQ banks, subject-wise reports) and UPSC (Prelims and Mains test series, daily current-affairs practice, AI-assisted answer evaluation).

subFeatures.name: Studio and wellness solutions
subFeatures.description: Yoga and fitness studio setup with trial cohorts, membership and renewal handling, drip nurture and a white-label member platform.

subFeatures.name: Schools, STEM, corporate and distance learning
subFeatures.description: Dedicated positioning and setups for schools, STEM and robotics education companies scaling across schools, corporate L&D, and fully-online academies.

subFeatures.name: Localized global reach
subFeatures.description: Country- and city-specific presence across India, GCC (with Arabic-language options), Australia and New Zealand, a marketing site in 20 languages, and multi-currency pricing.

subFeatures.name: Free migration and fast go-live
subFeatures.description: Free migration from existing tools with go-live support in about 48 hours.

subFeatures.name: Comparison and switching resources
subFeatures.description: Head-to-head comparison guides against 65+ platforms — from Moodle and Canvas to Classplus, Graphy, Teachable and Docebo — with feature matrices, migration steps and switching stories to support an informed move.

demo.intro: Follow a marketing funnel end to end: build the institute's website, sell a course with built-in checkout, grow through referrals and coupons, and watch ad leads flow straight into your CRM.

items.title: Meta · NEET Demo form
items.sub: Last lead 40 sec ago · token OK

steps.title: Your website, without an agency
steps.text: This is the visual site builder — an Elementor-style editor for your institute's public website and course catalogue. Sites are drafted, versioned and role-permissioned, and everything publishes to your own domain.

steps.title: Assemble pages from 40+ sections
steps.text: Drag sections — hero, course catalogue grid, pricing table, FAQ, countdown timer — onto the canvas while a pixel-accurate live preview renders alongside. Check desktop, tablet and mobile widths before anything goes live.

steps.title: Agency-grade design, one click live
steps.text: Pick from 9 color themes or your exact brand color, pair fonts from a curated library, and set per-page SEO. Drafts stay invisible until you publish, and full version history restores any old revision in one click.

steps.title: A storefront that updates itself
steps.text: The catalogue widget pulls your real published courses — prices, ratings, even live seat availability from seat inventory. Tag-based pages like /neet stay current automatically as courses change.

steps.title: Checkout built into the page
steps.text: Sales pages bundle courses and payment plans with a real checkout: coupons validate live and show the exact discounted amount, terms acceptance is enforced, and invoices go out automatically by email or WhatsApp.

steps.title: Learners become your ad channel
steps.text: Referral programs offer five reward types — discounts, bonus content, free membership days, points — with tiers, vesting against refunds, and automatic reward delivery via email or WhatsApp when a referral converts.

steps.title: Coupons with real controls
steps.text: Percentage or flat discounts with caps, redemption windows, usage limits, email-restricted private offers and batch scoping. Every applied discount is recorded against the payment for auditing.

steps.title: Connect Meta in one guided flow
steps.text: Sign in once, pick the Page and lead form, and map every ad-form field to your campaign's custom fields — auto-matched by name. Route each connector to an audience list with default tags like branch or centre.

steps.title: Every lead, in seconds
steps.text: Meta leads arrive via push within seconds; Google lead forms, Zoho and website enquiries flow in through webhooks. Each lead is stamped with its source, and repeat submissions merge into the existing lead.

steps.title: Connectors that never fail silently
steps.text: Per-connector health checks show last-lead-received time, refresh tokens automatically and offer a one-click re-subscribe fix. A backup poller and 'Sync leads now' re-fetch leads even if push delivery breaks.

pillars.name: Communication Suite
pillars.tagline: Announcements, email, WhatsApp, push and chat — one hub
pillars.description: The Communication Suite gives your institute one place to reach — and hear back from — every learner, parent, teacher and lead. Broadcast rich announcements across email, WhatsApp, push and nine in-app surfaces; run two-way email and WhatsApp inboxes; resolve learner doubts to completion; and keep every message on-brand with reusable templates. Precise targeting, scheduling, approvals and deliverability protection are built in, so the right message reaches the right people at the right time.

features.name: Announcement Center
features.tagline: One announcement, delivered to every screen and channel
features.description: Compose a rich announcement once and deliver it simultaneously over push notification, email and WhatsApp — and inside the apps as alerts, pins, popups, messages, posts or tasks. Announcements carry rich content, attachments and priority, move through a full lifecycle from draft to expired, and every send is tracked with delivery and read statistics.

subFeatures.name: Rich content composer
subFeatures.description: Write announcements in a rich-text editor or switch to raw HTML source view. Content can be text, HTML, video or image, including full HTML email documents.

subFeatures.name: Three delivery channels in one send
subFeatures.description: Push notification, email and WhatsApp go out together, each with its own configuration — email subject and from-address, WhatsApp template with variable mapping, push title and body with character guidance.

subFeatures.name: Email campaigning
subFeatures.description: Full email sends with subject line, inbox preview text, template selection and campaign settings.

subFeatures.name: Device preview
subFeatures.description: Preview the announcement exactly as it will look on mobile, tablet and laptop before sending.

subFeatures.name: Auto-fill push from content
subFeatures.description: Push title and body populate automatically from the announcement, with a toggle to write them manually.

subFeatures.name: Priority levels
subFeatures.description: Mark each announcement Low, Normal, High or Urgent so critical notices stand out to recipients.

subFeatures.name: Attachments and resources
subFeatures.description: Attach documents, videos, links, images, audio and presentations so recipients get the materials with the message.

subFeatures.name: Full announcement lifecycle
subFeatures.description: Announcements move through Draft, Pending Approval, Scheduled, Active, Inactive and Expired states, with controls to activate or deactivate at any time.

subFeatures.name: Delivery and read analytics
subFeatures.description: Per-announcement stats show delivered, read, dismissed counts and dismiss rate, down to per-recipient delivery status with seen and dismissed timestamps.

subFeatures.name: Edit, duplicate and re-deliver
subFeatures.description: Update or duplicate any announcement, trigger delivery again on demand, and restart failed deliveries with recovery tracking.

subFeatures.name: Planned and past views
subFeatures.description: Separate history and schedule screens with search, status and date-range filters keep teams on top of what is queued and what already went out.

features.name: In-App Announcement Channels
features.tagline: Nine in-app surfaces, from popups to pinned dashboards
features.description: Beyond email and WhatsApp, announcements appear inside the learner and admin apps in purpose-built ways: urgent alerts, dashboard pins, direct messages, class streams, a resources area, community posts, task assignments and full-screen overlays. Each surface has its own behaviour settings, and everything streams to open apps in real time.

subFeatures.name: System alerts
subFeatures.description: High-visibility alerts in users' alert trays with configurable auto-dismiss timing and priority handling.

subFeatures.name: Dashboard pins
subFeatures.description: Pin an announcement prominently on users' home dashboards for a set duration and position.

subFeatures.name: Broadcast direct messages
subFeatures.description: Deliver the announcement into each recipient's personal message inbox, with optional threaded replies.

subFeatures.name: Class streams
subFeatures.description: Post into a batch's stream, typed as General, Assignment, Live Class, Announcement, Discussion or Q&A.

subFeatures.name: Resources feed
subFeatures.description: Publish study materials into a resources area organised by folder, category and content type — document, video, link, image, audio or presentation.

subFeatures.name: Community posts
subFeatures.description: Publish to community spaces typed General, Q&A, Discussion, Study Group, Announcements, Events or Help & Support, with tags and replies.

subFeatures.name: Announcement-as-task
subFeatures.description: Turn an announcement into real work: linked slides, go-live and deadline times, estimated duration, attempts, mandatory flag and automatic deadline reminders, tracked through Live, Completed and Overdue states.

subFeatures.name: Full-screen app overlays
subFeatures.description: Show an unmissable dismissible popup on app open — ideal for exam notices, fee reminders and policy updates.

subFeatures.name: Real-time delivery
subFeatures.description: New announcements, pins, alerts and task status changes stream to open apps instantly over a live connection — no refresh needed.

subFeatures.name: Unified message feed
subFeatures.description: Every user gets a consolidated messages view with unread counts, per-channel feeds and mark-as-read or dismiss actions.

subFeatures.name: Engagement tracking
subFeatures.description: The platform records who read, dismissed, clicked, liked or shared each message, feeding delivery statistics.

features.name: Smart Audience Targeting
features.tagline: Target exactly who should hear it — nobody else
features.description: Pick recipients by role, individual user, batch, tag, custom-field filter or marketing campaign audience, then layer exclusions on top. A live estimate shows how many people will receive the message before you send it.

subFeatures.name: Seven recipient types
subFeatures.description: Address whole roles (all learners, all teachers), specific users, entire batches, batches restricted to certain org roles, tags, custom-field filters, or campaign audiences — mixed freely across multiple rows.

subFeatures.name: Custom-field filters
subFeatures.description: Narrow any audience with equals, contains, starts-with and ends-with filters on custom profile fields — for example, only learners whose city equals Pune.

subFeatures.name: Per-row exclusions
subFeatures.description: Exclude specific roles, users, batches or tags from any recipient row — for example, all learners except Batch X.

subFeatures.name: Tag-based audiences
subFeatures.description: Select one or many user tags as an audience, each with its own reach estimate.

subFeatures.name: Campaign audiences
subFeatures.description: Reach leads captured through marketing campaign forms directly from the announcement composer.

subFeatures.name: Live reach estimate
subFeatures.description: See the estimated recipient count for the whole announcement and per audience row before sending.

subFeatures.name: Sub-organisation targeting
subFeatures.description: For sub-org batches, choose whether the message goes to the batch's admins or its learners.

features.name: Scheduling & Recurring Broadcasts
features.tagline: Send now, later, or on a repeating schedule
features.description: Announcements go out immediately, at a chosen future time, or on a repeating schedule such as every Monday at 9am. Everything is timezone-aware, visible on a schedule calendar, and executed by a reliable background scheduler.

subFeatures.name: Immediate send
subFeatures.description: Deliver to the full resolved audience the moment the announcement is submitted.

subFeatures.name: One-time scheduling
subFeatures.description: Pick a future date and time in any timezone, with quick picks like 'in 1 hour', 'tomorrow 9 AM' or 'next Monday 9 AM'.

subFeatures.name: Recurring schedules
subFeatures.description: Define daily, weekly or custom repeat rules with optional start and end dates — perfect for weekly digests and fee reminders.

subFeatures.name: Schedule calendar and queue management
subFeatures.description: A schedule view lists upcoming one-time and recurring sends as calendar items, with edit, delete and a 'Deliver now' action to fire a scheduled announcement immediately.

subFeatures.name: Reliable background delivery
subFeatures.description: Scheduled sends run in the background with recovery — interrupted deliveries are detected and restarted without duplicating messages.

features.name: Doubts & Help Queries
features.tagline: Learners ask, the right teacher answers — tracked to resolution
features.description: Learners raise doubts anchored to the exact spot in a lesson — even a specific moment in a video — and teachers answer in threaded conversations. A separate help-desk flow handles non-academic queries like payment or technical issues, with configurable types, automatic routing to the right staff, and tracking through resolution. Even logged-out website visitors can submit questions.

subFeatures.name: Content-anchored doubts
subFeatures.description: Doubts capture the exact content position — a video timestamp chip jumps anyone reading the doubt to that moment — so teachers see precisely what the learner was viewing.

subFeatures.name: In-slide doubt sidebar
subFeatures.description: Learners ask and teachers answer right next to the slide the doubt refers to, keeping the conversation in context.

subFeatures.name: Threaded replies
subFeatures.description: Every doubt is a conversation: replies, history and follow-ups stay together in one thread.

subFeatures.name: Central doubts inbox
subFeatures.description: Admins and teachers triage every doubt across courses in a filterable inbox — by batch, status, type and assignee.

subFeatures.name: Automatic assignment rules
subFeatures.description: Route new queries to the subject teacher, batch teacher, everyone in a role, or specific staff, with a fallback when no one matches — or keep assignment manual.

subFeatures.name: Configurable query types
subFeatures.description: Built-in types (Doubt, Payment Issue, Technical Issue) plus custom types with institute-defined labels and per-type routing.

subFeatures.name: Guest queries
subFeatures.description: Logged-out visitors submit questions with their name and email from public pages; replies and resolution notices are emailed to them directly.

subFeatures.name: Learner query tracking
subFeatures.description: Learners see all their raised queries with status and institute responses, and can mark their own doubts resolved.

subFeatures.name: Resolution workflow
subFeatures.description: Doubts move through Active and Resolved states with raised and resolved timestamps, keeping accountability clear.

subFeatures.name: Instant staff alerts
subFeatures.description: Device push notifications tell assigned staff the moment a new doubt arrives.

features.name: WhatsApp Business Messaging
features.tagline: Official WhatsApp messaging at institute scale
features.description: Send WhatsApp messages to learners and leads through official WhatsApp Business channels, connecting via your choice of provider — Meta's Cloud API, WATI or Combot. Bulk template sends personalise per recipient, delivery is confirmed end-to-end, and inbound replies flow back into the platform automatically.

subFeatures.name: Multi-provider support
subFeatures.description: Connect through Meta's official Cloud API, WATI or Combot with credentials stored securely; the platform routes messages through whichever provider the channel uses.

subFeatures.name: Guided webhook setup
subFeatures.description: Copy-paste webhook configuration so inbound messages and delivery statuses flow back into the platform out of the box.

subFeatures.name: Bulk template sending
subFeatures.description: Send pre-approved templates with per-recipient variables to precisely targeted audiences.

subFeatures.name: Rich media messages
subFeatures.description: Messages support text, images, video, documents, audio, locations, contacts, buttons and interactive lists.

subFeatures.name: Media headers and dynamic buttons
subFeatures.description: Attach an image, video or document header to template sends and inject per-recipient URLs into buttons — for example, personal payment links.

subFeatures.name: End-to-end delivery receipts
subFeatures.description: Every message is tracked as sent, delivered, read or failed via provider webhooks, visible across analytics and contact timelines.

subFeatures.name: Multiple numbers per institute
subFeatures.description: Register one or more WhatsApp numbers against the institute, with webhook registration and verification handled in-product.

subFeatures.name: Incoming message capture
subFeatures.description: Replies and inbound messages are received, logged and routed to inboxes and chatbot flows automatically.

subFeatures.name: Template-to-event mapping
subFeatures.description: Map approved templates to system messages, such as which template is used for invoice notices or transactional updates.

features.name: WhatsApp Team Inbox
features.tagline: Two-way WhatsApp conversations, right in the dashboard
features.description: A shared WhatsApp inbox where staff see every conversation with learners and leads, reply in real time, and stay compliant with WhatsApp's rules automatically. When a conversation's 24-hour reply window has closed, agents send an approved template to re-open it.

subFeatures.name: Conversation list with unread counts
subFeatures.description: All WhatsApp threads sorted by recency, showing sender name, last message and unread badge, with search and pagination.

subFeatures.name: Full message history
subFeatures.description: Scroll through the complete inbound and outbound history per contact, including delivery states on every message.

subFeatures.name: Free-text replies
subFeatures.description: Reply directly within WhatsApp's 24-hour customer-service window, with a clear notice when the window has expired.

subFeatures.name: Template replies for expired windows
subFeatures.description: Search and send any approved template — with variable prompts — to re-engage contacts outside the 24-hour window.

subFeatures.name: Linked identities
subFeatures.description: Conversations tie back to platform users wherever the phone number matches, so staff know exactly who they are talking to.

features.name: WhatsApp Template Studio
features.tagline: Build and get Meta-approved templates without leaving the platform
features.description: Create official WhatsApp Business message templates in-app: compose header, body, footer and buttons, add numbered variables with sample values, preview the message live, and submit straight to Meta for approval. Already-approved templates sync in from your provider so they are immediately usable in campaigns and flows.

subFeatures.name: Full template composer
subFeatures.description: Header, body text, footer and action buttons — matching Meta's template anatomy exactly.

subFeatures.name: Marketing and utility categories
subFeatures.description: Choose the Meta category that governs each template's pricing and rules.

subFeatures.name: 13 languages
subFeatures.description: Author templates in English, English (US), Hindi, Spanish, Portuguese (BR), Arabic, French, German, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean and Chinese (Simplified).

subFeatures.name: Numbered variables with samples
subFeatures.description: Insert {{1}}, {{2}}-style placeholders with one click; the builder tracks the count, requires a sample value for each (needed for Meta review), and lets you name variables for later mapping.

subFeatures.name: Media headers
subFeatures.description: Add a text header or an image, video or document header with a sample for Meta review.

subFeatures.name: Live preview
subFeatures.description: See the rendered message with sample values substituted as you type.

subFeatures.name: Draft, submit and track approval
subFeatures.description: Save drafts, edit them, submit to Meta from the template list, and monitor approval status and date per template.

subFeatures.name: Provider sync
subFeatures.description: Pull already-approved templates from your connected provider into the platform library, with last-synced status per template.

features.name: Communication Hub & Email Inbox
features.tagline: One dashboard for all outbound and inbound email
features.description: A command center for institute communications: at-a-glance email and WhatsApp performance stats, a cross-channel activity feed, and a shared two-way email inbox. When contacts reply to your emails, the replies land in per-contact conversation threads that staff answer without leaving the platform.

subFeatures.name: Channel stats overview
subFeatures.description: Email and WhatsApp delivery statistics with per-batch breakdowns over a selectable window, shown as stat cards.

subFeatures.name: Recent activity feed
subFeatures.description: A cross-channel timeline of recent email and WhatsApp sends.

subFeatures.name: Threaded email conversations
subFeatures.description: Inbound and outbound emails group into per-contact conversation threads with a conversation list, filters and full thread view.

subFeatures.name: Reply from the dashboard
subFeatures.description: Compose and send email replies directly from the inbox, choosing which verified sender address to reply from.

subFeatures.name: Inbox search
subFeatures.description: Search conversations across the inbox to find a contact's thread quickly.

subFeatures.name: Inbound setup status
subFeatures.description: A status view shows whether inbound email receiving is configured and healthy for the institute.

features.name: Message Template Studio
features.tagline: On-brand email and message templates, reusable everywhere
features.description: A visual drag-and-drop designer for reusable branded templates — email, WhatsApp, invoice email and invoice PDF layout — categorized as marketing, utility or transactional. Drop in blocks, style them visually, and insert personalization variables that auto-fill per recipient at send time. Saved templates are picked up across campaigns, announcements, automations and invoices.

subFeatures.name: Visual drag-and-drop editor
subFeatures.description: Compose with header, hero, two-column, button and footer blocks built for email-safe layout, with visual controls for alignment and widths.

subFeatures.name: Style manager with HTML access
subFeatures.description: Edit colors, spacing and typography on any element without writing HTML — while full HTML access remains available for power users.

subFeatures.name: Personalization variables
subFeatures.description: A variables dialog lists all merge fields by category with click-to-insert; values like learner name or course fill per recipient automatically, and used variables are detected as you write.

subFeatures.name: Four template types
subFeatures.description: One studio covers Email, WhatsApp, Invoice and Invoice-Email templates, tagged as marketing, utility or transactional.

subFeatures.name: Subject line and inbox preview
subFeatures.description: Set template name, type, category, email subject and inbox preview text right from the editor.

subFeatures.name: Shared image and font library
subFeatures.description: Upload images once to cloud hosting and reuse them across every template; choose from 14 fonts including Roboto, Poppins, Montserrat and Georgia.

subFeatures.name: Invoice templates
subFeatures.description: Dedicated templates for the invoice email and the invoice PDF layout keep billing communication on-brand.

subFeatures.name: Default templates and sample packs
subFeatures.description: Mark a template as the default for its type so automations pick it up without configuration, and start from ready-made samples like welcome emails and reminders.

subFeatures.name: Organized, searchable library
subFeatures.description: Search, filter by type and provider, duplicate, delete, and rely on duplicate-name guards and per-type counts to keep the library tidy.

features.name: Email Deliverability & Bounce Protection
features.tagline: Automatic suppression keeps your sender reputation clean
features.description: Send from multiple verified institute addresses while the platform protects your deliverability automatically: addresses that hard-bounce or complain are suppressed from future sends, admins review and manage the list, and recipients can opt out instantly via one-click unsubscribe links.

subFeatures.name: Verified sender addresses
subFeatures.description: Add multiple sending addresses with display names and purposes — announcements, marketing, receipts, chat and community — each with its own verification status.

subFeatures.name: Automatic suppression
subFeatures.description: Bounced and complained addresses are captured from the email provider and blocked from future sends automatically.

subFeatures.name: Suppression list management
subFeatures.description: Search and browse all blocked addresses with details of why and when they bounced; unblock a corrected address or re-block one with instant effect.

subFeatures.name: Bounce statistics
subFeatures.description: A stats view summarises bounce volume and types across the institute.

subFeatures.name: Pre-send batch checking
subFeatures.description: Check a whole recipient list against the suppression list in one call before a bulk send.

subFeatures.name: One-click unsubscribe
subFeatures.description: Public per-channel unsubscribe links honor opt-outs instantly.

features.name: Transactional Email & OTP Delivery
features.tagline: Reliable system emails: OTPs, invites and receipts
features.description: The same messaging engine powers critical system emails — one-time login codes, new-user invitations and automated receipts — sent through the institute's verified senders with the same tracking and bounce protection as campaigns.

subFeatures.name: Email OTP
subFeatures.description: One-time verification codes are generated and emailed for secure login and identity verification.

subFeatures.name: New user invitations
subFeatures.description: Invitation emails onboard newly added users with their access details.

subFeatures.name: Full delivery logging
subFeatures.description: System emails carry the same status tracking as all other communication and appear in the contact timeline.

features.name: Push & In-App Notifications
features.tagline: In-app inbox plus real push to phones and desktops
features.description: A notification center collects everything users need to act on, while native push notifications reach Android and iOS devices even when the app is closed. Institutes connect their own Firebase project in minutes, and learners control exactly which notifications they receive.

subFeatures.name: Notification center
subFeatures.description: A full-page list of all notifications with read states, plus a dashboard preview of the latest.

subFeatures.name: Mobile and web push
subFeatures.description: Firebase-powered push to Android, iOS and web for classes, tests, announcements and messages — delivered even when the app is closed.

subFeatures.name: Self-serve push setup
subFeatures.description: Enable push for your institute by pasting your Firebase configuration — no engineering work required.

subFeatures.name: Personal notification preferences
subFeatures.description: A settings panel where each user chooses which notification types they receive.

features.name: Messaging & Batch Chat
features.tagline: Direct messages and batch group chats inside the learning app
features.description: Learners message teachers and peers one-to-one, participate in batch group chats, and follow community channels — all without leaving the app or exposing anyone's personal phone number. Institute-defined rules keep community spaces safe.

subFeatures.name: One-to-one messages
subFeatures.description: Start direct conversations from a new-chat modal and continue them in a threaded view.

subFeatures.name: Batch group chat
subFeatures.description: A chat panel scoped to the learner's batch for class-wide discussion.

subFeatures.name: Conversation inbox
subFeatures.description: A conversation list showing all active threads with unread indicators.

subFeatures.name: Community rules panel
subFeatures.description: Institute-defined rules displayed within community chat spaces.

features.name: Permissions, Moderation & Approval Workflow
features.tagline: Control who can announce what, with maker-checker approval
features.description: Decide per role who may send each type of communication — teachers can post to streams while only admins send system alerts, for example. Messages from restricted roles enter a pending-approval queue before anything goes out, and per-channel policies govern moderation, limits and retention across the whole suite.

subFeatures.name: Per-channel role permissions
subFeatures.description: For every in-app channel — community, pins, alerts, DMs, streams, resources, overlays — configure independently whether learners, teachers and admins can send.

subFeatures.name: Approval queue
subFeatures.description: A dedicated approvals screen lists announcements pending review; approvers approve or reject each one with a reason, and creators submit drafts for approval.

subFeatures.name: Learner-to-learner DM control
subFeatures.description: An explicit switch governs whether learners may direct-message other learners.

subFeatures.name: Moderation controls
subFeatures.description: Approval-required toggles, banned keyword lists, automatic moderation actions, daily announcement caps and per-channel reply on/off switches.

subFeatures.name: Channel behaviour policies
subFeatures.description: Auto-dismiss timing for alerts, pin limits and durations per user, stream tags and retention days, and a maximum file size for shared resources.

subFeatures.name: Community guidelines
subFeatures.description: Set a guidelines title and list of rules shown to your community.

subFeatures.name: Institute defaults with restore
subFeatures.description: All communication settings live in one per-institute configuration with sensible defaults, a default timezone for scheduled sends, validation and restore-to-defaults.

subFeatures.name: Personal notification preferences
subFeatures.description: Each user has their own preference profile controlling how they receive communications.

demo.intro: Follow one announcement from the composer to every learner's screen, then work the WhatsApp inbox and check what actually got read.

items.title: Aarav Mehta · NEET Batch A
items.sub: Can I pay the fee in two parts?

messages.text: PTM on Sat 26 Jul, 10 AM. Reply YES to confirm — Nalanda Academy
Can I pay the fee in two parts?
Yes Aarav — ₹22,500 now and ₹22,500 by 30 Aug. Sending your payment link.
24-hour reply window open · closes today 6:42 PM

steps.title: Compose once, reach everyone
steps.text: Write an announcement in a rich-text editor (or raw HTML), attach PDFs and videos, and mark priority up to Urgent. Every announcement has a lifecycle — draft, approval, scheduled, active — so nothing goes out half-baked.

steps.title: Target exactly who should hear it
steps.text: Mix seven recipient types — roles, users, batches, tags, custom-field filters, campaign audiences — and layer exclusions on top. A live estimate shows 1,286 recipients before you commit to sending.

steps.title: Email, WhatsApp and push in one send
steps.text: Each channel keeps its own settings: email subject and from-address, an approved WhatsApp template with variable mapping, and push that auto-fills from your content. Send now, next Monday 9 AM, or on a weekly repeat.

steps.title: One send lands on every screen
steps.text: The same announcement arrives on WhatsApp (via Meta Cloud API, WATI or Combot), email, Firebase push — even with the app closed — and in-app, with delivery tracked per recipient on every channel.

steps.title: Nine in-app surfaces, streamed live
steps.text: Beyond notifications: dashboard pins, urgent alerts, class-stream posts, even announcements-as-tasks with deadlines and mandatory flags. Everything streams to open apps in real time — no refresh.

steps.title: A shared WhatsApp inbox for your team
steps.text: Parent and learner replies flow back through provider webhooks into one team inbox, sorted by recency with unread counts. Numbers match to platform users, so staff always know it's Aarav from NEET Batch A.

steps.title: Compliant with WhatsApp's rules, always
steps.text: Reply free-text inside the 24-hour customer-service window; once it closes, send a Meta-approved template to re-open the thread. Build and submit templates to Meta in-app, in 13 languages.

steps.title: Know what landed — and what got read
steps.text: Per-announcement stats track delivered, read and dismissed counts down to per-recipient timestamps. Failed sends are flagged with one-click re-delivery, and WhatsApp receipts confirm sent, delivered, read.

steps.title: Deliverability protected automatically
steps.text: Hard bounces and complaints are suppressed from future sends automatically, recipients get one-click unsubscribe, and you can check a whole list against suppressions before any bulk send.

pillars.name: Voice & AI Calling
pillars.tagline: Cloud telephony, IVR and AI agents that call for you
pillars.description: Vacademy turns your admissions phone line into a complete calling operation: an AI voice agent that phones every enquiry within about a minute in natural Hindi, English or Hinglish, plus a full cloud-calling desk for your human counsellors — click-to-call, recordings, dispositions, IVR menus and smart inbound routing. Use Vacademy's own built-in telephony with no telecom setup, or plug in your existing Exotel, Plivo or Airtel IQ account. Every conversation is logged, transcribed and AI-scored, so managers coach from evidence and billing stays transparent, per minute.

features.name: Vacademy AI Voice Agent
features.tagline: An AI that phones your leads and sounds human
features.description: A first-party AI calling agent that holds natural phone conversations with leads — greeting, qualifying, answering questions and handling objections — in Hindi, English or mixed Hinglish. New enquiries are dialled within about 60 seconds, and every call ends with the outcome, a lead rating and the answers you asked for written straight onto the lead record. Institutes author their own agent personas with custom scripts, voices and goals, and the agent hands the call to a human counsellor whenever the conversation warrants it.

subFeatures.name: Custom agent personas
subFeatures.description: Create any number of named AI agents, each with its own opening line, conversation instructions, language, voice, direction (outbound, inbound or both) and enable/disable switch.

subFeatures.name: Hindi, English and Hinglish
subFeatures.description: The agent converses naturally in Hindi, English or mixed Hinglish and follows callers who switch mid-sentence — the way parents and students actually talk. Callers can interrupt it and it keeps up.

subFeatures.name: 37 natural Indian voices
subFeatures.description: Pick from a catalog of 37 male and female Indian voices, with per-agent speaking pace (0.5–2.0x) and expressiveness controls, plus a voice tester in settings.

subFeatures.name: Calls every lead in about 60 seconds
subFeatures.description: New enquiries are dialled within about a minute of arriving, and imported lead lists are worked through automatically.

subFeatures.name: Question extraction onto the lead
subFeatures.description: Define the questions each agent should get answered — class, budget, timeline and more — and the extracted answers are written straight onto the lead record after the call.

subFeatures.name: Automatic disposition and lead rating
subFeatures.description: After each call the outcome and a lead rating land on the lead record, so counsellors pick up ready, pre-qualified leads.

subFeatures.name: Custom dispositions per agent
subFeatures.description: Each agent can carry its own list of allowed call outcomes, or inherit the institute's defaults.

subFeatures.name: Mid-call human handoff
subFeatures.description: The agent transfers the live call to configured human numbers when the caller asks for a person or the conversation warrants it, with voicemail as the final fallback.

subFeatures.name: Call-length cap
subFeatures.description: A per-agent maximum call duration keeps AI conversations — and their cost — bounded.

subFeatures.name: Try it live before you buy
subFeatures.description: Prospects can talk to the AI agent from the public website in Hindi, English or Hinglish, and listen to a real sample recording.

subFeatures.name: Runs on Vacademy's own telephony
subFeatures.description: AI calls are carried on the institute's Vacademy Voice numbers — no third-party AI-calling vendor or extra account required.

features.name: Vacademy Voice (Built-in Cloud Telephony)
features.tagline: Business calling that works out of the box
features.description: A first-party phone system: Vacademy provisions the numbers, carries the calls and bills per minute, so institutes get professional calling without opening their own telecom account or buying SIMs. It includes outbound click-to-call, inbound IVR, recording, and a built-in India-compliance layer covering calling hours, DND scrubbing and disclosures. Sold as simple published plans starting at ₹3,499/month.

subFeatures.name: Managed business numbers
subFeatures.description: Vacademy provisions each institute's business numbers in its own isolated carrier subaccount, with a configurable default caller-ID for outbound calls.

subFeatures.name: No telecom setup required
subFeatures.description: No own telephony account or SIM needed — everything runs on Vacademy's telephony. DLT/PE registration is handled separately as Indian telecom regulation requires.

subFeatures.name: India compliance guardrails
subFeatures.description: Enforced before every dial: DND/NCPR number scrubbing, a configurable calling window (default 9 AM–9 PM in the institute's timezone), recording-consent and automated-call disclosures, and a DLT-registration gate for promotional campaigns.

subFeatures.name: Concurrent-channel plans
subFeatures.description: Plans define how many simultaneous calls the institute can run, with the purchased channel count acting as a hard dial cap.

subFeatures.name: Recording and timezone controls
subFeatures.description: A per-institute toggle records all inbound and outbound calls, and a timezone setting drives both the compliance window and reporting.

subFeatures.name: Human handoff numbers
subFeatures.description: Live calls can be transferred to configured human numbers, including mid-call handoff from the AI agent to a counsellor.

subFeatures.name: Published plans from ₹3,499/month
subFeatures.description: Voice Basic (₹3,499/mo, ₹3.99/min with ~850+ minutes included), Voice Pro (₹6,999/mo, ~1,750 minutes, adds direct calling and the full voice dashboard), and CRM + Voice monthly (₹8,999/mo). Recordings and full call history are included on every plan.

subFeatures.name: Annual pay-per-use plan
subFeatures.description: The flagship CRM + Voice annual plan (₹19,999/yr) charges a flat ₹3.49/min from minute one with no monthly minute minimum — built for seasonal admissions, with ₹0 minute charges in quiet months.

features.name: AI Calling Automation & Guardrails
features.tagline: Set the rules once — the AI works every lead within them
features.description: Govern exactly how AI calling behaves for your institute: which AI provider to use, when the bot may dial, how many times it retries, and what happens after each outcome. Interested leads are auto-assigned to counsellors, and hard daily dial caps make a runaway campaign impossible.

subFeatures.name: Choice of AI provider
subFeatures.description: Choose the AI voice provider per institute — Vacademy's own AI agent or an integrated third party (Aavtaar) — with credential management and no change to workflows or buttons.

subFeatures.name: Campaign and agent registry
subFeatures.description: Create named AI agents and campaigns (e.g. 'Class Feedback'), tagged inbound or outbound, plus a default campaign for ad-hoc calls — so every AI-call report is classified correctly and displays a friendly name.

subFeatures.name: Calling shifts
subFeatures.description: Define one or more daily time windows (e.g. 09:00–13:00 and 16:00–20:00, in the institute's timezone) in which the AI may dial; leads outside the window are automatically deferred and re-checked.

subFeatures.name: Retry policy
subFeatures.description: Set max retries per lead, minutes between retries, max AI calls per lead per day, and the minimum connect time that counts a call as answered.

subFeatures.name: Institute-wide daily dial cap
subFeatures.description: A hard ceiling on total AI dials in any rolling 24 hours — across every lead, campaign and manual click — as the ultimate runaway-spend guardrail.

subFeatures.name: Outcome-to-action rules
subFeatures.description: Map each call outcome to what happens next — assign a counsellor, stop retrying, or a custom outcome you define (e.g. 'Wrong Number'). Choose which dispositions are terminal and whether leads that exhaust all retries still reach a human.

subFeatures.name: Counsellor assignment modes
subFeatures.description: After an AI call, assign the lead to a counsellor manually, round-robin, or only to counsellors currently on shift.

subFeatures.name: AI calls inside automation workflows
subFeatures.description: Drop a 'Call with AI' step into any automation — for example, dial every new enquiry within about 60 seconds of it arriving — picking the agent by name.

subFeatures.name: Lead-list button toggle
subFeatures.description: Independently show or hide the manual 'AI call' button in lead lists without turning off workflow-driven AI calling.

features.name: One-Click & Bulk AI Calling
features.tagline: AI-call one lead or a whole list, with a safe dry run
features.description: Trigger an AI call on any single lead with one click, choosing which agent speaks and which number it calls from. For whole audiences, a 'Call all with AI' action first runs a dry run that counts eligible leads without dialing, then paces the calls in the background while outcomes and counsellor assignments land automatically.

subFeatures.name: Per-lead AI call button
subFeatures.description: One click on any lead row places an immediate AI call, with the acting counsellor recorded as the call's owner.

subFeatures.name: Agent and caller-ID chooser
subFeatures.description: When the institute has multiple agents or numbers, a chooser lets the caller pick which persona speaks and which caller-ID is used — otherwise sensible defaults apply.

subFeatures.name: Bulk campaign with dry run
subFeatures.description: 'Call all with AI' on an audience list first reports total vs eligible leads without dialing, then on confirmation dispatches paced background calls to every eligible lead.

subFeatures.name: Automatic outcome processing
subFeatures.description: Each call's end-of-call report drives the next step automatically — retry later, stop, or assign a counsellor — so no one has to babysit the campaign.

subFeatures.name: Attempt tracking
subFeatures.description: Each lead's AI calls display the true attempt number (Attempt 1, 2, 3...) so the retry sequence reads correctly in the call history.

features.name: Inbound AI Receptionist & Auto Lead Capture
features.tagline: Your AI answers the phone and turns callers into leads
features.description: The AI agent can answer your inbound line — as a menu option or the whole line — and hold a real qualification conversation. When an unknown number calls in, the system can automatically create a lead for the caller, de-duplicated by phone number, so every inbound enquiry becomes followable in the CRM.

subFeatures.name: AI-answered inbound line
subFeatures.description: Route inbound calls — directly or via an IVR menu choice — to an AI agent that greets, answers questions and qualifies the caller.

subFeatures.name: Opt-in auto lead creation
subFeatures.description: An explicit per-institute toggle: when on, unknown inbound callers are created (or matched) as leads by phone number, so no inbound interest is ever lost.

subFeatures.name: Known-caller matching
subFeatures.description: Inbound calls from existing leads are matched by phone number and attached to the right lead record automatically.

subFeatures.name: Inbound/outbound classification
subFeatures.description: AI-call reports are labelled inbound vs outbound, so dashboards cleanly separate 'they called us' from 'we called them'.

features.name: Call Intelligence (AI Transcripts & Scoring)
features.tagline: Every call transcribed, scored and summarized by AI
features.description: Recordings of human and AI calls are automatically transcribed — Hindi, English and mixed speech — and analyzed by AI into a structured report: summary, outcome, ratings, objections, action items and coaching tips. You define the scoring rubric and the conversion goal, and the analysis attaches to the call and the lead, giving managers x-ray vision into thousands of conversations without listening to them.

subFeatures.name: Automatic transcription with translation
subFeatures.description: Calls are transcribed in the spoken language (Hindi/English/Hinglish, auto-detected) plus an English translation pass, both stored against the call.

subFeatures.name: AI summary and call type
subFeatures.description: Each call gets a plain-language summary, an inferred call objective, and a type classification such as sales outreach, follow-up, demo booking, objection handling, payment or support.

subFeatures.name: Dual scoring with conversion likelihood
subFeatures.description: Two 0–10 scores per call — how effectively the counsellor advanced their objective and how strong the outcome was from the lead's perspective — plus a high/medium/low conversion-likelihood estimate.

subFeatures.name: Custom scoring rubric and goal
subFeatures.description: Define your own weighted quality metrics (defaults: rapport, needs discovery, objection handling, next step secured) and state the conversion goal — e.g. 'book a campus demo' — so every call is measured against what you actually want.

subFeatures.name: Objection and sentiment analysis
subFeatures.description: The AI lists each objection raised, whether and how it was handled, and reads the lead's overall sentiment.

subFeatures.name: Action items, coaching tips and highlights
subFeatures.description: Concrete follow-up action items, personalized coaching tips for the caller, a talk-time ratio, and verbatim highlight quotes from the conversation.

subFeatures.name: Normalized outcome status
subFeatures.description: Every call gets a normalized status — connected positive/neutral/negative, callback requested and more — that powers dashboards and filters.

subFeatures.name: Choose which calls get analysed
subFeatures.description: Select the sources — telephony calls, AI-agent calls and/or manual uploads — that flow through analysis.

subFeatures.name: Analyze or re-analyze on demand
subFeatures.description: Any call — old, skipped or failed — can be queued for analysis from its call-log entry with one click.

subFeatures.name: Per-lead intelligence history
subFeatures.description: All analyzed calls for a lead in one view, across counsellors and attempts, so anyone picking up the lead has full context.

subFeatures.name: On/off switch with cost control
subFeatures.description: Call Intelligence is a per-institute setting, metered against credits, with minimum-duration gates and clear skip reasons so money isn't spent analysing empty calls.

features.name: Counsellor Coaching & Team Call Analytics
features.tagline: Know exactly what each counsellor should improve
features.description: Roll-ups over the AI call analysis turn thousands of conversations into coaching: each counsellor's weakest skills, recurring improvement tips and the objections they face most, with the calls behind them one click away. A comparison-first team view shows KPIs with deltas against the previous period, and every view is automatically scoped to the manager's own reporting line.

subFeatures.name: Team insights with trend deltas
subFeatures.description: Whole-team KPIs — analyzed calls, average quality ratings, positive-sentiment share — each shown with its change versus the immediately preceding equal-length window.

subFeatures.name: Per-counsellor breakdown
subFeatures.description: One row per rep with analyzed calls, both quality ratings, call-status and sentiment distributions, leads dispositioned and calling reach — each with its own vs-previous delta.

subFeatures.name: Personal coaching insights
subFeatures.description: For each counsellor: their weakest rubric qualities, recurring coaching tips and the most common objections in their calls, with drill-down into the calls behind them.

subFeatures.name: Team coaching insights
subFeatures.description: The same coaching view aggregated across a manager's entire reporting line, highlighting top objections, top coaching tips and which counsellors need help on which skill.

subFeatures.name: Counsellor profile tabs
subFeatures.description: Each counsellor's profile includes Calls and Insights tabs showing their call history and intelligence-driven performance view.

subFeatures.name: Manager-scoped visibility
subFeatures.description: Every view is automatically scoped by the reporting hierarchy — managers see only their own reps.

subFeatures.name: Flexible date windows
subFeatures.description: 7/30/90-day presets or custom ranges, with the comparison window computed automatically.

features.name: Click-to-Call from the CRM
features.tagline: Dial any lead in one click, straight from their record
features.description: Counsellors call leads directly from lead lists, the enquiry side view and the counsellor workbench — no separate dialer app. The system bridges the counsellor and the lead through the institute's telephony provider, picks the right caller-ID automatically, and logs everything against the lead. A one-click confirmation step prevents accidental dials from burning calling credit.

subFeatures.name: One-click bridged calling
subFeatures.description: Click the phone icon on a lead and the system rings the counsellor first, then connects the lead — no numbers to type or copy.

subFeatures.name: Caller-ID picker with smart recommendation
subFeatures.description: Before dialing, a popover shows every available outbound number with the recommended one pre-selected — doubling as a confirm step so a stray click never places a paid call.

subFeatures.name: Automatic number-selection strategies
subFeatures.description: Choose how the outbound caller-ID is picked per institute: Sticky-per-Lead (the lead always sees the same number), Round Robin, or Region Match.

subFeatures.name: Live call status
subFeatures.description: Real-time call progress streams onto the screen — Queued, Counsellor Ringing, In Progress, Completed, No Answer, Busy and more — so the counsellor always knows where the call is.

subFeatures.name: Calls panel on the lead record
subFeatures.description: Every call — human and AI, inbound and outbound — appears in the lead's side-view call history with status, duration, attempt number and outcome.

subFeatures.name: Call from the counsellor workbench
subFeatures.description: Team leads reviewing a counsellor can open that counsellor's full call history in a coaching drawer.

features.name: Unified Call Log & Calling Dashboard
features.tagline: Every call across the team, filterable and exportable
features.description: One central Call Log shows every call the organisation makes or receives — human and AI, inbound and outbound, across all connected providers — with headline KPIs and deep filters. Managers see their whole team's calls while each counsellor sees their own, based on the reporting hierarchy, and the filtered list exports to CSV or Excel in one click.

subFeatures.name: KPI strip
subFeatures.description: Headline numbers for the selected period: total calls, connected calls with connect rate, total talk time, and unique leads reached.

subFeatures.name: Worklist chips
subFeatures.description: One-tap chips surface actionable calls — Missed Inbound (call these back) and Callbacks Due (promised follow-ups whose time has come) — each with a live count badge.

subFeatures.name: Deep filtering
subFeatures.description: Filter by lead name, phone number, direction, call type (human/AI), provider, call status, disposition, counsellor and date range, with quick 7/30/90-day presets.

subFeatures.name: CSV / Excel export
subFeatures.description: Export the filtered call list (up to 25,000 rows) as CSV or XLSX for offline analysis or audits.

subFeatures.name: Hierarchy-scoped visibility
subFeatures.description: Access is automatically scoped by the reporting line: a counsellor sees their own calls, a team head their team's, leadership everything.

subFeatures.name: Phone-number privacy control
subFeatures.description: Lead phone numbers are masked by default; only staff granted a specific 'view call numbers' permission see unmasked numbers, on screen and in exports.

subFeatures.name: AI outcome enrichment
subFeatures.description: AI calls in the log show their AI-determined disposition and the true attempt number, so retry sequences read correctly.

features.name: Call Recordings & Playback
features.tagline: Every conversation recorded, stored and replayable
features.description: Calls are automatically recorded and attached to the lead they belong to, so anyone with access can replay the exact conversation to audit quality or settle a dispute. Recording can be switched off per institute for organisations that prefer not to record.

subFeatures.name: Automatic recording
subFeatures.description: Outbound and inbound calls are recorded automatically across providers — recordings are fetched and stored even when the provider only makes them available after the call ends.

subFeatures.name: In-app playback
subFeatures.description: Play any recording directly inside the admin dashboard from the call log or the lead's call history — no downloads needed.

subFeatures.name: Recording stored per lead
subFeatures.description: Each recording lives against the specific lead and call attempt, so the full audio trail of a lead's journey is browsable in one place.

subFeatures.name: Recording on/off switch
subFeatures.description: A per-institute setting disables recording entirely for organisations that opt out.

features.name: Call Dispositions & Callback Scheduling
features.tagline: Log every outcome and never miss a promised callback
features.description: After each call, counsellors pick an outcome from the institute's disposition catalog, add notes, and optionally schedule a callback. Outcomes can automatically move the lead to the matching pipeline stage, keeping the CRM in sync without extra data entry.

subFeatures.name: Disposition catalog
