subFeatures.description: A per-institute catalog of call outcomes — each with a label, colour and category — powers both the after-call picker and the dashboard's disposition filter.

subFeatures.name: Post-call disposition sheet
subFeatures.description: A quick after-call panel lets the counsellor set the outcome, add free-text notes and schedule a callback date/time in seconds.

subFeatures.name: Automatic lead-stage sync
subFeatures.description: When a disposition maps to a pipeline status (e.g. 'Interested'), saving it automatically updates the lead's status in the CRM.

subFeatures.name: Callbacks worklist
subFeatures.description: Scheduled callbacks surface in the Call Log's 'Callbacks Due' chip so promised follow-ups actually happen.

subFeatures.name: Edit dispositions later
subFeatures.description: Outcomes can be set or corrected from the call log after the fact, not just immediately post-call.

features.name: Smart Inbound Call Routing
features.tagline: Callers reach the right counsellor automatically
features.description: When a lead calls back, the system answers instantly and routes them intelligently — by default to the counsellor who last spoke to them, falling back to a voicemail number if nobody is available. Every inbound call, answered or missed, is logged against the lead so no callback opportunity is lost.

subFeatures.name: Last-counsellor routing
subFeatures.description: An inbound caller is automatically connected to the counsellor who most recently spoke with them, preserving relationship continuity.

subFeatures.name: Voicemail fallback
subFeatures.description: If no matching counsellor is reachable, the call diverts to the institute's configured voicemail number instead of ringing out.

subFeatures.name: Missed-call capture
subFeatures.description: Missed and unanswered inbound calls are logged with the caller identified by phone number, and surface in the Call Log's 'Missed Inbound' worklist for callback.

subFeatures.name: Instant answer decisions
subFeatures.description: Routing decisions happen in a fraction of a second while the provider holds the caller, so callers hear ringing rather than dead air.

features.name: IVR Builder (Multi-Level Phone Menus)
features.tagline: Build 'Press 1 for admissions' menus visually
features.description: Design the phone menus callers hear when they dial your numbers, in a visual tree editor — no telecom vendor required. Combine spoken prompts, key-press menus of any depth, call forwarding, voicemail and even an AI agent that talks to the caller, then attach a menu to each phone number and it goes live immediately.

subFeatures.name: Visual menu tree editor
subFeatures.description: Create, edit and delete complete multi-level IVR menus in a tree editor inside Calling settings, with whole menus saved in one action and labels for easy management.

subFeatures.name: Play prompt steps
subFeatures.description: Speak a recorded or text-to-speech prompt to the caller, then continue to the next step; prompts are pre-generated so callers never wait for audio.

subFeatures.name: Keypad menus of any depth
subFeatures.description: Ask the caller to press a digit and branch to a different sub-tree per key — nested 'Press 1 / Press 2' menus to any level.

subFeatures.name: Forward-to-team steps
subFeatures.description: Ring one or more staff numbers (with the conversation recorded) so a menu choice connects the caller to the right counsellor or team.

subFeatures.name: Voicemail steps
subFeatures.description: Play a prompt and record the caller's message when no one can pick up.

subFeatures.name: AI-agent steps
subFeatures.description: Hand the call to a chosen AI voice agent mid-menu — e.g. 'Press 3 to talk to our admissions assistant'.

subFeatures.name: Graceful hangup steps
subFeatures.description: End the call with an optional closing message.

subFeatures.name: Per-number menus
subFeatures.description: Assign a default menu to each inbound number, choose where each call starts, and enable or disable menus independently.

features.name: Multi-Provider Telephony Integrations
features.tagline: Bring your own telephony — Exotel, Plivo, Airtel IQ and more
features.description: Institutes that already have a cloud-telephony account plug it into Vacademy and get click-to-call, recordings and the unified call log on top of it. Connect Exotel, Plivo, Airtel IQ (Vonage), Aavtaar or Vacademy's own voice service — each provider's quirks are absorbed behind one consistent experience, with encrypted credentials and an in-app setup guide showing the exact settings to paste into the provider's console.

subFeatures.name: Five providers, one experience
subFeatures.description: Connect Exotel, Plivo, Airtel IQ/Vonage, Aavtaar or the first-party Vacademy voice service; the settings screen adapts to each provider's capabilities.

subFeatures.name: Exotel integration
subFeatures.description: Bridged outbound calls, a shared pool of ExoPhone caller-IDs, real-time call events, recordings, inbound routing and one-click number sync from the provider.

subFeatures.name: Airtel IQ / Vonage integration
subFeatures.description: Click-to-dial through Airtel IQ Business Connect with per-counsellor extensions and direct numbers, plus automatic import of the provider's call records so off-platform calls still appear in the log.

subFeatures.name: Aavtaar.ai integration
subFeatures.description: Connect an Aavtaar autonomous AI voice-agent account so its AI calls and end-of-call reports flow into the same lead records and call log.

subFeatures.name: Calling on/off and service choice
subFeatures.description: Turn calling on or off for the institute and choose which connected service counsellors dial through.

subFeatures.name: Encrypted credential vault
subFeatures.description: Provider API keys and secrets are stored encrypted; re-saving settings never wipes stored secrets, and each provider declares exactly the credential fields it needs.

subFeatures.name: Number pool management
subFeatures.description: Add phone numbers with nicknames, regions and preference order; enable or disable numbers, set a recommended number, and attach a default IVR menu per number — numbers auto-attach to the inbound call flow.

subFeatures.name: Counsellor extension mapping
subFeatures.description: Map each counsellor to their extension, optional dedicated caller-ID/DID and provider user ID so inbound calls reach the right person.

subFeatures.name: Caller-ID and voicemail configuration
subFeatures.description: Decide which number leads see when your team calls, plus a voicemail fallback number for unreachable moments.

subFeatures.name: Balance visibility
subFeatures.description: The provider wallet balance (e.g. Exotel) and Vacademy calling credits show at the top of Calling settings, so admins spot low credit before it interrupts a live call.

subFeatures.name: Inbound setup guide
subFeatures.description: A step-by-step in-app guide renders the exact copy-paste URLs and settings to configure in the provider's console.

features.name: Calling Reports & Heatmaps
features.tagline: See when your team dials, connects and follows up
features.description: The Reports Center includes dedicated calling analytics: daily dial, connect and talk-time trends, a per-counsellor breakdown with outcome counts, a day-of-week by hour heatmap showing when calls actually connect, and a follow-up aging view. Every report respects each viewer's team scope.

subFeatures.name: Daily calling series
subFeatures.description: Day-by-day dials, connects and talk time over any date range, with a per-counsellor breakdown including outcome counts.

subFeatures.name: Connect-time heatmap
subFeatures.description: A day-of-week × hour-of-day grid of dials and connects (in the institute's timezone), revealing the golden hours to call.

subFeatures.name: Follow-up aging report
subFeatures.description: See how long overdue follow-ups have been waiting, so managers clear the backlog before leads go cold.

subFeatures.name: Calls-per-day sales widget
subFeatures.description: A calls-per-day widget on the sales dashboard keeps daily calling activity in front of the team.

subFeatures.name: Role-scoped reporting
subFeatures.description: Every report is automatically scoped: a counsellor sees their own numbers, a team head their team's, leadership the whole institute.

features.name: Off-Platform Call Upload
features.tagline: Made the call on your own phone? Upload it
features.description: Counsellors who call a lead from a personal phone or another system can upload the recording afterwards. The call joins the universal call record against the right lead — with direction, duration and time — and, if Call Intelligence is on, gets transcribed and analyzed exactly like a platform call.

subFeatures.name: Recording upload dialog
subFeatures.description: Upload an audio file against a lead with optional direction, duration, counterparty number and call time; the uploader becomes the call's counsellor unless another is chosen.

subFeatures.name: Joins the universal call log
subFeatures.description: Uploaded calls appear in the same call log, lead history and reports as provider calls — nothing lives in a side spreadsheet.

subFeatures.name: Same AI analysis pipeline
subFeatures.description: Uploaded recordings flow through the identical transcription, scoring and coaching analysis as live calls.

features.name: Per-Minute Call Billing & Credit Metering
features.tagline: Transparent pay-per-minute billing from your credit wallet
features.description: Calls carried on Vacademy's telephony bill by the minute against the institute's credit wallet, with separate meters for human voice minutes and AI conversation minutes, inbound and outbound. Rates can be tailored per institute, every charge is applied exactly once, and an automatic reconciliation sweep guarantees no call is missed or double-billed.

subFeatures.name: Four independent meters
subFeatures.description: Outbound voice, inbound voice, outbound AI-conversation and inbound AI-conversation minutes are metered separately — an outbound AI call pays voice + AI, while an inbound call answered by a human pays voice only.

subFeatures.name: Only Vacademy-carried calls billed
subFeatures.description: Calls on the institute's own provider account (Exotel, Airtel) and uploaded recordings are never metered — only minutes on Vacademy-provided lines.

subFeatures.name: Per-institute rate flexibility
subFeatures.description: Standard per-minute credit rates with per-institute overrides per meter and a per-call minimum charge; minutes round up.

subFeatures.name: Guaranteed exactly-once charging
subFeatures.description: Every charge is applied exactly once, completed calls are stamped when billed, and a reconciliation job retries any charge lost to a transient failure.

subFeatures.name: Channel-day rental support
subFeatures.description: The billing model also supports per-channel per-day rental pricing for reserved concurrent-call capacity.

demo.intro: Watch an admissions phone line run itself — from the team call log to a live AI agent call, the IVR menu behind it, and the coaching insights AI extracts from every conversation.

lines.text: Namaste! Main Diya bol rahi hoon, Aakash Career Institute se. Aapne NEET 2027 Batch A ke liye enquiry ki thi?
Haan, actually I wanted to know the fees and batch timing.
Sure! Weekend batch Sat–Sun 9 AM, fee ₹85,000 per year with scholarship test option. Aap Class 11 mein hain?
Yes, Class 11. Can I talk to a counsellor about the scholarship?
Bilkul — main aapko Priya ma'am se connect kar rahi hoon, ek second...

children.label: Press 2 — Fees & payments → ring Accounts desk
Press 3 — Talk to Diya (AI admissions assistant)

items.title: Priya Nair
items.sub: 84 calls analyzed · Coach on: next step secured

items.title: Kabir Singh
items.sub: 71 calls analyzed · Coach on: objection handling

items.title: Sneha Kulkarni
items.sub: 63 calls analyzed · Coach on: needs discovery

steps.title: Every call, one log
steps.text: Human and AI, inbound and outbound, across Exotel, Plivo, Airtel IQ or Vacademy's own telephony — the whole team's calling lands in one log, scoped by reporting line so managers see their team and counsellors see their own.

steps.title: Know the line's pulse instantly
steps.text: Headline KPIs for any period — total calls, connect rate, talk time — plus worklist chips like Missed Inbound and Callbacks Due, so promised follow-ups actually happen.

steps.title: Filter, replay, export
steps.text: Filter by counsellor, disposition, provider or call type, play any recording in-app, and export up to 25,000 rows to CSV or Excel. Phone numbers stay masked unless a staff member holds the view-numbers permission.

steps.title: An AI that phones leads in Hinglish
steps.text: New enquiries are dialled within about 60 seconds by Vacademy's AI voice agent, which converses naturally in Hindi, English or mixed Hinglish — and hands the live call to a human counsellor the moment the caller asks.

steps.title: Author your own agent personas
steps.text: Each named agent gets its own script, one of 37 Indian voices with pace control, the questions to extract (class, budget, timeline) and a call-length cap. Answers, outcome and a lead rating are written onto the lead record after every call.

steps.title: Build phone menus visually
steps.text: Design 'Press 1 for admissions' trees to any depth — spoken prompts, forward-to-team, voicemail, even a menu key that hands the caller to your AI agent — with no telecom vendor involved. Attach a menu to a number and it's live.

steps.title: No inbound enquiry ever lost
steps.text: Unknown callers can auto-create a de-duplicated lead by phone number, known callers route back to the counsellor who last spoke to them, and recording plus India-compliance guardrails (DND scrubbing, 9 AM–9 PM window) are enforced per institute.

steps.title: Coach from evidence, not hunches
steps.text: Every recording is transcribed (Hindi, English, Hinglish) and AI-scored against your own rubric. Roll-ups show each counsellor's weakest skill and recurring coaching tips, with the actual calls one click away.

steps.title: See what your market objects to
steps.text: Objections, sentiment and conversion likelihood are extracted from thousands of calls, with deltas against the previous period — so managers fix the script, not just the rep. Analysis is credit-metered with an on/off switch.

pillars.name: Vacademy AI
pillars.tagline: AI that builds courses, coaches teachers and tutors learners
pillars.description: Vacademy AI puts a full team of AI assistants inside your institute: course builders that turn a single prompt into publish-ready courses, copilots that convert every lecture into notes, quizzes and exam papers, and a branded 24/7 tutor for learners. Everything is governed from one place — choose the AI models that power each job, control exactly where AI appears, and see every credit spent down to the individual conversation.

features.name: AI Course Builder
features.tagline: From one prompt to a publish-ready course
features.description: Describe the course you want and the AI drafts the whole thing — structure, lesson pages, diagrams, videos, quizzes and homework — ready to review and publish into your study library. Ground the entire course in your own reference PDFs and web pages so content reflects your actual syllabus, and fine-tune everything from chapter count to video voice before generating. What used to take a semester of production ships in an afternoon.

subFeatures.name: Prompt-based course creation
subFeatures.description: Type what you want to teach (with clickable example prompts) and get a full course outline plus content. Optional course-goal and learning-outcome fields sharpen the result.

subFeatures.name: Audience targeting
subFeatures.description: Set learner age range, skill level and course language so difficulty and tone match your students.

subFeatures.name: Reference material grounding
subFeatures.description: Attach reference PDFs and website URLs (with built-in page scraping) so the AI writes from your actual material — including real figures pulled from your PDFs — instead of generic knowledge.

subFeatures.name: Prerequisite files and links
subFeatures.description: Add documents and URLs describing what learners should already know, so the course starts at the right level.

subFeatures.name: Structure controls
subFeatures.description: Choose the number of subjects, modules and chapters, slides per chapter, chapter length in minutes, and overall course depth on a slider.

subFeatures.name: Content-type toggles
subFeatures.description: Switch on diagrams, code snippets (with programming-language choice), practice problems, curated YouTube videos, AI-generated videos, AI slide decks, AI storybooks, quizzes, homework and worked solutions per course.

subFeatures.name: AI model choice and bring-your-own keys
subFeatures.description: Pick a specific AI model or leave it on Auto; optionally supply your own OpenAI or Gemini API keys so generation runs on your accounts.

subFeatures.name: Cost preview and confirmation
subFeatures.description: See the exact credit cost before you commit, with a confirmation dialog showing current usage.

subFeatures.name: Automatic draft resume
subFeatures.description: In-progress course drafts save automatically; resume or discard a saved draft next time you open the builder.

features.name: AI Outline Editor & Copilot
features.tagline: Review, rearrange and regenerate every AI page before publishing
features.description: Every AI-drafted course lands in a split-view workspace: the full course hierarchy on one side, a live content editor on the other. Rearrange chapters and pages by drag and drop, inspect and refine the AI prompt behind every planned page, rewrite or regenerate anything you're not happy with, and watch the rest of the course generate in the background — then create the real course in one click.

subFeatures.name: One-prompt course outlines
subFeatures.description: Generate a structured outline of sessions and pages — objectives, topic explanations, quizzes, homework and solutions — from a plain course description.

subFeatures.name: Interactive outline tree
subFeatures.description: Browse the generated course as chapters and pages; rename, delete or regenerate any chapter or individual page inline.

subFeatures.name: Drag-and-drop restructuring
subFeatures.description: Reorder chapters and pages by dragging; the final course is created in exactly the order you arrange.

subFeatures.name: Rich page-type palette
subFeatures.description: Generated pages span learning objectives, topic pages, documents, PDFs, images, quizzes, assessments, homework, solutions, assignments, videos, AI videos, AI slide decks, AI storybooks, code-explainer videos, live code editors, notebooks and visual coding blocks.

subFeatures.name: Per-page AI prompts
subFeatures.description: Every planned page carries an editable generation prompt you can inspect and refine before content is created.

subFeatures.name: In-place content editing
subFeatures.description: Edit any page in a rich editor with auto-rendered flowchart diagrams, embedded YouTube players, images and media replacement.

subFeatures.name: Per-page regeneration
subFeatures.description: Regenerate a single page — or just its video or code section — with a fresh AI pass.

subFeatures.name: Regenerate with feedback
subFeatures.description: Give the AI corrective instructions and regenerate the outline without starting over.

subFeatures.name: Background generation with progress
subFeatures.description: Page content generates in the background with per-page and per-chapter progress indicators, so you keep editing while the rest fills in.

subFeatures.name: Course metadata editing
subFeatures.description: Adjust course title, description and other details before the course is created.

subFeatures.name: One-click publish to study library
subFeatures.description: Turn the approved draft into a real course with subjects, modules, chapters and pages in your study library.

features.name: Learner AI Tutor
features.tagline: A 24/7 branded tutor that knows what each learner studies
features.description: A built-in AI tutor rides along on every learner screen, aware of the course and lesson currently open. It explains concepts, summarizes lessons, generates practice quizzes with instant feedback, and runs full voice conversations — including AI-led mock interviews and oral tests in the learner's language. Admins design the tutor completely: its name, personality, hard rules, chat modes, voices and exactly which pages it appears on.

subFeatures.name: Context-aware chat
subFeatures.description: The tutor knows the current lesson and offers one-tap quick actions like 'Explain this', 'Summarize', 'Quiz me', 'Hint' and 'Learning path'.

subFeatures.name: Practice quizzes in chat
subFeatures.description: Say 'I want to practice' and the tutor generates a timed quiz, grades the submission, and returns per-question feedback, explanations, a scorecard and study recommendations.

subFeatures.name: Voice conversations
subFeatures.description: Hands-free voice mode in three formats — voice doubt-solving, AI-led mock interviews and AI oral tests — with language selection and an animated voice avatar.

subFeatures.name: Attachments and math input
subFeatures.description: Learners attach images and files to questions and use a math toolbar for proper notation.

subFeatures.name: Offline message queue
subFeatures.description: Messages composed offline are queued and sent automatically when connectivity returns.

subFeatures.name: Tutor persona designer
subFeatures.description: Name the tutor, set its role (Tutor, Mentor, Guide), institute name, core instruction, hard-rules list, instruction-adherence level and creativity.

subFeatures.name: Six chat mode toggles
subFeatures.description: Enable or disable General Chat, Ask Doubt, Practice Quiz, Mock Interview, Voice Doubt and Oral Test modes for learners.

subFeatures.name: Voice selection
subFeatures.description: Choose the male and female voices the tutor speaks with in voice modes.

subFeatures.name: Page visibility control
subFeatures.description: Decide exactly where the tutor appears: Dashboard, All Courses, Course Details, Study Material — even logged-out catalogue pages.

features.name: Instructor Copilot
features.tagline: Record a class; get notes, quizzes and homework automatically
features.description: A before, during and after companion for every lecture. Record your class live in the browser (or upload the audio) and the copilot transcribes it and generates classroom-ready material: structured notes, a summary, flashcards, a quiz, slide and video ideas, plus the classwork and homework you assigned in class — all downloadable as polished PDFs within minutes of the session ending.

subFeatures.name: Lecture workflow dashboard
subFeatures.description: Guided Before-Lecture, In-Lecture and After-Lecture views organize preparation, capture and follow-up.

subFeatures.name: Live recording or upload
subFeatures.description: Record lecture audio directly in the browser or upload a pre-recorded file; automatic speech-to-text transcription follows.

subFeatures.name: Eight generated artifacts per lecture
subFeatures.description: Transcription, notes, summary, flashcards, quiz, slide ideas, video ideas, plus homework and classwork — each generated from what was actually taught.

subFeatures.name: Configurable quiz generation
subFeatures.description: Set grade level, question type and language before generating, then download a formatted quiz PDF ready to run as homework.

subFeatures.name: Classwork and homework capture
subFeatures.description: Tasks and assignments mentioned in class are extracted into numbered lists with completion checkboxes and a due-date field on the homework PDF.

subFeatures.name: Professional PDF downloads
subFeatures.description: Every artifact exports as a cleanly formatted, printable PDF — notes, summary, quiz, classwork and homework.

subFeatures.name: Lecture log history
subFeatures.description: Every processed lecture is saved as a log you can reopen, rename, regenerate content for, or delete; failed generations can be retried.

subFeatures.name: Built-in audio player
subFeatures.description: Replay the lecture recording alongside its generated content.

features.name: Live Class Lecture Intelligence
features.tagline: Every recorded class becomes notes, quizzes and exam papers
features.description: After a live class is recorded, AI converts it into study assets: a full transcript, polished lecture notes, and complete practice assessments generated from what was actually taught. Export professional printable exam papers with answer keys, or publish everything straight into courses and the assessment center — with your own name, schedule and marking overrides.

subFeatures.name: Automatic recording transcription
subFeatures.description: Kick off transcription for any live-session recording and track its status; stuck jobs are caught and recovered automatically.

subFeatures.name: AI lecture notes
subFeatures.description: One click turns the transcript into well-structured study notes with headings and images, with copy, download and regenerate options; the latest version is saved with the recording.

subFeatures.name: Assessment generation with question-type control
subFeatures.description: Generate assessments from the lecture with control over question types: MCQ single-correct, MCQ multiple-correct, true/false, one-word and long-answer.

subFeatures.name: Question-type presets
subFeatures.description: Ready-made bundles — Only MCQs, MCQs + True/False, MCQs + One Word, Mixed Assessment, Subjective + Objective Mix — for one-click paper composition.

subFeatures.name: Printable exam paper export
subFeatures.description: Export generated assessments as professional PDF question papers — student copy and answer-key copy — with optional institute letterhead, title, marks and dated footer.

subFeatures.name: Past papers and notes history
subFeatures.description: Every assessment and notes version generated from a recording is kept in a per-class history for reuse.

subFeatures.name: One-click publish with overrides
subFeatures.description: Push notes into courses as lesson pages, or publish quizzes to courses or directly to the Assessment Center — as draft or published, with details overridable before going live.

subFeatures.name: Link class materials to chapters
subFeatures.description: Attach the recording and materials to one or more course chapters so they appear in the learning library, with duplicate protection and a materials history.

features.name: AI Lesson Planner & Lecture Coach
features.tagline: Plan lectures with AI, then get coached on delivery
features.description: Tell the planner your lecture title, topics, class level, teaching style, language and time available, and it drafts a structured, minute-by-minute lesson plan you can edit and export. After class, upload a recording of your delivery and receive a scored evaluation report across eight teaching criteria with concrete, constructive suggestions — ideal for teacher training and self-development.

subFeatures.name: Minute-by-minute lesson plans
subFeatures.description: Generate a time-boxed, topic-wise lecture timeline that fits your stated duration, class level and language (English or Hindi).

subFeatures.name: Teaching-style aware content
subFeatures.description: State your preferred method — storytelling, more examples, and so on — and the plan matches that style.

subFeatures.name: Engagement and homework options
subFeatures.description: Toggle in mid-lecture questions for engagement and an assignment or homework section at the end.

subFeatures.name: Edit and export
subFeatures.description: Refine the draft plan in place and export the finished version.

subFeatures.name: Scored delivery feedback
subFeatures.description: Recorded lectures are evaluated across eight criteria — delivery, content quality, student engagement, assessment, inclusivity, classroom management, teaching aids and professionalism — with a total score.

subFeatures.name: Constructive commentary
subFeatures.description: Each section carries specific comments and actionable suggestions, plus recognition of strong moments in the lecture.

subFeatures.name: Broad audio support with background processing
subFeatures.description: Accepts WAV, FLAC, MP3, AAC and M4A recordings; long files and long generations process in the background with automatic retries.

subFeatures.name: PDF report export
subFeatures.description: Download the full evaluation report as a PDF for peer review or records.

subFeatures.name: Model choice
subFeatures.description: Pick a preferred AI model or use the institute default, with automatic fallbacks.

features.name: Interactive Content Generator
features.tagline: One prompt, thirteen kinds of interactive learning content
features.description: One prompt-driven engine produces thirteen kinds of learning content that run right inside the course player — from quizzes and illustrated storybooks to playable games, simulations and code playgrounds. Every format is age-tuned, multilingual, and delivered as ready-to-use interactive material.

subFeatures.name: Quiz
subFeatures.description: Auto-generated question sets with options, correct answers, explanations, difficulty rating and passing score.

subFeatures.name: Storybook
subFeatures.description: Page-by-page illustrated stories with per-page illustrations, narration text, age range, themes, learning objectives, interactive touch hotspots, and discussion questions and activities at the back.

subFeatures.name: Interactive game
subFeatures.description: Self-contained playable games built around the topic, complete with scoring.

subFeatures.name: Puzzle book
subFeatures.description: A collection of themed puzzles for practice and engagement.

subFeatures.name: Simulation
subFeatures.description: Physics or economics-style interactive sandboxes learners can manipulate.

subFeatures.name: Flashcards
subFeatures.description: Spaced-repetition style card decks generated from the topic.

subFeatures.name: Map exploration
subFeatures.description: Interactive clickable maps for geography and location-based lessons.

subFeatures.name: Worksheet
subFeatures.description: Printable or interactive homework sheets.

subFeatures.name: Code playground
subFeatures.description: Interactive coding exercises learners can edit and run.

subFeatures.name: Timeline
subFeatures.description: Chronological event visualizations for history and process topics.

subFeatures.name: Conversation
subFeatures.description: Language-learning dialogue content with role-play exchanges.

subFeatures.name: Slides
subFeatures.description: Presentation decks in classic slide style, generated from a plain prompt.

subFeatures.name: Practice quiz inside chat
subFeatures.description: The learner tutor detects practice intent, generates a timed quiz on the topic, grades the submission, and returns per-question feedback, score and study recommendations.

features.name: AI Question Paper Generator (Vsmart)
features.tagline: Question papers from PDFs, photos, audio or a plain prompt
features.description: A family of AI tools that produce editable question papers from whatever you have: a PDF or slide deck, a scanned or photographed printed paper, an audio lecture, or just a topic prompt. Every job runs in the background with a task tracker, results land in your question bank, and finished papers export as PDF or DOC or publish straight into an assessment.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Upload — paper from documents
subFeatures.description: Upload PDF, DOC/DOCX or PPT/PPTX and generate a question paper from the whole file or just a pasted section, guided by topics you add.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Extract — digitize printed papers
subFeatures.description: Upload a photo, scan or PDF of an existing printed paper; OCR turns it into a digital, editable question set you can save to the question bank.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Image — questions from pictures
subFeatures.description: Upload JPG/PNG images of handwritten notes, textbook pages or board work and get questions generated from the extracted text.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Audio — questions from recordings
subFeatures.description: Upload WAV, FLAC, MP3, AAC or M4A audio and set number of questions, level, focus topic, question type (MCQ, short answer, descriptive, mixed) and language.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Topics — questions from a prompt
subFeatures.description: Describe the coverage you want in plain language and set count, difficulty, chapter and language preferences.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Chat — refine by chatting
subFeatures.description: After generation, chat with the AI to modify the paper: add more MCQs, add higher-order questions, simplify a question, or focus on part of the document.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Organizer — auto-group by topic
subFeatures.description: Generate questions from a file and have them automatically arranged under topic headings for chapter-wise tests, with drag-to-refine.

subFeatures.name: Vsmart Sorter — prompt-controlled ordering
subFeatures.description: Sort and reorder generated questions with plain-language instructions like 'put questions 5 and 6 from Plant Nutrition first'.

subFeatures.name: Question configuration
subFeatures.description: Control how many questions, difficulty, question type (single-choice, multiple-choice and comprehension variants and more) and output language for each generation.

subFeatures.name: Background AI task tracker
subFeatures.description: All generations run in the background; a My AI Tasks list shows status per job with retry for failures — you can navigate away and come back.

subFeatures.name: Export and reuse
subFeatures.description: Export finished papers as PDF or DOC question papers (with paper-set formatting), regenerate with a custom prompt, and push questions into assessments.

subFeatures.name: My Resources file library
subFeatures.description: A personal library of uploaded source files you can re-run tools against without re-uploading.

subFeatures.name: Complete assessment generation
subFeatures.description: Generate a full, structured assessment (sections, questions, answers) ready to publish into the assessment system.

subFeatures.name: AI model picker
subFeatures.description: Choose which AI model runs each tool via a model selector backed by the institute's model registry.

features.name: AI Presentation Generator
features.tagline: Complete slide decks written and designed by AI
features.description: Generate a full presentation from raw text or data in the language of your choice, then regenerate any individual slide you're not happy with. Output is clean, structured slide content ready to present with the platform's live presentation tools.

subFeatures.name: Deck from text or data
subFeatures.description: Paste source text or data and get a fully structured slide deck, with language selection and AI model choice.

subFeatures.name: Single-slide regeneration
subFeatures.description: Regenerate one slide in place without touching the rest of the deck.

subFeatures.name: Prompt-driven decks
subFeatures.description: Generate a presentation-style deck straight from a plain prompt — no source document required.

features.name: Admin AI Agent
features.tagline: An AI assistant that actually does things in your portal
features.description: Chat with an AI agent that understands your institute's data and performs real platform actions on your behalf — looking things up and executing the right operation instead of just answering. It streams replies live, asks clarifying questions when it needs more detail, and always operates within the signed-in user's role and permissions. Admins decide exactly which capabilities each role's assistant gets.

subFeatures.name: Action-taking chat
subFeatures.description: The agent maps your request to real platform operations and executes them within your institute context and permissions, returning results in the conversation.

subFeatures.name: Live streaming replies
subFeatures.description: Responses stream in real time, with progress visible while longer actions run.

subFeatures.name: Clarifying-question loop
subFeatures.description: When the agent needs more information it pauses and asks; you reply in the same thread and it continues.

subFeatures.name: Smart capability matching
subFeatures.description: The agent understands the platform's full capability set, so a plain-language request finds the right action every time.

subFeatures.name: Secure institute context
subFeatures.description: The agent operates with the signed-in user's own credentials, so answers and actions respect their role and institute.

subFeatures.name: Conversation history
subFeatures.description: Agent sessions and messages are stored and reviewable in the AI usage console.

subFeatures.name: Role-based access controls
subFeatures.description: Grant a baseline toolset to all staff and fine-tune per-role access for advanced tools, so counsellors, teachers and admins each get an assistant matched to their job.

features.name: AI Website Builder & Page Copilot
features.tagline: Describe your institute; AI builds and edits your website
features.description: Type a short brief and the AI composes a complete, on-brand web page — or an entire multi-page site — using your real course catalogue, your images and your chosen page type. Compare multiple design directions side by side, accept the one you like as an editable draft, then keep refining by chat: tell the copilot 'make the hero darker' or 'add a testimonials section' and review each proposed edit before applying. Nothing goes live until you publish.

subFeatures.name: Brief-to-page generation
subFeatures.description: Write a plain-language brief, pick a page type — Homepage, Course landing, About us, Admissions, Contact — and receive a fully composed page of real builder sections you can edit normally.

subFeatures.name: Whole-site generation
subFeatures.description: Toggle 'whole site' to have the AI generate a complete multi-page website in one run.

subFeatures.name: Grounded in your real courses
subFeatures.description: Optionally grounds the copy in your actual course and batch offerings so generated pages advertise what you really sell — in your institute's own terminology.

subFeatures.name: Your images plus AI images
subFeatures.description: Upload photos or paste image URLs for the AI to place; optionally let it auto-generate missing images, and generate logo options from a text prompt.

subFeatures.name: Inspiration references
subFeatures.description: Provide inspiration images or a source website URL to steer the visual direction.

subFeatures.name: Multiple design directions
subFeatures.description: 'Try another direction' regenerates with a distinct angle — editorial-premium, bold conversion-focused, minimal-calm — and every generation lands as a separate variant so drafts are never overwritten.

subFeatures.name: AI brand kit
subFeatures.description: Derive a brand kit — colors, fonts, theme — and apply it as the site's global theme in one click.

subFeatures.name: Credit estimate before generating
subFeatures.description: See the AI credit cost up front on the confirmation step.

subFeatures.name: Review before accepting
subFeatures.description: Inspect the generated section list and preview, then accept to add it as a local draft — nothing goes live until you save and publish.

subFeatures.name: Chat-based page editing
subFeatures.description: Instructions like 'rewrite the FAQ answers to be friendlier' are turned into a short list of concrete edits — add a section, restyle a block, rewrite copy — applied to the page you are editing.

subFeatures.name: Change preview before apply
subFeatures.description: Each proposed edit is summarized so you see exactly what will change before accepting.

subFeatures.name: Works with the normal editor
subFeatures.description: Copilot edits land as regular unsaved changes — undo, tweak manually, save as draft, and publish on your schedule.

features.name: Math & Document OCR
features.tagline: Equations and figures extracted perfectly from scans and PDFs
features.description: Specialized math-aware OCR converts scanned pages and PDFs into clean digital content: handwritten or printed equations become editable math notation, and textbook PDFs become structured pages with real figures and tables preserved. This is what grounds AI course and question generation in your institute's actual materials.

subFeatures.name: Equation image digitization
subFeatures.description: Extract editable math notation from an equation image — ideal for digitizing math question banks.

subFeatures.name: PDF to structured content
subFeatures.description: Full PDFs convert to clean digital pages with math preserved, tables kept as tables, and figures extracted as hosted images.

subFeatures.name: Course grounding from reference PDFs
subFeatures.description: Uploaded reference PDFs steer AI course outlines and content, and the document's real figures are embedded verbatim into lessons and videos instead of AI-invented ones.

subFeatures.name: Conversion caching
subFeatures.description: Converted documents are cached, so re-using the same PDF across passes never pays for a second conversion.

subFeatures.name: Layout-aware scanned-document OCR
subFeatures.description: A high-throughput OCR pipeline with region detection handles scanned documents and complex page layouts.

features.name: AI Model Registry & Model Choice
features.tagline: Choose which AI brain powers every job
features.description: A live catalog of AI models spans Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek and free community models, each tagged with quality and speed scores, pricing and recommended uses. Every AI tool offers a model picker fed from the registry — leave it on Auto or pin a specific model per feature, and even per stage of video production. Platform admins retune defaults and pricing live, with no downtime.

subFeatures.name: Browsable model catalog
subFeatures.description: Every model lists its provider, tier (free, standard, premium, ultra), context size, image support, pricing, quality score and speed score — filterable by tier, provider, use case or free-only.

subFeatures.name: Free-tier models
subFeatures.description: A rotating set of genuinely free models lets users generate at zero model cost.

subFeatures.name: Auto or explicit selection
subFeatures.description: Every model picker defaults to Auto (recommended) with the option to pin a specific model.

subFeatures.name: Per-use-case defaults with failover
subFeatures.description: Each use case — content, outlines, video, images, evaluation, copilot, agent, analytics, speech, presentations — has a default, a fallback and a free-tier model, resolved automatically with graceful failover.

subFeatures.name: Per-stage overrides in video production
subFeatures.description: Override the model for individual video-production stages — shot planning, narration writing, per-scene visuals, act planning and corrective regeneration — or mass-apply one model to all overridable stages; quality-critical review stages stay on vetted defaults.

subFeatures.name: Credit multipliers by tier
subFeatures.description: Free models charge nothing, standard 1x, premium 2x, ultra 4x — pricing users can see before choosing.

subFeatures.name: Live model management
subFeatures.description: Platform admins add models, update pricing and scores, swap the free-tier set, and change use-case defaults live — no deployment needed.

subFeatures.name: Provider and tier statistics
subFeatures.description: Provider counts and per-tier average pricing feed the model-picker interfaces.

features.name: AI Settings Hub
features.tagline: Govern every AI feature from one place
features.description: One place to govern all AI on the platform: bring your own provider keys, set default models per feature, white-label the AI course builder under your own name, feed the AI an institute knowledge base, and set the visual branding for every AI-generated video. The learner tutor's persona and visibility are shaped here too.

subFeatures.name: Bring-your-own AI keys
subFeatures.description: Add your own provider API keys (OpenAI-style and Google-style) and choose models per feature, or use system defaults.

subFeatures.name: Course AI configuration and white-labeling
subFeatures.description: Set your AI course builder's display name (e.g. 'CourseCrafter AI'), an institute-level default course prompt, and hard rules the AI must always follow.

subFeatures.name: AI video style and branding
subFeatures.description: Choose the visual style for AI-generated videos and apply your institute branding — intro/outro slides, watermark, background themes, templates and typography.

subFeatures.name: Institute knowledge base
subFeatures.description: Feed the AI typed knowledge entries — announcements, policies, processes, events, results and general info — so its answers reflect your institute.

subFeatures.name: Learner tutor controls
subFeatures.description: The Learner AI Tutor's persona, chat modes, voices and page visibility are all configured from this hub (see Learner AI Tutor).

subFeatures.name: Usage view
subFeatures.description: AI consumption is surfaced right inside settings, with drill-down into the full usage console.

features.name: AI Usage & Audit Console
features.tagline: Know exactly who used AI, for what, and at what cost
features.description: A transparent metering console for all AI activity in the institute: per-user usage, itemized logs, and full conversation transcripts. Every AI feature — course generation, video, evaluation, agents, call analysis and more — is tracked, and tools show their credit cost before you run them.

subFeatures.name: Usage by user
subFeatures.description: See which staff members and learners are using AI and how much, with per-user drill-down into their logs and conversations.

subFeatures.name: Usage summary and itemized logs
subFeatures.description: An institute-wide summary plus itemized logs across 16 tracked activity types — course outlines, content, images, video, text-to-speech, evaluation, presentations, conversations, lectures, PDF questions, agent actions, analytics, copilot, call intelligence and more.

subFeatures.name: Conversation transcripts
subFeatures.description: Browse all AI conversations and open the full message history of any session for audit or quality review.

subFeatures.name: Upfront cost preview
subFeatures.description: Cost badges and previews on AI tools show the credit price before generation starts, driven by live, adjustable rates.

features.name: AI Credits (Pay-As-You-Go)
features.tagline: Transparent prepaid credits for every AI action
features.description: All AI features run on a prepaid credit balance, so costs are always visible and controlled — you see the price of an action before you run it and every credit spent afterwards. Credit packs, in-app top-up, invoicing and payment handling are covered in full under Finance & Payments.

subFeatures.name: Prepaid credit balance
subFeatures.description: Every AI action draws from a single institute credit balance, keeping spend predictable and capped.

subFeatures.name: Cost preview before you spend
subFeatures.description: Expensive actions show a credit-cost badge and a confirmation dialog with the exact estimated cost before running.

subFeatures.name: Usage ledger and analytics
subFeatures.description: Overview, Usage, Analytics and History tabs show your balance, every transaction, and spend broken down by tool, model and learner activity.

subFeatures.name: Credit packs and top-up
subFeatures.description: Buy credit packs in your currency with secure in-app top-up; billing details, invoices and payment handling live under Finance & Payments.

features.name: Explore AI Hub
features.tagline: One front door to every AI capability
features.description: A single launchpad that routes staff to the right AI tool for the job: creating educational content, building end-to-end courses, the lecture assistant, the lesson planner, and the full AI tools catalog. Designed so non-technical staff discover everything the AI can do.

subFeatures.name: Guided entry cards
subFeatures.description: Cards for creating educational content (videos, storybooks, quizzes, timelines), building end-to-end courses, the lecture assistant, the lesson planner and other AI learning tools — each linking straight to the right studio.

subFeatures.name: Works on any device
subFeatures.description: The hub adapts from a desktop grid to a compact mobile list so teachers can jump into tools from anywhere.

demo.intro: Watch AI draft a full NEET course from one prompt, turn a PDF into an exam paper, and tutor a learner at 11pm — all inside Vacademy.

widgets.title: Create a course with AI
widgets.subtitle: Powered by CourseCrafter AI — your white-labeled builder

fields.label: Prompt
fields.value: NEET 2027 Physics — Ray Optics for droppers, exam-focused with numericals

widgets.title: Ray Optics — NEET 2027 Droppers
widgets.subtitle: 3 chapters · 22 pages · generating in background (14/22 done)

children.label: AI video: Sign convention in 6 min
AI slide deck: Total internal reflection

slide.title: Topic: Mirror formula & magnification
slide.body: Every planned page carries an editable AI prompt. Refine it, regenerate just this page, or drag it to a new chapter — the course is created in exactly the order you arrange.

widgets.title: Vsmart Upload
widgets.subtitle: Paper from PDF, photo, audio or a plain prompt

items.title: Q1. An ideal gas expands isothermally...
Q2. First law of thermodynamics states...
Q3. Work done in an adiabatic process...
17 more questions
items.sub: Auto-grouped by topic via Vsmart Organizer

messages.text: Add 5 higher-order questions on entropy and make Q3 easier
Done — added 5 HOTS questions on entropy and simplified Q3 to a single-step calculation. Paper is now 25 questions.
I don't get sign convention in mirrors 😩
Think of the mirror as origin: distances measured against incoming light are negative. So for a concave mirror, object distance u is always negative. Want a quick check?
Timed quiz: 5 questions on sign convention, 5 minutes. Q1: An object is 30 cm in front of a concave mirror of f = 20 cm. What is u?

items.title: Explain this · Summarize · Hint
items.sub: One-tap actions on the open lesson

steps.title: A course from one prompt
steps.text: Describe what you want to teach and the AI drafts the whole course — structure, lesson pages, diagrams, videos, quizzes and homework. Admins can even white-label the builder under their own name.

steps.title: Grounded in YOUR syllabus
steps.text: Attach reference PDFs and website URLs — math-aware OCR pulls real figures and equations from your material, so lessons reflect your actual syllabus, not generic AI knowledge. Set audience age, level and language too.

steps.title: See the cost before you commit
steps.text: Every generation shows its exact credit price up front, drawn from a prepaid institute balance. Pick a specific AI model or bring your own OpenAI or Gemini keys.

steps.title: Review every page before it exists
steps.text: The draft lands as an interactive outline: chapters and pages spanning topic pages, AI videos, slide decks, quizzes, homework and solutions. Rename, delete or drag anything into a new order.

steps.title: Edit the prompt behind each page
steps.text: Every planned page carries an editable AI prompt. Refine it, regenerate a single page, or give course-wide corrective feedback — content fills in via background generation while you keep editing, then publishes to your study library in one click.

steps.title: Question papers from anything
steps.text: Vsmart builds editable papers from a PDF or PPT, a photographed printed paper, an audio lecture, or a plain topic prompt — with control over count, difficulty, question type and language.

steps.title: Straight into your question bank
steps.text: Generated questions land ready with answer keys, auto-grouped by topic for chapter-wise tests. Export as a formatted PDF or DOC paper, or push directly into a live assessment.

steps.title: Refine the paper by chatting
steps.text: Not happy? Just tell Vsmart Chat: add more MCQs, add higher-order questions, simplify Q3. Jobs run in the background with a task tracker, so you can navigate away and come back.

steps.title: A 24/7 tutor that knows the lesson
steps.text: On every learner screen, a branded tutor aware of the open course and lesson. Ananya asks a doubt at 11pm, says 'Quiz me', and gets a timed practice quiz graded with per-question feedback.

steps.title: Voice tutoring, on your terms
steps.text: Voice doubt-solving, AI-led mock interviews and oral tests in the learner's language. Admins design the persona, hard rules, voices and exactly which pages the tutor appears on.

pillars.name: AI Video Studio (Vimotion)
pillars.tagline: Prompt-to-video studio: avatars, voiceovers, editing, reels
pillars.description: Vimotion is Vacademy's AI Video Studio: type a brief and get a finished, branded, narrated video — script, visuals, voiceover, music and captions produced automatically in minutes. Beyond generation, it is a complete video operation: a full post-production editor, avatars and voice cloning, dialogue-driven story scenes, reels from long recordings, screen recording, translation with lip-sync, and a developer API for video at scale. Every video renders in your brand, in 60+ languages, with credit costs shown before you spend.

features.name: AI Video Generator (Prompt to Video)
features.tagline: Type a topic, get a finished narrated video
features.description: Turn a plain-text prompt, document or link into a complete narrated video. The AI writes the script, records the voiceover, designs every animated scene, adds captions and renders a final MP4 — while you watch each production stage complete live. Videos can also play instantly inside the course player as interactive scenes, and the same engine powers landscape explainers, vertical shorts and marketing films alike.

subFeatures.name: One-prompt creation
subFeatures.description: Enter a topic or a full brief in plain language — length, format and audience are parsed automatically, with no prompt engineering or template hunting required.

subFeatures.name: Any-source briefing
subFeatures.description: Start from a PDF, slide deck, document, blog post or Notion page; the AI condenses it into a structured script that preserves the author's argument and message hierarchy.

subFeatures.name: Website grounding from URLs
subFeatures.description: Paste a URL and the system visits the page, captures its screenshots and images, and grounds the video in that site's actual content.

subFeatures.name: Reference-file grounding
subFeatures.description: Attach images and PDFs and the AI uses their real facts and figures in the video instead of inventing material.

subFeatures.name: Target audience control
subFeatures.description: Pick the audience — from Class 1-2 through Graduate/Professional — and the script, vocabulary and visuals adapt to that level.

subFeatures.name: Target duration control
subFeatures.description: Choose the intended length from 30 seconds to 10 minutes; pacing, shot count and script density are sized to hit it.

subFeatures.name: 60+ narration languages
subFeatures.description: Generate videos narrated in 60+ languages grouped by region, including 9 Indian languages and regional English variants, with voice gender and named-voice selection.

subFeatures.name: Landscape and portrait output
subFeatures.description: Produce 16:9 videos for courses and YouTube or 9:16 vertical videos for Shorts and Reels, with an on/off toggle for burned-in, word-synced captions.

subFeatures.name: Script review mode
subFeatures.description: Stop generation at the script stage, review and edit the narration, then continue to full production.

subFeatures.name: Stage-by-stage generation
subFeatures.description: Generate up to any checkpoint — script only, script plus audio, full visual timeline, or final MP4 — and resume from any completed stage without redoing earlier work.

subFeatures.name: Live progress streaming
subFeatures.description: Real-time progress shows the current stage, percentage and messages while the video builds; creators can leave and come back.

subFeatures.name: Cancel, retry and resume
subFeatures.description: Cancel a running generation mid-flight, retry a failed run from its last successful checkpoint, and resume interrupted runs without losing spend.

subFeatures.name: Generation history and settings reuse
subFeatures.description: A history sidebar lists every past generation with status and output links; reopen results or reuse a previous run's voice, tier, brand kit and visual settings.

subFeatures.name: Smart intent routing preview
subFeatures.description: Before you submit, the studio previews how your request will be routed — which tools and stages will run, whether URLs will be scraped or the web searched — and lets you override any decision.

subFeatures.name: Instant interactive playback
subFeatures.description: Videos can play immediately in the course player as synced audio and animated scenes, so learners get content right away while the MP4 render is optional.

subFeatures.name: Course builder integration
subFeatures.description: AI course outlines can mark slides as video items; the pipeline generates each one and streams progress straight into the course editor.

subFeatures.name: Course-wide video settings
subFeatures.description: A single settings card controls how every video in a generated course is produced — narration language, voice, audio quality, video model, target length and quality tier — set once and applied throughout.

subFeatures.name: Versioned re-renders
subFeatures.description: Re-render any video on a prompt change without re-recording; past versions remain intact for rollback.

features.name: Quality Tiers & AI Director
features.tagline: Choose your quality level, from free to film-grade
features.description: Five quality tiers — Free, Standard, Premium, Ultra and Super Ultra — let you trade cost against polish on every video. Higher tiers switch on an AI Director that plans the whole edit like a filmmaker, generates multiple candidate designs for key scenes and picks the best, and runs automated visual quality inspections before anything ships.

subFeatures.name: Five quality tiers
subFeatures.description: Free (stock-only, fastest), Standard, Premium, Ultra and Super Ultra — each tier unlocks more design intelligence, sound design and review passes, with per-tier pricing.

subFeatures.name: AI Director planning
subFeatures.description: On Premium and above, a director model plans acts, beats, shot types, emphasis, motion density and per-scene styling before any visuals are generated.

subFeatures.name: Frontier-model creative concepts
subFeatures.description: Top tiers explore multiple divergent creative concepts with anti-repetition prompting, so videos never look templated.

subFeatures.name: Best-of-N hero shots
subFeatures.description: On key scenes — hook, hero, closing — the system generates 2-4 candidate designs at different creative angles and a visual judge compares actual rendered frames to pick the winner.

subFeatures.name: AI vision review of every scene
subFeatures.description: A vision model inspects each rendered scene for visible defects such as broken text or clipped layouts, with bounded regeneration of anything that fails.

subFeatures.name: Pixel-accurate overflow checks
subFeatures.description: A deterministic bounding-box check walks every rendered frame and flags any text or media crossing the canvas edge — catching clipped headlines no reviewer can miss.

subFeatures.name: Animation density enforcement
subFeatures.description: A validator ensures every scene has enough animated elements and none of the forbidden anti-patterns, keeping motion quality consistently high.

subFeatures.name: Creativity critic
subFeatures.description: Ultra tiers run a director's-eye scoring gate on hero shots and elevate any scene that falls below the creative bar.

subFeatures.name: AI-choreographed transitions
subFeatures.description: An edit choreographer authors scene-to-scene transitions instead of using one stock crossfade everywhere.

subFeatures.name: Two-pass script review
subFeatures.description: Premium scripts are drafted, then reviewed and rewritten in a second pass for tighter narration.

subFeatures.name: Cost guardrails and transparency
subFeatures.description: Every quality gate carries its own cost cap, credit pre-flight checks block runs your balance cannot support, and each run records a per-stage cost breakdown so you can see exactly where credits went.

features.name: AI Voiceover, Text-to-Speech & Voice Cloning
features.tagline: Hundreds of natural voices — or your own, cloned
features.description: Every video gets a natural, studio-grade voiceover. A free standard tier covers 50+ languages, premium tiers add named studio voices for global and Indian languages, and voice cloning reproduces a real instructor's or founder's voice from a two-minute sample — so your star presenter narrates every video in every language. Narration also works standalone for podcasts, phone systems and accessibility.

subFeatures.name: Standard voices in 50+ languages
subFeatures.description: Male and female neural voices included free across 50+ languages and locales, from US/UK/India English to Hindi, Tamil, Spanish, Japanese, Arabic and more.

subFeatures.name: Premium Indian voices
subFeatures.description: 35+ named voices with authentic Indian accents across Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, Kannada, Gujarati, Malayalam, Punjabi, Odia and Indian English.

subFeatures.name: Premium global voices
subFeatures.description: Multiple named studio-grade voices per language for 25+ global languages, with graceful fallback when a language and gender combination is unavailable.

subFeatures.name: Voice picker with audio samples
subFeatures.description: Browse a 200+ voice library filtered by language, accent, gender, age and tone, and audition every voice with a sample clip before choosing; lock a default voice per workspace.

subFeatures.name: Automatic provider routing
subFeatures.description: On the premium tier, Indian languages and global languages route automatically to the best voice engine for each — no configuration needed.

subFeatures.name: Voice cloning from a 2-minute sample
subFeatures.description: Upload two minutes of clean audio — phone-mic quality is fine — and get a quality-checked clone that carries the original's cadence, warmth and quirks.

subFeatures.name: Consent-governed clones
subFeatures.description: Every clone carries a consent record, stays scoped to your workspace, is never shared or used for third-party training, and can be revoked in one click with a full audit log.

subFeatures.name: Cross-language clone fidelity
subFeatures.description: A cloned voice speaks 80+ languages with the same cadence — a message recorded once becomes a localized series without dubbing studios.

subFeatures.name: Inline direction marks
subFeatures.description: Slow a word, lift a phrase, pause for breath — pace and emphasis marks placed inline in the script, plus per-paragraph emotion presets.

subFeatures.name: Custom pronunciation lexicons
subFeatures.description: Define how product names and jargon are pronounced, per workspace.

subFeatures.name: Word-level timestamping
subFeatures.description: Narration is aligned to word-level timestamps with automated verification, powering captions, scene sync and sentence editing.

subFeatures.name: Per-scene audio and retakes
subFeatures.description: Narration is recorded per sentence and per scene, so individual lines can be edited or re-taken later without regenerating the whole track.

subFeatures.name: Voice-matched pacing
subFeatures.description: Scene timings adapt to how fast each chosen voice actually speaks and to the content style.

subFeatures.name: Standalone audio export
subFeatures.description: Ship narration as standalone audio in WAV, MP3, OGG or OPUS, download it or stream it via API to any channel — cleared for commercial use.

features.name: AI Avatars & On-Screen Presenters
features.tagline: Your best instructor on camera — without a camera
features.description: Put a lifelike presenter in any video. Upload one clear face photo or a two-minute phone recording and the platform builds a reusable avatar that presents any script with lip-synced speech in 80+ languages — or pick from a library of 30+ pre-built presenters. Control exactly how much screen time the host gets, and choose between multiple avatar engines at different price and fidelity points.

subFeatures.name: Custom avatar from a photo
subFeatures.description: Upload a front-facing photo plus an optional description of clothing, demeanour and background; the system generates consistent per-scene presenter footage lip-synced to the narration.

subFeatures.name: Avatar from a 2-minute recording
subFeatures.description: Record two minutes on any phone in a quiet room and receive a brand-grade avatar within 24 hours, complete with a quality-assurance pass — no green screen or crew.

subFeatures.name: Saved avatar library
subFeatures.description: Save reusable avatar identities with their face, engine and voice, pick them from a dropdown for any video, and choose from 30+ diverse pre-built presenters across age, gender and ethnicity.

subFeatures.name: Multiple avatar engines
subFeatures.description: Seven generation engines spanning budget to premium fidelity, each labelled with its per-second credit price, so you pick the cost/realism trade-off per video.

subFeatures.name: Host screen-time dial
subFeatures.description: Set what percentage of scenes show the host on camera (0-100%); the Director places host appearances on hooks, recaps and key beats while narration plays continuously.

subFeatures.name: First-person script rewrite
subFeatures.description: When a host is enabled, the script is automatically rewritten in first person so the presenter speaks naturally.

subFeatures.name: Cross-language presenting
subFeatures.description: The same face speaks 80+ languages with lips matching the words and the source voice's rhythm preserved, with per-language preview before render.

subFeatures.name: Personalized avatar videos at scale
subFeatures.description: Pipe in a CRM feed — first name, company, deal value — and generate thousands of personalized presenter videos from one recording, with per-variable preview and approval gates.

subFeatures.name: Consent, IP controls and audit
subFeatures.description: Avatar likeness rights are locked to your workspace with consent records, never reused by third parties, and every avatar render is recorded in an audit log.

subFeatures.name: Resolution and frame-rate options
subFeatures.description: 480p or 720p avatar output with adjustable frame rates on engines that support it.

subFeatures.name: Segment-level re-renders
subFeatures.description: Edit any sentence and re-render only that segment; versioned sources allow rollback.

features.name: Storybook & Drama Dialogue Scenes
features.tagline: Characters that talk on camera, in consistent voices
features.description: Turn lessons into short films: the AI writes characters and dialogue, then produces lip-synced, voice-matched acted scenes. Choose Storybook mode, where a narrator carries the video and dialogue scenes land at dramatic moments, or Drama mode — a pure dialogue film with no narrator at all. Save a cast once and the same faces and voices star across a whole series.

subFeatures.name: Storybook mode
subFeatures.description: The narrator carries the video and 1-4 dialogue scenes appear at dramatic moments for emotional impact.

subFeatures.name: Drama mode
subFeatures.description: A pure dialogue film — every scene is characters talking, clips carry their own ambience, and the clip budget is raised accordingly.

subFeatures.name: Voice-locked characters
subFeatures.description: The default engine lip-syncs characters to the platform's own per-character AI voices, so each character sounds identical across scenes and sequel videos.

subFeatures.name: Budget dialogue engine
subFeatures.description: A lower-cost alternative engine speaks the lines itself — strong visuals at roughly half the price, for productions where per-clip voice consistency matters less.

subFeatures.name: Intelligent voice casting
subFeatures.description: Each character gets a distinct voice matched to their age and personality; no two characters share a voice, and you can override any casting choice.

subFeatures.name: Reusable saved casts
subFeatures.description: Save a finished video's cast — names, portraits, reference sheets and voice assignments — and reuse it so a series keeps the same faces and voices.

subFeatures.name: Character consistency via reference images
subFeatures.description: Up to 9 reference images lock character and setting appearance across independently generated clips.

subFeatures.name: Clip quality control and re-takes
subFeatures.description: Every filmed clip passes an automated quality check, and in Assist Mode you can review clips and send back specific shots with re-take notes.

subFeatures.name: Dialogue budget caps
subFeatures.description: Dialogue-scene spend is estimated up front and capped per tier, so drama videos stay within predictable cost.

features.name: Cinematic AI Video Clips
features.tagline: True AI-generated film clips inside your videos
features.description: On the top quality tiers, opt in to fully AI-generated cinematic video clips woven into your video as full-frame hero scenes or inline moments — with optional generated sound of their own. A built-in cost circuit-breaker caps AI-clip spend per video so premium footage never runs away with your budget.

subFeatures.name: AI hero clips
subFeatures.description: The AI Director plans full-frame generated video scenes where real footage doesn't exist — opt-in per run.

subFeatures.name: Inline AI clips
subFeatures.description: Individual scenes can embed short AI-generated clips inside larger layouts.

subFeatures.name: Optional clip audio
subFeatures.description: AI clips can carry their own generated sound; master narration is automatically silenced during those moments.

subFeatures.name: Hard per-video cost cap
subFeatures.description: A circuit breaker rejects further AI-clip generation past a fixed per-video ceiling and falls back to standard scene designs, so costs never run away.

subFeatures.name: Worst-case cost preview
subFeatures.description: The pre-generation estimate shows the AI-clip upper bound in credits before you commit.

subFeatures.name: Extended clip chaining
subFeatures.description: Image-to-video chaining supports clips longer than a single generation window.

features.name: Cinematic Shot Library & Motion Design
features.tagline: 18+ scene types, 8 visual themes, real motion design
features.description: Videos are assembled from a library of professionally designed animated scene types — data stories, process steps, equation builds, device mockups, kinetic titles and more — each with its own motion language. Eight ready-made visual themes, style modes and preference controls keep every video on-brand and non-generic.

subFeatures.name: 18+ animated scene types
subFeatures.description: Text diagrams, image and video heroes, split comparisons, lower thirds, annotated maps, animated data stories, process steps, equation builds, product heroes, kinetic text, SVG infographics, device mockups and more.

subFeatures.name: Curated shot templates
subFeatures.description: Battle-tested layouts including definition cards, quote callouts, stat blocks, step progressions, three-up grids, horizontal timelines and article zoom-pans.

subFeatures.name: Motion primitives
subFeatures.description: Reusable animation building blocks — number counters, typewriter text, growing bar charts, progress rings, staggered lists, underline sweeps and equation term reveals.

subFeatures.name: 8 visual themes
subFeatures.description: Whiteboard, Cerulean, Glamour, Diorama, Neon, Chalkboard, Blueprint and Minimal — each a complete look with its own palette and design rules.

subFeatures.name: Visual style modes
subFeatures.description: Educational (clean lecture look), Marketing (premium brand-film look with depth and choreographed motion) or Bold (high-energy social styling) — auto-detected from content or set explicitly.

subFeatures.name: Visual preference sliders
subFeatures.description: Bias the mix of stock footage, AI imagery, SVG diagrams, motion graphics, app mockups and AI video per family — or just type preferences in plain language like 'use more diagrams'.

subFeatures.name: On-screen text density control
subFeatures.description: Choose minimal, low, auto or rich on-screen text independently of narration length — from title-only scenes to full supporting labels.

subFeatures.name: Domain-aware shot selection
subFeatures.description: The planner picks scene types suited to the subject — math gets equation builds, business gets data stories — and enforces shot diversity so scenes never repeat.

subFeatures.name: Subject-matched pacing and music mood
subFeatures.description: Speaking pace, transition style and music mood adapt to the detected subject and target duration.

features.name: Real Footage & Imagery Sourcing
features.tagline: Real stock, real news photos, and AI imagery — automatically
features.description: Every scene is dressed with the right imagery without the creator lifting a finger. The pipeline searches licensed stock photo and video libraries, pulls real news and web images for named people, places and events, and generates AI images where nothing real fits — with an AI ranking pass choosing the best match instead of the first result.

subFeatures.name: Stock photo and video search
subFeatures.description: Automatic licensed stock search per scene with orientation matching and built-in redundancy for reliability.

subFeatures.name: Real-entity image search
subFeatures.description: Web-powered image and video search finds actual photos of specific people, places, events and products that stock libraries don't have.

subFeatures.name: AI image generation
subFeatures.description: Custom images are generated for abstract or conceptual scenes, with prompt enhancement on higher tiers.

subFeatures.name: AI-ranked selection
subFeatures.description: Instead of taking the first search result, higher tiers run an AI ranking over the top candidates and pick the best-fitting photo or clip.

subFeatures.name: Visual continuity
subFeatures.description: Continuity mode keeps characters and settings visually consistent across scenes in the same video.

subFeatures.name: Reference image placement
subFeatures.description: Attached reference images are understood by a vision model and threaded into the script and scene design, so real diagrams appear exactly where they belong.

subFeatures.name: Tier-based sourcing policy
subFeatures.description: The free tier is stock-only; higher tiers prefer stock and use AI generation only where stock can't deliver.

features.name: Use Your Own Footage
features.tagline: AI videos built from your recordings and screenshots
features.description: Upload your own videos and images — demos, lectures, podcasts, product walkthroughs — and the AI understands them: transcribing speech, detecting scenes and faces, and mapping screen regions. Generated videos then splice in your real footage with graphics intelligently overlaid around it, turning raw recordings into polished produced videos.

subFeatures.name: Video indexing with podcast and demo modes
subFeatures.description: Uploaded videos are analyzed with mode-specific pipelines — podcast (faces, speech) or demo (screen activity) — producing transcripts, scene maps and spatial layouts, with visible processing status.

subFeatures.name: Image indexing
subFeatures.description: Photos, screenshots and diagrams are indexed as reusable assets the planner can place into scenes.

subFeatures.name: Multi-source generation
subFeatures.description: Attach up to 5 indexed videos to one generation; the AI Director plans which source clips to use where.

subFeatures.name: Original audio or AI narration
subFeatures.description: Keep the source video's own audio as the narration, or let AI narrate over the footage — with an option to duck narration during source clips so their real sound plays.

subFeatures.name: Source clip priority
subFeatures.description: Tell the Director to lean lightly or heavily on your footage versus generated visuals.

subFeatures.name: Smart overlay placement
subFeatures.description: Face detection identifies free screen regions so text and graphics never cover the speaker.

subFeatures.name: Asset library management
subFeatures.description: Browse, filter, inspect and delete uploaded source videos and images from a dedicated library.

features.name: AI Sound Design & Generated Music
features.tagline: Original score and sound effects on every video
features.description: Videos ship with a complete audio mix, not just a voice. A sound planner places tasteful effects on transitions and emphasis moments, AI generates fresh custom effects so videos never reuse the same whoosh, and an AI composer writes an original background score matched to each video's emotional arc.

subFeatures.name: Automatic sound-effect placement
subFeatures.description: Cues are derived from scene types, animation events and narration emphasis, with per-tier caps and a one-click off switch.

subFeatures.name: AI-generated fresh effects
subFeatures.description: Bespoke effects — typewriter ticks, paper rustle, chart-growth tones, whooshes and stingers — are generated to match actual on-screen animation events.

subFeatures.name: Curated sound library with semantic search
subFeatures.description: A role-based catalog of transition whooshes, chimes and impacts with semantic matching and repeat-avoidance so the same file isn't overused.

subFeatures.name: AI-composed background music
subFeatures.description: An original score is composed per video from the Director's music plan — mood, style and emotional beats — tiled seamlessly for long videos and delivered as an editable track.

subFeatures.name: Curated music fallback
subFeatures.description: A mood-tagged royalty-free library (ambient, triumphant, cinematic, tense, playful, reflective) keeps every video scored.

subFeatures.name: Music controls
subFeatures.description: Enable or disable background music per run, set its starting volume, and adjust or remove it later in the editor.

subFeatures.name: Full audio mixdown
subFeatures.description: Narration, source-clip audio, dialogue-scene audio, music and effects are mixed with loudness normalization into the final render.

features.name: Assist Mode — Human-in-the-Loop Co-Direction
features.tagline: Approve the AI's creative decisions like a film director
features.description: Instead of a fully automatic video, Assist Mode pauses the pipeline at the creative checkpoints you choose and asks for your decision in a chat-style panel.
