Approve or redirect the concept, shot plan, narration, visual style, casting and filmed clips — so the final video matches your vision without you doing the production work.

subFeatures.name: 13 configurable decision gates
subFeatures.description: Enable any subset of pause points: creative concept, shot plan, styleframe, asset requests, narration, cast, dailies, visual casting, shot look, contact sheet, voice, music and avatar.

subFeatures.name: Conversational approvals with five answer modes
subFeatures.description: Each gate arrives as a chat card where you select an option, edit the draft directly, type free-form direction, let the AI decide this one, or auto-approve all remaining decisions of that kind.

subFeatures.name: Shot plan review and editing
subFeatures.description: See, reorder and rewrite the full planned shot list before any visuals are generated.

subFeatures.name: Narration review and editing
subFeatures.description: Edit narration per scene or replace the full script at the gate before the voiceover is recorded.

subFeatures.name: Visual casting with live stock search
subFeatures.description: At the visual-casting gate, search stock media live and hand-pick the exact footage or photo for each scene.

subFeatures.name: Dailies review with re-takes
subFeatures.description: Review each filmed dialogue clip alongside its automated quality verdict and send back specific shots with a note describing what the re-take must fix.

subFeatures.name: Design identity approval
subFeatures.description: Approve the video's visual signature — font pairing, motion style, finishing and color arc — before every shot is produced in that style.

subFeatures.name: Per-decision or batched granularity
subFeatures.description: Pause at every individual choice, including per-shot, or receive same-kind decisions consolidated in batches.

subFeatures.name: Persistent, resumable decisions
subFeatures.description: Pending decisions survive page reloads; the run resumes cleanly the moment an answer arrives.

subFeatures.name: Live pipeline map
subFeatures.description: Watch production as a node graph — research, pitch, screenplay, narration, shot planning, storyboard, talent, filming, score and final cut — with live status per stage.

subFeatures.name: Thumbnail picker
subFeatures.description: Choose the video's cover image from generated frame options.

subFeatures.name: Production audit trail
subFeatures.description: An audit sheet exposes every stage's inputs and outputs for quality inspection.

features.name: AI Video Editor
features.tagline: Fix any scene or sentence without regenerating the video
features.description: Every generated video opens in a full timeline editor: scrub frame-accurately, rewrite narration sentence by sentence in the same voice, move and restyle on-screen elements directly on the canvas, and layer music and effects — then re-render the final cut. An AI edit assistant also takes plain-English instructions like 'change the headline' or 'cut the intro', shows you the proposed change, and applies surgical fixes without a costly full regeneration.

subFeatures.name: Timeline scrubbing and live playback
subFeatures.description: Frame-accurate scrubbing with a real in-browser playback engine, so you review edits instantly without waiting for renders.

subFeatures.name: Scene and shot management
subFeatures.description: Add, edit, reorder, duplicate or delete scenes on the timeline, override a shot's captions, and download individual shots.

subFeatures.name: Edit with AI in plain English
subFeatures.description: Type an instruction — 'swap the background video', 'add captions in French', 'drop the last 10 seconds' — and the assistant applies a fast targeted patch or a full remake as needed, with a preview you accept, reject or refine.

subFeatures.name: AI gap-fill scenes
subFeatures.description: Generate a brand-new scene to fill a gap in the timeline, styled to match its neighbors.

subFeatures.name: Sentence-level re-narration
subFeatures.description: Rewrite one sentence and the platform re-records just that line in the same voice, splices it into the master audio with crossfades, and ripples all later timings automatically.

subFeatures.name: Mute a sentence or scene
subFeatures.description: Replace any sentence's or scene's audio with equal-length silence in one click.

subFeatures.name: On-canvas visual editing
subFeatures.description: Select, drag and resize text and media layers directly on the video canvas with alignment guides and a full layer stack.

subFeatures.name: Built-in media picker and overlays
subFeatures.description: Search stock photos and videos, generate AI images on demand, add image and video overlays, and maintain a saved media library — all inside the editor.

subFeatures.name: Advanced markup editing
subFeatures.description: Power users can open any scene's underlying markup in a built-in code editor for pixel-level control.

subFeatures.name: Caption styling
subFeatures.description: Ready-made caption style presets plus per-shot caption overrides.

subFeatures.name: Audio tracks, music and transitions
subFeatures.description: Manage multiple audio tracks with waveforms, add or remove music and sound cues, trim silent tails, and apply shot-to-shot transitions from a library.

subFeatures.name: Channel restyling
subFeatures.description: Restyle a finished video for a new channel — different brand frame, pacing and captions — and export in every aspect ratio needed.

subFeatures.name: AI thumbnails
subFeatures.description: Each video gets AI-generated thumbnail options with the headline typeset into the image; swap the selected option or regenerate.

subFeatures.name: Safe collaborative saving
subFeatures.description: Conflict detection warns when someone else saved the same video, so edits are never silently lost; script, audio, timings and renders are stored as separate recoverable assets.

features.name: Brand Kits & Video Branding
features.tagline: Every video in your colors, fonts and logo — automatically
features.description: Define your brand once — palette, fonts, logo, intro and outro, watermark and standing creative instructions — and every AI video applies it automatically at render time. Named brand kits keep separate identities for different brands or departments, a one-click scraper drafts a complete kit from any public website, and per-video overrides handle special cases without touching saved settings.

subFeatures.name: Institute-wide branding defaults
subFeatures.description: Configure intro slide, outro slide, watermark, background theme and typography defaults with live previews; every generated video follows them.

subFeatures.name: Named brand kits
subFeatures.description: Create multiple kits — palette, fonts, layout, intro/outro, watermark and director instructions — set a default, and pick a kit per video to fully replace defaults for that run.

subFeatures.name: AI brand kit from a website
subFeatures.description: Paste a URL and the platform screenshots the site, detects logo, palette and fonts, and drafts a ready-to-save brand kit including intro, outro and watermark designs.

subFeatures.name: Brand voice instructions
subFeatures.description: A free-text instruction block in the kit steers the AI's script, planning and scene design on every video — tone rules, taglines, do/don't lists.

subFeatures.name: Per-video overrides
subFeatures.description: Layer one-shot overrides — palette tweaks, a different intro/outro or watermark, custom director instructions — on a single generation without changing saved settings.

subFeatures.name: Intro and outro cards
subFeatures.description: Branded opening and closing segments with configurable duration and design, baked into the render.

subFeatures.name: Watermark control
subFeatures.description: Configurable watermark position, opacity and design; branding can be toggled off per render.

subFeatures.name: Governance and template locks
subFeatures.description: Workspace brand definitions are locked with permission-gated overrides, version history, per-template approval gates and a render audit trail — so every team ships on-brand video self-serve.

subFeatures.name: Template library by team
subFeatures.description: Pre-built templates organized by team and use case — launch films, sales videos, training, social cuts, executive updates — forkable into a workspace library and lockable for reuse.

features.name: Professional Rendering & Export
features.tagline: Broadcast-ready MP4s from a dedicated render farm
features.description: Final videos render on dedicated infrastructure with parallel chunked encoding, so long videos finish fast without affecting the rest of the platform. Creators control resolution, frame rate and a full caption styling suite — including karaoke-style word highlighting — at export time, and one render can serve every channel's aspect ratio.

subFeatures.name: Resolution and orientation options
subFeatures.description: Export at 720p or 1080p in landscape (1920x1080) or portrait (1080x1920).

subFeatures.name: Frame rate options
subFeatures.description: Choose 15, 20, 25, 30, 45 or 60 fps per render.

subFeatures.name: Caption styling suite
subFeatures.description: Phrase or karaoke word-highlight styles, multiple font families and weights, text and background colors with opacity, stroke, highlight color, position and size presets.

subFeatures.name: Multi-ratio output
subFeatures.description: Produce 16:9, 9:16 and 1:1 cuts for every channel from the same project.

subFeatures.name: Branding toggle at export
subFeatures.description: Show or hide watermarks and branding per render without editing the video.

subFeatures.name: Parallel chunked rendering
subFeatures.description: Videos render in parallel chunks with aggregate progress reporting for fast turnaround on long content.

subFeatures.name: Render job management
subFeatures.description: Submit, track and cancel render jobs; completion updates the video automatically.

subFeatures.name: Source footage compositing
subFeatures.description: Scenes using your own uploaded footage are composited with frame-accurate seeking and correctly mixed audio.

features.name: AI Reels & Clip Finder
features.tagline: Turn one lecture into a week of viral shorts
features.description: Point the platform at any long recording and it finds the most engaging moments, scores them like a social media editor, and renders them as short-form reels with captions and branding. A three-step funnel — free scan, low-cost AI preview, full render — means you only pay for clips worth publishing.

subFeatures.name: Free engagement scan
subFeatures.description: Heuristic scoring finds up to 50 candidate moments, rating each on hook strength, pacing, information density, loop-back potential and topic concentration.

subFeatures.name: Targeting controls
subFeatures.description: Set target reel duration (10-120 seconds), tolerance, aspect ratio, topic keywords and must-include time ranges; re-scan anytime.

subFeatures.name: Candidate preview
subFeatures.description: Review each candidate with a segment player, a thumbnail strip, and a word-importance timeline showing why the moment scored well.

subFeatures.name: AI preview enrichment
subFeatures.description: Selected candidates get an AI pass that writes a hook title and rationale, grades words for caption emphasis, and corrects misheard names and terms in the transcript.

subFeatures.name: Aspect ratios and layouts
subFeatures.description: Render 9:16, 16:9 or 1:1 with full-speaker, stacked or picture-in-picture layouts.

subFeatures.name: B-roll options
subFeatures.description: Auto-pick relevant stock b-roll from the transcript, or supply your own video.

subFeatures.name: Silence trimming and pacing
subFeatures.description: Off, gentle or tighter silence trimming plus configurable playback pace up to 1.5x clean up dead air.

subFeatures.name: Cut plan overrides
subFeatures.description: Manually override the AI's cut points with your own spans before rendering.

subFeatures.name: Reel scene editing
subFeatures.description: Add, update or delete overlay scenes on a finished reel just like the main video editor.

subFeatures.name: Render tracking and retry
subFeatures.description: Stage-by-stage progress per reel with one-click retry on failures, plus full reel management.

features.name: Long-Form Edit Projects (Multi-Clip Wizard)
features.tagline: Raw recordings to a finished edit in guided steps
features.description: A project-based workspace that assembles long-form videos from your raw footage through a guided AI wizard: arrange and slice clips, clean up silences and filler words, add titles and captions, lay in music and effects, and build straight into the editor for final polish. The AI proposes a plan at every step; you refine it in conversation and confirm before anything is built.

subFeatures.name: Project workspace
subFeatures.description: Create and manage projects that bundle multiple indexed video and image assets with a prompt, preferences and per-project options; a dashboard tracks build status per project.

subFeatures.name: Four-step AI wizard
subFeatures.description: Arrangement (clip ordering), Cuts (what to trim), Overlays (titles, captions, text) and Audio (music and effects) — each step offers an AI plan, chat-style refinement and explicit confirmation.

subFeatures.name: Smart cut detection
subFeatures.description: Automatic silence and filler-word detection proposes cuts; segment picking and sequencing tools assemble the story.

subFeatures.name: Overlay and caption proposals
subFeatures.description: The AI proposes titles, text overlays and captions placed on the timeline; every proposal is editable.

subFeatures.name: Audio proposals
subFeatures.description: The AI proposes background music and sound effects; a master soundtrack is assembled per build with per-track control.

subFeatures.name: Deep control at every layer
subFeatures.description: Override per asset, per project, per wizard step, per operation and per build — skip steps, reorder, or hand-edit anything the AI proposed.

subFeatures.name: Builds and publishing
subFeatures.description: Create multiple builds — fork a previous build, change aspect ratio or frame rate — track their status, publish the winner and delete the rest.

subFeatures.name: Frame-level build editing
subFeatures.description: Add, update, delete and reorder scenes on a finished build before rendering.

subFeatures.name: Editor handoff and final render
subFeatures.description: Open any build directly in the AI video editor for polish, then render to MP4 with the full export options.

features.name: Video Translation & Lip-Synced Localization
features.tagline: One video localized into 80+ markets in one batch
features.description: Translate any video — script, voiceover and captions — into 80+ languages with frame-accurate lip sync, so the result looks filmed in the target language rather than dubbed. Brand glossaries protect product names from translation, per-segment review lets humans approve the lines that matter, and one batch produces the entire localized set.

subFeatures.name: Frame-accurate lip sync
subFeatures.description: Mouth movements match the new language — for AI avatars and real human talent alike — with per-language preview before render.

subFeatures.name: Brand-glossary protection
subFeatures.description: A workspace-locked glossary protects product names, trademarks and idioms from translation; translation memory carries across projects.

subFeatures.name: Per-segment review and approval
subFeatures.description: Reviewers approve individual translated lines before render, per market.

subFeatures.name: Batch multi-market rendering
subFeatures.description: Pick target markets and produce the full localized set — voiced, captioned, lip-synced — in one batch, with an audit log of every locale shipped.

subFeatures.name: Works on any source video
subFeatures.description: Localize videos made on the platform or uploaded from anywhere.

subFeatures.name: Native-speaker QA
subFeatures.description: Enterprise plans add a native-speaker quality-assurance review per market.

features.name: AI Transcription & Translation
features.tagline: Accurate word-timed transcripts for any recording
features.description: Any audio or video file can be transcribed with word-level timestamps, in the source language or translated into English. Transcription powers captions, video indexing, reels, clip extraction and searchable content across the platform.

subFeatures.name: Async transcription jobs
subFeatures.description: Submit any media file, choose accuracy level, and receive the finished transcript with completion callbacks.

subFeatures.name: Word-level timestamps
subFeatures.description: Every word is timed, enabling synced captions, sentence editing and clip extraction.

subFeatures.name: Translate mode
subFeatures.description: Transcribe in the source language, translate to English, or produce both in one job.

subFeatures.name: Multiple output formats
subFeatures.description: Plain text and structured formats for downstream use.

features.name: Screen Recorder with Auto-Edit
features.tagline: Record once, auto-edit, ship anywhere
features.description: Record a browser tab, application window or full screen with webcam picture-in-picture and background removal — straight from the browser with nothing to install. The platform then automatically removes filler words and dead space, tightens pacing, adds captions and brand-stamps the result for internal shares, support replies or social.

subFeatures.name: Browser-based capture
subFeatures.description: Record tab, window or full screen with webcam picture-in-picture and background removal — no extension or install.

subFeatures.name: Automatic filler removal
subFeatures.description: 'Ums', silences and dead space are cut with pacing-aware trims, with a one-click 'keep raw' option for technical demos.

subFeatures.name: Caption and brand stamping
subFeatures.description: Captions in source and target language plus workspace brand marks applied to every recording.

subFeatures.name: Multi-destination sharing
subFeatures.description: Push the same cut to chat, drive or support tools as an internal share, ticket reply or social short.

features.name: Thumbnail Maker
features.tagline: Click-worthy, on-brand thumbnails with A/B variants
features.description: Generate platform-perfect thumbnails from a finished video, a frame or a brief — with preset compositions tuned for YouTube click-through, LinkedIn scroll-stop, TikTok hooks and X. Brand type, color and logo lockups apply automatically, and multiple variants per video can be pushed straight into YouTube A/B testing.

subFeatures.name: Platform composition presets
subFeatures.description: Presets for YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok and X with per-platform safe-area and crop logic.

subFeatures.name: Automatic brand styling
subFeatures.description: Type, palette, logo lockup and overlay style applied at render time, with per-channel variations.

subFeatures.name: A/B variant generation
subFeatures.description: Four composition variants per video, pushed directly to YouTube A/B tests with per-variant performance reporting.

features.name: PowerPoint to Video & Animated Slides
features.tagline: Slide decks that present themselves
features.description: Upload a deck and get two superpowers: a narrated presenter video — speaker notes become the script, transitions are animated, and pacing matches each slide's density — or web-ready animated slides that replay your click-by-click entrance animations beautifully in the browser. Existing uploaded decks can be upgraded in bulk.

subFeatures.name: Multi-format deck input
subFeatures.description: PPTX, Keynote, Google Slides and PDF supported, with slide text, speaker notes and visual hierarchy read automatically.

subFeatures.name: Speaker-notes narration
subFeatures.description: Speaker notes become the narration script when present; otherwise copy is generated — optionally in a cloned voice.

subFeatures.name: Content-aware pacing
subFeatures.description: Each slide gets a timing window matched to its density — no flat per-slide timing.

subFeatures.name: Branded motion layer
subFeatures.description: Transitions, lower-thirds and motion language applied per your brand template, tweakable per slide.

subFeatures.name: Animation-preserving web slides
subFeatures.description: Click-by-click entrance animations are detected from the PPTX and replayed as smooth build steps in the online deck player, rendered at high fidelity.

subFeatures.name: Async conversion and bulk upgrade
subFeatures.description: Submit decks as background jobs and upgrade previously uploaded decks to the animated format in bulk.

subFeatures.name: Flexible export
subFeatures.description: Every aspect ratio from one deck, exported to MP4, WebM or GIF preview with auto-captions.

features.name: Image to Video
features.tagline: Product stills turned into branded motion clips
features.description: Turn product shots, screenshots or stock images into motion clips with composition-aware camera moves, narration and on-brand captions. Built for product pages, retargeting creative and email — with batch rendering across an entire product catalog.

subFeatures.name: Composition-aware motion
subFeatures.description: Each image receives the camera move its composition warrants — pans, zooms, parallax — with per-image override and preview.

subFeatures.name: Automatic brand framing
subFeatures.description: Lower-thirds, logo placement rules, color overlays and locked caption styles applied at render time.

subFeatures.name: Catalog batch rendering
subFeatures.description: Render hundreds of clips across a product catalog in one pass, in every aspect ratio.

subFeatures.name: Ad-account push
subFeatures.description: Push finished clips directly to ad accounts and asset managers.

features.name: Video API & Automation
features.tagline: Video as infrastructure, wired into your stack
features.description: The entire video engine is available as a documented developer API: create API keys, generate videos programmatically from your CRM, product, LMS or marketing tools, and receive webhooks when each video is ready. Teams wire it so releases trigger launch films, CRM stages trigger personalized outreach, and catalogs render per-SKU video automatically.

subFeatures.name: API key management
subFeatures.description: Generate, list and revoke workspace-scoped API keys directly from the studio.

subFeatures.name: In-app interactive documentation
subFeatures.description: Docs cover generation, status polling and asset endpoints with ready-to-copy JavaScript, Python and cURL examples.

subFeatures.name: Cost and route preview endpoints
subFeatures.description: Programmatically preview the credit cost and planned production route for a prompt before generating.

subFeatures.name: Personalization at scale
subFeatures.description: Submit a template plus variables from a CRM, CSV or webhook — name, company, deal value — and generate thousands of personalized videos with preview and approval gates.

subFeatures.name: Lifecycle webhooks
subFeatures.description: Signed webhooks with retries fire at every render lifecycle event; bulk generation is built in.

subFeatures.name: Release-pipeline integration
subFeatures.description: Connect the API to your changelog or release process so walkthroughs and launch content refresh automatically with every ship.

subFeatures.name: Catalog and ad integrations
subFeatures.description: Wire a product catalog or CSV feed for per-SKU video and push variants directly to ad platforms.

subFeatures.name: Throughput guarantees
subFeatures.description: Priority render queues and guaranteed API throughput on higher plans.

features.name: Cost Preview & Spend Guardrails
features.tagline: Know the credit cost before you press Generate
features.description: Before any video generates, creators see an itemized credit estimate for their exact selections — tier, duration, voice tier, avatar, AI clips, dialogue scenes — next to their live balance. Hard per-run caps, tier balance checks and a full run ledger keep AI video spend predictable and auditable.

subFeatures.name: Itemized pre-flight estimate
subFeatures.description: The cost preview prices your exact configuration — tier, model, duration, voice tier, avatar, music, AI clips, dialogue mode — and shows the breakdown next to your balance.

subFeatures.name: Worst-case rows for premium add-ons
subFeatures.description: AI clips and dialogue scenes show upper-bound rows so maximum possible spend is visible before submit.

subFeatures.name: Tier balance checks
subFeatures.description: Runs are blocked up front if the balance can't realistically cover the chosen quality tier.

subFeatures.name: Per-run caps and circuit breakers
subFeatures.description: Every expensive subsystem — AI clips, vision review, best-of-N designs — carries its own hard cost cap.

subFeatures.name: Run cost ledger
subFeatures.description: Each generation records a per-stage, per-model cost breakdown reconciled into credit transactions for full auditability.

features.name: Vimotion Studio Workspace
features.tagline: A dedicated video studio workspace for your team
features.description: Vimotion is a self-contained studio environment for video teams: a dashboard organizes recent videos, assets, avatars, brand kits, reels and team members, while an onboarding wizard and guided tour get new studios productive quickly. The workspace runs on desktop and inside a mobile app shell.

subFeatures.name: Studio dashboard
subFeatures.description: A tabbed workspace — Recent videos, Assets, Avatars, Brand Kits, Reels and Team — with a desktop sidebar and mobile-friendly navigation.

subFeatures.name: Onboarding wizard
subFeatures.description: Step-by-step setup covering account type, contact details, verification, studio details and brand panel (colors, fonts, logo).

subFeatures.name: Avatar and brand kit managers
subFeatures.description: Create and edit saved presenter avatars and brand kits in dedicated panels, directly usable in every new video.

subFeatures.name: Team management
subFeatures.description: Invite and manage the studio's team members from the workspace.

subFeatures.name: Guided product tour
subFeatures.description: A built-in interactive tour and help menu walk new users through the studio and editor.

subFeatures.name: Mobile app shell
subFeatures.description: The workspace runs inside a native mobile shell, with the heavy editor reserved for desktop.

features.name: Vimotion Standalone Product & Enterprise Governance
features.tagline: A standalone video studio, from free pilot to enterprise
features.description: Vimotion also ships as a standalone product with its own signup, self-serve pricing and enterprise governance. Prospects join via waitlist or invite code, start on a free pilot video, and scale to plans with per-team approval gates, SSO, SOC 2 compliance, data residency choices and consent-governed AI — everything IT, security and procurement need to say yes.

subFeatures.name: Early access and invite codes
subFeatures.description: A public waitlist with live counter, invite codes with usage limits and redemption audit, and a funnel console to invite or reject applicants.

subFeatures.name: Verified self-serve signup
subFeatures.description: Email-OTP-verified signup with a dedicated studio login; a brief typed on the website carries through signup so the studio opens pre-loaded with the visitor's intent.

subFeatures.name: Self-serve pricing tiers
subFeatures.description: Four transparent tiers from a free pilot video to enterprise, with a public per-tier feature matrix, monthly/annual billing with proration, and invoicing/PO support on higher plans.

subFeatures.name: Render credit system
subFeatures.description: Each hero render uses one credit while social cuts from the same brief are free; unused credits roll over on paid plans.

subFeatures.name: Identity and access
subFeatures.description: SSO/SAML, automated user provisioning, role-based brand kits and an audit log accessible via console and API.

subFeatures.name: Security, compliance and residency
subFeatures.description: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, custom DPAs and indemnity terms, with US/EU data regions and deployment options up to dedicated single-tenant hosting.

subFeatures.name: AI governance
subFeatures.description: Workspace-scoped voice and avatar models, per-asset consent records with revocation, and a guarantee that customer inputs and outputs are never used for model training.

subFeatures.name: Procurement readiness
subFeatures.description: Annual invoicing, custom MSAs, line-item POs, pre-completed security questionnaires, and dedicated customer success with quarterly reviews on enterprise plans.

features.name: Vimotion Public Site & Adoption Programs
features.tagline: Try it, learn it, and earn with it — before you buy
features.description: A dedicated public website lets prospects experience Vimotion before signing up: type a video brief right on the homepage, watch real unedited output, and explore team-specific playbooks. Free browser tools, live masterclass cohorts, a tutorial library and a public changelog support adoption, while an affiliate program rewards partners who refer B2B teams.

subFeatures.name: Interactive marketing website
subFeatures.description: A homepage brief prompt that carries into the studio, a showcase wall of sample videos, a live unedited demo render, an interactive feature explorer, and honest pricing and limitations pages.

subFeatures.name: Team use-case playbooks
subFeatures.description: Eight audience-specific pages — marketing, sales, onboarding, internal comms, education and L&D, eCommerce, localization and agencies — each with worked workflows and an adoption plan.

subFeatures.name: Free browser tools
subFeatures.description: Single-purpose free utilities — caption translator, voice tone detector, thumbnail generator and transcript clipper — as a low-friction way to try the platform.

subFeatures.name: Masterclass cohorts
subFeatures.description: Quarterly live, hands-on training sessions per buyer team, taught by the product team in real workspaces.

subFeatures.name: Learning resources and changelog
subFeatures.description: A getting-started rollout guide, tutorial library, editorial blog and a public versioned changelog documenting every release.

subFeatures.name: Affiliate program
subFeatures.description: 30% recurring commission for 12 months on referred workspaces, 90-day attribution, monthly payouts and curated partner approval.

demo.intro: Follow one NEET physics topic from a plain-text prompt to a finished branded video, week of reels and localized cuts — no camera, crew or editor.

widgets.title: Create a video
widgets.subtitle: Prompt to finished MP4 — script, visuals, voiceover and captions, automatically

fields.label: Topic or brief
fields.value: Newton's Laws of Motion — open with a cricket-ball hook, for NEET 2027 Batch A

items.title: Hook — cricket ball at Wankhede
items.sub: Shot 1 · Kinetic title + AI hero clip

messages.text: Shot plan ready: 12 scenes in 3 acts, equation builds for the derivations. Approve, edit, or redirect?
Make shot 3 a step-by-step process scene instead of a chart.
Done — shot 3 is now a 4-step process build. Regenerating only that scene.

widgets.composer: Type direction for the AI Director…

widgets.title: Newton's Laws of Motion — Premium cut

items.title: "Add Tamil captions"
items.sub: Preview ready — accept, reject or refine

steps.title: Type a topic, get a finished video
steps.text: This is Vimotion, Vacademy's AI video studio. Type a brief — or paste a PDF, deck or URL — and the AI writes the script, records the voiceover, designs every animated scene and renders a branded MP4 in minutes.

steps.title: Speak to every learner, in their language
steps.text: Pick from 200+ voices across 60+ narration languages — including 9 Indian languages with 35+ authentic Indian voices — set the audience from Class 1–2 to Graduate, and choose any length from 30 seconds to 10 minutes.

steps.title: Know the cost before you generate
steps.text: An itemized credit estimate prices your exact setup — tier, duration, voice, avatar — next to your live balance, before you press Generate. Past runs sit in history, so you can reopen results or reuse their settings.

steps.title: Watch production, stage by stage
steps.text: Live progress streams through script, voiceover, storyboard and render. Pause at the script to review the narration, leave and come back, or resume a failed run from its last checkpoint without losing spend.

steps.title: Real motion design, not templates
steps.text: Scenes come from a library of 18+ animated types — equation builds, data stories, kinetic titles — across 8 visual themes. On Premium and above, an AI vision pass inspects every rendered frame for defects before it ships.

steps.title: Direct the AI like a filmmaker
steps.text: Assist Mode pauses at checkpoints you choose — concept, shot plan, narration, casting — and asks for your call in chat. Put a presenter on camera too: pick from 30+ avatars or build one from a single photo of your teacher.

steps.title: Five quality tiers, your presenter
steps.text: Trade cost for polish across Free to Super Ultra tiers. Your avatar — cloned from a photo or a 2-minute phone recording — presents lip-synced in 80+ languages, and a 2-minute audio sample clones the voice to match.

steps.title: Edit in plain English
steps.text: Rewrite one sentence and only that line is re-recorded in the same voice and spliced in. Or type instructions like "cut the intro" — the assistant shows a preview and applies a surgical patch, never a costly full regeneration.

steps.title: One lecture, a week of reels
steps.text: Point Vimotion at any long recording: a free scan scores up to 50 moments on hook strength and pacing, then renders the winners as 9:16 reels with karaoke captions, auto b-roll and silence trimming — you pay only for keepers.

steps.title: Localized into 80+ markets
steps.text: Translate the finished video into 80+ languages with frame-accurate lip sync, so it looks filmed in Tamil or Bengali — not dubbed. A brand glossary protects names like "NEET", and reviewers approve lines per market before render.

pillars.name: Automation & Workflows
pillars.tagline: Visual workflows and one-click automations across the platform
pillars.description: Automation & Workflows turns every event in your institute — an enrollment, a missed class, a payment, a new lead — into the next right action, automatically. Build sophisticated flows on a visual canvas, switch on ready-made automations with one click, or simply describe what you want and let AI draft it. Every run is logged step-by-step, so you always know exactly what was sent, to whom, and when.

features.name: Visual Workflow Builder
features.tagline: Drag-and-drop automation engine for your whole institute
features.description: A full visual builder for event-driven and scheduled automations across the platform. Drag nodes onto a canvas — triggers, data queries, filters, conditions, loops, emails, WhatsApp, push notifications, webhooks and more — wire them together, test them safely, and publish. Workflows listen to what actually happens (attendance, payments, enquiries, live classes, assessments) and fire the next move without anyone lifting a finger. Every run is logged step-by-step so you can see exactly what happened and to whom.

subFeatures.name: 35+ trigger events
subFeatures.description: Fire workflows on enrollment, re-enrollment, learner termination, lead form submission, lead opt-out, installment due, live class created/started/ended, payment success/failure, abandoned cart, subscription cancelled, membership expiry, course created, doubt raised, assignment submitted, invites, counsellor assignment, follow-ups due or overdue, lead SLA breaches, lead status changes, inbound AI calls, and assessment lifecycle events.

subFeatures.name: Scheduled workflows
subFeatures.description: Run automations on a schedule — cron expressions, intervals or day-of-month, timezone-aware, with start and end dates and next-run visibility.

subFeatures.name: 20 node types
subFeatures.description: Trigger, Query, Transform, Filter, Aggregate, Action, Send Email, Send WhatsApp, Push Notification, HTTP Request, Chatbot, Delay, If/Else, For-Each loop, Merge, Schedule Task, Update Record, Set Lead Status, Router and AI Call nodes — all in a searchable palette.

subFeatures.name: Prebuilt data queries
subFeatures.description: Ready-made lookups like batch students, live-session attendance (present and absent lists), fee installments, admin team emails, attendance reports and user contact details — no technical setup needed.

subFeatures.name: Point-and-click condition & aggregate builders
subFeatures.description: Build branching logic and data aggregations visually, with a variable picker that surfaces every value available at each step.

subFeatures.name: Template gallery with 26 use-case templates
subFeatures.description: Start from proven templates — batch emails, parent updates, lead confirmations, fee reminders, expiry checks, session recaps, assessment notifications, engagement summaries and more — each with a short question wizard.

subFeatures.name: Outgoing webhooks (Zapier, Make, Pabbly, n8n)
subFeatures.description: Send learner or cart details to any external URL on events like enrollment or abandoned checkout, with a fully configurable payload and per-course scoping.

subFeatures.name: Incoming webhook trigger
subFeatures.description: Each workflow can expose its own webhook URL, so external systems can start it directly.

subFeatures.name: Safe test runs & manual triggering
subFeatures.description: Test-run a workflow before publishing, or fire it on demand outside its schedule — with clear warnings before real messages go out.

subFeatures.name: Pre-publish validation
subFeatures.description: Built-in validation catches misconfigured steps with errors and warnings before anything goes live.

subFeatures.name: Execution history & step-by-step logs
subFeatures.description: Every run appears in a history tab with summary cards (total, completed, failed, success rate, average duration), a visual execution flow, a timeline, and per-node logs including messages sent and any errors.

subFeatures.name: Duplicate-safe delivery
subFeatures.description: Built-in safeguards ensure a learner never receives the same automated message twice for the same event.

subFeatures.name: Workflow management
subFeatures.description: Search and list all workflows (event-driven vs scheduled), edit them on the canvas, pause or deactivate with full history preserved, and view a simplified diagram of any automation.

features.name: AI-Assisted Workflow Creation
features.tagline: Describe the automation — AI drafts the workflow
features.description: Type your goal in plain language — 'email parents every Friday with attendance' — and AI drafts a complete, ready-to-review workflow on the canvas. It asks clarifying questions when needed, explains its reasoning step-by-step, and flags anything that needs your attention. Nothing goes live until you review and publish.

subFeatures.name: Plain-language drafting
subFeatures.description: Describe what you want; the AI picks the right triggers, data queries, templates and actions and assembles the flow for you.

subFeatures.name: Clarifying questions
subFeatures.description: When your goal is ambiguous — which batch? which template? — the AI asks targeted follow-up questions and re-drafts.

subFeatures.name: Step-by-step rationale
subFeatures.description: Every draft comes with an explanation of why each step exists, so you can trust it and tweak it confidently.

subFeatures.name: Human review before publish
subFeatures.description: Drafts load into the visual builder for full review and editing — an admin always makes the final call to publish.

subFeatures.name: Same validation as hand-built workflows
subFeatures.description: AI drafts run through the standard validation checks, surfacing errors and warnings inline before going live.

features.name: One-Click Automations Library
features.tagline: Switch on ready-made automations — no builder required
features.description: A curated library of plug-and-play automations organised by what they do for learners, parents and your own team. Each one is a plain-language toggle: pick a template (or use a provided sample), answer one or two simple questions, and it's live. Behind the scenes each recipe creates a full workflow you can inspect or extend later.

subFeatures.name: Audience & lead automations
subFeatures.description: Instant welcome email on form submission, opt-out confirmations, immediate nurture and second-touch emails, and follow-ups sent a set number of days after a lead submits.

subFeatures.name: Course announcements
subFeatures.description: Automatically announce a newly published course to learners in chosen batches — built-in cross-sell.

subFeatures.name: Live class automations
subFeatures.description: 'We're live now' alerts when a class starts, invites when one is scheduled, post-class follow-ups, and separate recap emails for learners who attended versus those who missed.

subFeatures.name: Enrollment & onboarding
subFeatures.description: Welcome emails with login credentials on enrollment, welcome-back emails on re-enrollment, sub-organisation member welcomes, and access-removed notices.

subFeatures.name: Payments & fees automations
subFeatures.description: Daily fee-due reminders, instant payment-success receipts, payment-failed emails with retry links, and abandoned-checkout nudges.

subFeatures.name: Membership & renewal automations
subFeatures.description: Scheduled expiry scans with configurable notice periods, renewal nudges when a plan enters its renewal window, cancellation win-back emails, and termination notices.

subFeatures.name: Attendance & engagement reports
subFeatures.description: Scheduled attendance reports across all batches, per-learner engagement summaries, and weekly attendance updates.

subFeatures.name: Parent update automations
subFeatures.description: Tell parents whether their child attended each live class, plus scheduled weekly attendance roll-ups.

subFeatures.name: Admin team alerts
subFeatures.description: Email your team on every new enrollment, payment success or failure, new lead, new course, new doubt raised, assignment submission, and post-class attendance summaries.

subFeatures.name: Assessment notifications
subFeatures.description: Notify a batch when an assessment is published and remind them when the assessment window opens.

subFeatures.name: Guided configuration
subFeatures.description: Each recipe asks only friendly questions — which template, which batch, what time, how many days — with sample email templates offered when you have none.

subFeatures.name: Toggle on and off with confidence
subFeatures.description: Automations show as simple switches; turning one off pauses the underlying workflow with all history preserved.

features.name: WhatsApp Chatbot Flow Builder
features.tagline: Build WhatsApp bots that qualify leads while you sleep
features.description: A visual drag-and-drop builder for automated WhatsApp conversations. Trigger flows on keywords or events, send messages, templates or interactive button menus, branch on replies, trigger platform workflows mid-chat, and hand over to AI for free-form conversation. Every conversation is recorded as a session, with live inspection and analytics to show how each flow performs.

subFeatures.name: Nine node types
subFeatures.description: Build flows from Trigger, Send Message, Send Template, Send Interactive, Condition, Workflow Action, Delay, HTTP Webhook and AI Response nodes connected on a visual canvas.

subFeatures.name: Six trigger types
subFeatures.description: Start flows on keyword match (contains or exact), first contact from a new number, button reply, enrollment events, form submissions, or engagement-threshold events.

subFeatures.name: Free-form messaging
subFeatures.description: Send text, images, videos or documents inside the 24-hour conversation window — no template approval needed.

subFeatures.name: Approved template sends
subFeatures.description: Send pre-approved WhatsApp templates with body parameters, header media and buttons.

subFeatures.name: Interactive buttons & lists
subFeatures.description: Send tappable button menus and list pickers to guide users through choices.

subFeatures.name: Conditional branching & personalisation
subFeatures.description: Branch the conversation on the user's reply or resolved variables, with a default fallback path; personalisation variables are substituted throughout the flow.

subFeatures.name: AI-powered replies
subFeatures.description: Hand the conversation to AI for natural, free-form answers to open-ended questions inside the flow.

subFeatures.name: Workflow actions & external webhooks
subFeatures.description: Trigger any platform workflow from inside a chat — create a lead, enroll a learner, send an email — or call an external URL mid-conversation to fetch or push data.

subFeatures.name: Timed delays
subFeatures.description: Pause a flow for minutes or hours (for example, follow up after 24 hours) with a scheduler that reliably resumes where it left off.

subFeatures.name: Variable capture to lead fields
subFeatures.description: Map chat answers into lead fields — name, email, mobile, city and more — plus custom fields and session variables, building a lead record straight from the conversation.

subFeatures.name: Session viewer & tracking
subFeatures.description: Every user's journey through a flow is a session with a clear status (active, completed, timed-out or error), browsable message-by-message.

subFeatures.name: Flow analytics
subFeatures.description: Per-flow and institute-wide analytics on sessions and completions show exactly how each bot performs.

subFeatures.name: Flow lifecycle management
subFeatures.description: Draft, activate, deactivate, duplicate, archive and edit flows, with everything listed in one place.

subFeatures.name: Works with your WhatsApp provider
subFeatures.description: Flows run transparently over the institute's connected WhatsApp provider.

features.name: Audience Messaging & Drip Automation
features.tagline: Message an entire lead list in one send
features.description: Send WhatsApp, email or push messages to everyone in a campaign audience, with template variables auto-filled from each lead's form answers and filters to narrow the recipient list. A full history of what was sent to each audience is kept, and leads who opt out are handled automatically — including a polite goodbye sequence.

subFeatures.name: Multi-channel sends
subFeatures.description: Choose WhatsApp (template-based with language selection), email (utility or promotional, with subject and rich body), push notification or in-app alert.

subFeatures.name: Variable mapping
subFeatures.description: Map template variables to lead fields so every message is personalised automatically.

subFeatures.name: Recipient filtering
subFeatures.description: Narrow a send by lead source, submission date range or custom-field values instead of blasting the whole list.

subFeatures.name: Communication history
subFeatures.description: A per-campaign log of every message sent, and per-lead communication history right in the lead drawer.

subFeatures.name: Opt-out management
subFeatures.description: Leads who reply STOP or tap opt-out are moved to an opt-out list immediately; silent leads can be auto-opted-out by an inactivity scanner.

subFeatures.name: Opt-out goodbye drip
subFeatures.description: A polite goodbye sequence goes out on opt-out — immediate for explicit opt-outs, next morning for inactivity — with a second message two days later.

subFeatures.name: Suppression everywhere
subFeatures.description: Opted-out and deleted leads are excluded from every future recipient list automatically.

features.name: Automated Engagement Nudges
features.tagline: Automatically re-engage learners who go quiet
features.description: Configure inactivity triggers that automatically send a WhatsApp message when a learner or lead hasn't engaged for a chosen period. Rules can be scoped to a batch or the whole institute, chained so a nudge only fires after a previous message, and paired with audience filters that find inactive users ready for a campaign.

subFeatures.name: Inactivity thresholds
subFeatures.description: Define a time threshold — cumulative or since last activity — after which a chosen template is sent automatically to the inactive contact.

subFeatures.name: Sequenced nudges
subFeatures.description: Require that a previous message was already sent before the next nudge fires, enabling drip-style re-engagement sequences.

subFeatures.name: Inactive-audience filters
subFeatures.description: Find inactive users, inactive phone numbers, users at a specific point in a message sequence, or users by the messages they have or haven't received — ready to target with a campaign.

subFeatures.name: Real engagement signals
subFeatures.description: Learner activity events are logged continuously, so triggers evaluate on real usage rather than guesswork.

subFeatures.name: Per-batch or institute-wide scope
subFeatures.description: Each trigger rule is scoped to a specific batch or the whole institute and can be switched on or off independently.

demo.intro: Watch a fee-reminder automation go from a visual canvas to messages on a parent's phone — and the run log that proves it all happened.

widgets.title: Daily Fee Reminder
widgets.subtitle: Scheduled · Every day, 9:00 AM IST · Next run in 14h

children.label: Query — Fee installments due in 3 days
Send Email — reminder with payment link

messages.text: Remind parents on WhatsApp 3 days before a fee installment is due
Drafted a 5-node workflow: daily schedule → fee-installments query → unpaid filter → WhatsApp + email. Which batches should it cover — all, or NEET 2027 Batch A only?

items.title: Live class alerts
items.sub: 'We're live now' + separate recaps for absentees

items.title: Parent updates
items.sub: Attended vs missed, weekly attendance roll-ups

items.title: Membership renewals
items.sub: Expiry scans, renewal nudges, win-back emails

Fee reminder — ₹12,500 due 20 Jul · invoice and payment link attached

Send Email × 44
