steps.title: Every event becomes the next action
steps.text: Vacademy's workflow engine listens to 35+ events — enrollments, payments, missed classes, new leads — and fires the right response automatically. This flow chases unpaid fee installments every morning.

steps.title: Wire it up on a visual canvas
steps.text: Drag from 20 node types — triggers, queries, If/Else branches, loops, delays, WhatsApp, email, push, webhooks — and connect them. Prebuilt lookups like 'fee installments due' mean zero technical setup.

steps.title: Or describe it — AI drafts the flow
steps.text: Type your goal in plain language and AI assembles the whole workflow, asking clarifying questions — which batch? which template? — and explaining every step. Nothing goes live until you review and publish.

steps.title: Test safely before anything goes live
steps.text: Run a safe test with clear warnings before real messages go out. Pre-publish validation flags misconfigured steps, and duplicate-safe delivery ensures no one ever gets the same message twice for one event.

steps.title: 26 automations, ready to switch on
steps.text: No canvas needed — the curated library covers live class alerts, parent updates, enrollment welcomes with login credentials, renewal nudges and admin team alerts. Each recipe is a full workflow you can open and extend later.

steps.title: Fee follow-ups in one click
steps.text: Flip a switch and answer one or two friendly questions — which template, what time, how many days before due. Daily reminders, payment receipts and failed-payment retry links start running immediately.

steps.title: The right message, on every channel
steps.text: At 9:00 AM the run finds Rohan's unpaid ₹12,500 installment and reaches his parent on WhatsApp, email and push — template variables filled from his record, with a secure payment link in each message.

steps.title: Every run, on the record
steps.text: The history tab logs each execution with recipients, status and duration — plus summary cards for runs, success rate and average time. When a parent says 'I never got it', you have the receipt.

steps.title: Drill into any run, node by node
steps.text: Open a run to see the execution flow step by step: what the query found, exactly which messages went out, and what failed and why — like the one bounced email here — so nothing is a black box.

pillars.name: Finance & Payments
pillars.tagline: Fees, invoices, subscriptions and 6+ payment gateways
pillars.description: Vacademy Finance & Payments handles every way an education business collects money — online course sales, recurring subscriptions, school-style fee installments, and front-office cash collection — with the funds settling directly into your own payment gateway account. Branded tax-compliant invoicing, shareable payment links, self-service learner billing and audited fee adjustments replace a patchwork of gateway dashboards, billing tools and spreadsheets with one connected system.

features.name: Payment Gateway Integrations
features.tagline: Your gateway, your money — connected in minutes
features.description: Connect the payment gateway your institute already uses and collect money directly into your own account — Vacademy never sits between you and your funds. Six gateways are supported out of the box, each with guided credential entry, copy-paste webhook URLs and automatic payment verification. Manage, edit and deactivate gateways any time.

subFeatures.name: Stripe
subFeatures.description: Accept international card payments with your own API keys, including saved cards and recurring charges. An optional webhook signing secret verifies every payment callback.

subFeatures.name: Razorpay
subFeatures.description: India's most popular gateway for UPI, cards, netbanking and wallets, with guided setup for key ID, key secret and webhook secret.

subFeatures.name: PhonePe
subFeatures.description: PhonePe Standard Checkout for Indian merchants — UPI, cards and wallets with INR settlement, live and sandbox environments, and credential-secured webhooks.

subFeatures.name: Cashfree
subFeatures.description: Cashfree Payments for India with hosted checkout and automatic payment-status callbacks.

subFeatures.name: eWAY
subFeatures.description: eWAY for Australian and international merchants, including tokenized recurring payments and automatic payment-status polling.

subFeatures.name: PayPal
subFeatures.description: Accept international payments through PayPal.

subFeatures.name: Guided gateway setup
subFeatures.description: Step-by-step, provider-specific setup inside Settings — field-by-field help, links to each provider's dashboard, and the exact webhook URL to paste in so payment statuses sync automatically.

subFeatures.name: Secure webhook verification
subFeatures.description: Incoming payment confirmations are signature-verified per gateway; failed callbacks are logged and can be reprocessed so no payment is ever lost.

subFeatures.name: Real-time payment status checks
subFeatures.description: Live order-status lookup against the gateway ensures a payer's screen always reflects the true outcome, even if a confirmation callback is delayed.

subFeatures.name: Gateway lifecycle management
subFeatures.description: View configured gateways, edit credentials, refresh status and deactivate a gateway at any time.

features.name: Flexible Payment Plans
features.tagline: Free, one-time, subscription, installment or donation — price it your way
features.description: Sell every course or batch under the pricing model that fits it: free access, one-time payments, recurring subscriptions, multi-installment fee plans or pay-what-you-want donations. Build payment options once, attach them to batches or enrollment invites as the default or a per-batch preference, and learners automatically see the right checkout.

subFeatures.name: Free enrollment plans
subFeatures.description: Open a course at no charge, optionally with a validity period after which access expires.

subFeatures.name: One-time (upfront) payment
subFeatures.description: A single payment for access, with validity configurable in days or months and an optional strike-through 'was' price to show savings.

subFeatures.name: Subscriptions with custom intervals
subFeatures.description: Recurring plans with any billing intervals you define (e.g. 1/3/6/12 months), each with its own title, price and feature checklist on the plan card.

subFeatures.name: Donation plans
subFeatures.description: Let supporters pay what they want — configure suggested amounts, an optional minimum, and whether custom amounts are allowed.

subFeatures.name: Installment fee plans
subFeatures.description: Attach a multi-installment, school-style fee structure (tuition, admission, transport and more) as the payment option for a batch.

subFeatures.name: Plan-level discounts
subFeatures.description: Configure discounts directly on a plan — for example longer-commitment pricing — so the reduced price is what learners see at checkout.

subFeatures.name: Enrollment approval gate
subFeatures.description: Optionally require admin approval before a paid or free enrollment goes live.

subFeatures.name: Default and preferred plans
subFeatures.description: Mark one payment option as the institute default and set preferred options per batch; checkout picks the right one automatically.

subFeatures.name: Multi-member plans
subFeatures.description: Plans can carry a member count for family and group enrollments.

subFeatures.name: Plan descriptions, tags and feature lists
subFeatures.description: Each plan supports a marketing description, tag and feature list that render on public plan cards.

subFeatures.name: Checkout previews
subFeatures.description: Live previews show subscription and donation plans exactly as learners will see them before you publish.

subFeatures.name: Plan library management
subFeatures.description: Edit, list and safely delete payment plans from one place.

features.name: Subscriptions & Auto-Pay
features.tagline: Recurring revenue with automatic off-session charging
features.description: Recurring plans charge learners automatically when each period renews, using saved payment mandates on Stripe, Razorpay or eWAY. Learners manage their own memberships and cards; admins can see and change any learner's plan status at any time.

subFeatures.name: Payment mandates
subFeatures.description: A saved, provider-agnostic auto-pay authorization per subscription charges renewals without the learner returning to checkout.

subFeatures.name: Charge cap protection
subFeatures.description: Every mandate carries a maximum amount derived from the plan, enforced before each recurring charge as an extra safety layer.

subFeatures.name: Mandate lifecycle states
subFeatures.description: Mandates move through Pending, Active, Paused, Revoked and Failed states, so admins always know why a renewal did or didn't charge.

subFeatures.name: Learner self-service cancellation
subFeatures.description: Learners can view their active memberships and cancel a subscription themselves from their account.

subFeatures.name: Admin plan management
subFeatures.description: List every learner plan, change plan status (Active, Pending Payment, Payment Failed, Canceled, Expired, Terminated), or cancel on a learner's behalf.

subFeatures.name: Membership details view
subFeatures.description: Per-learner membership lookup showing the plan, validity window, payment option and full payment history behind it.

subFeatures.name: Expiry and re-enrollment policies
subFeatures.description: Configurable policies define what happens when a plan expires, including re-enrollment rules and follow-up actions.

subFeatures.name: Saved card updates
subFeatures.description: Learners can securely replace the card on file and update billing details without contacting the institute.

features.name: School Fee Structures
features.tagline: Real school fees: heads, installments, penalties, approvals
features.description: Model true school-style fees with multiple fee heads — tuition, admission, transport, hostel, mess, sports and any custom types — each with its own amount, installment schedule and rules. Structures pass through a maker-checker approval before use and attach directly to batches, so every new admission inherits the right fee plan automatically.

subFeatures.name: Custom fee type catalog
subFeatures.description: Define any number of fee heads with name, code and description (Tuition, Admission, Transport, Hostel, Mess, Sports, Exam and more) and reuse them across fee plans.

subFeatures.name: Per-fee installment schedules
subFeatures.description: Each fee head can be paid in full or split into numbered installments, each with its own amount, start/end dates and due date.

subFeatures.name: Installment plan templates
subFeatures.description: Ready-made Monthly, Quarterly, Term-wise and Annual structures, editable to your academic calendar, with one plan markable as the institute default.

subFeatures.name: Late-payment penalties
subFeatures.description: Mark a fee head as penalty-bearing with a configurable penalty percentage for overdue installments.

subFeatures.name: Refundable flags
subFeatures.description: Tag fee heads such as caution money as refundable for correct accounting.

subFeatures.name: Built-in discounts
subFeatures.description: Apply a percentage or flat discount to a fee head, keeping both the original and discounted amounts on record.

subFeatures.name: Maker-checker approval
subFeatures.description: Fee structures record who created them and require a separate approval step before going live.

subFeatures.name: Batch linking
subFeatures.description: Attach a fee structure to one or more batches or enrollment invites so new admissions automatically inherit the right fee plan.

subFeatures.name: Fee-type priority ordering
subFeatures.description: Set an institute-wide priority order of fee heads that controls how incoming payments are allocated across dues.

subFeatures.name: Edit and retire safely
subFeatures.description: Update structures and fee types or retire a structure without losing historical payment records.

features.name: Fee Collection Desk
features.tagline: Front-office counter for cash, cheque, UPI and card
features.description: A guided four-step counter workflow for office staff: find the student, pick the installments being paid, record the payment, and hand over the receipt. Built for offline payments — cash, cheque, UPI or card — with automatic receipt generation on the spot.

subFeatures.name: Student search
subFeatures.description: Find any student instantly by name or details as the first step of collection.

subFeatures.name: Installment selection
subFeatures.description: See all pending and overdue installments across fee heads and choose exactly which ones this payment covers.

subFeatures.name: Offline payment modes
subFeatures.description: Record Cash, Cheque, UPI or Card payments with a reference number and a free-text note.

subFeatures.name: Smart payment allocation
subFeatures.description: An allocation engine spreads a lump-sum payment across dues by fee-type priority — with overdue-only, upcoming-only or all-dues scopes — or allocate to specific installments manually.

subFeatures.name: Instant receipts
subFeatures.description: A fee receipt is generated on the spot with a download link, and past receipts remain downloadable per installment.

subFeatures.name: On-the-spot adjustments
subFeatures.description: Apply a concession or penalty during collection, routed through the approval workflow, before confirming the payment.

subFeatures.name: Confirmation and success summary
subFeatures.description: A confirmation dialog recaps amounts before recording, followed by a success screen with receipt and invoice actions.

features.name: Student Fee Ledger
features.tagline: Every student's fee position in one searchable table
features.description: A master view of every student's fee status — expected, paid, due, overdue and waived amounts with a visual collection progress bar per student. Drill into any row for the full installment schedule, receipts and payment ledger, and act on a student's fees straight from their profile.

subFeatures.name: Status at a glance
subFeatures.description: Each student is flagged Paid, Partial, Pending or Overdue with color-coded badges and a collection progress bar.

subFeatures.name: Search and filters
subFeatures.description: Filter the ledger by course, fee plan, status and more, with expandable rows showing per-fee-head detail.

subFeatures.name: Installment drill-down
subFeatures.description: See every installment with amounts, due dates, payments applied, adjustments and remaining balance.

subFeatures.name: Receipts history
subFeatures.description: List and download all fee receipts and invoice receipts for any student.

subFeatures.name: Per-student fee tools
subFeatures.description: From a student's profile, staff can view payment history, edit that student's installment plan, apply a plan-level discount, record an offline payment and generate an invoice.

subFeatures.name: Learner self-view
subFeatures.description: Learners can check their own dues and receipts and pay pending installments from their app.

features.name: Concessions & Penalties with Approval Workflow
features.tagline: Discretionary fee changes, fully audited and approved
features.description: Staff can propose a concession (fee waiver) or penalty on any installment, but nothing takes effect until an authorized approver signs off. Every request, approval, rejection and retraction is kept in a permanent, searchable audit trail.

subFeatures.name: Concession requests
subFeatures.description: Reduce a student's installment by a chosen amount with a reason; the request is validated against the expected amount and queued for approval.

subFeatures.name: Penalty application
subFeatures.description: Add late-fee penalties to an installment, either manually or from the fee plan's configured penalty percentage.

subFeatures.name: Pending approvals queue
subFeatures.description: A dedicated Adjustment Approvals page lists every pending request with student, amount, type and requester for one-click approve or reject.

subFeatures.name: Retraction
subFeatures.description: Requesters can withdraw a pending adjustment before it is reviewed.

subFeatures.name: Full adjustment history
subFeatures.description: Per-installment and institute-wide history of every adjustment event — submitted, approved, rejected, retracted — with who did what and when.

features.name: Invoicing
features.tagline: Branded invoices — automatic on payment or raised on demand
features.description: Every successful payment can generate a professional PDF invoice automatically, and admins can raise invoices manually for anything else — for one learner or in bulk — with live preview, taxes, payment links and reminders. Invoices are delivered by email and payable online.

subFeatures.name: Automatic invoice on payment
subFeatures.description: A branded PDF invoice is generated and emailed automatically after each successful online payment, including multi-course orders.

subFeatures.name: Manual invoice creation
subFeatures.description: Raise an invoice for any learner with free-form line items (description, quantity, unit price), currency, due date, custom invoice date and notes.

subFeatures.name: Bulk invoicing
subFeatures.description: Create the same invoice for many learners at once — each gets their own numbered invoice and payment link.

subFeatures.name: Live preview before sending
subFeatures.description: A pixel-accurate preview shows exactly what the learner will receive, with editable fields grouped by section.

subFeatures.name: Editable details
subFeatures.description: Override invoice number, customer name and address, institute details, tax label, place of supply and notes per invoice; totals are always computed, never editable.

subFeatures.name: Per-invoice tax control
subFeatures.description: Tax defaults from institute settings but can be switched off for an individual invoice.

subFeatures.name: Payment link per invoice
subFeatures.description: Every invoice gets a shareable payment link — copy it, email it, or send it over WhatsApp directly from the success screen.

subFeatures.name: Mark paid manually
subFeatures.description: Record an offline settlement against an invoice, with payment details, so books stay accurate.

subFeatures.name: Void with reason
subFeatures.description: Void an incorrect invoice with a recorded reason instead of deleting history.

subFeatures.name: Duplicate invoice
subFeatures.description: Clone a past invoice's line items, currency and notes into a new one; tax re-defaults from current settings for safety.

subFeatures.name: Payment reminders
subFeatures.description: Send a reminder email for any unpaid invoice or overdue installment with one click.

subFeatures.name: PDF download and regeneration
subFeatures.description: Download any invoice PDF at any time; expired links are regenerated automatically.

subFeatures.name: Invoice lists and search
subFeatures.description: Browse all invoices institute-wide or per learner; learners see their own invoices too.

features.name: Invoice Branding, Templates & Tax Settings
features.tagline: Your logo, your numbering, your country's taxes
features.description: Control exactly how invoices look and how tax is applied. Pick and customize invoice templates with your branding, set your country, tax registration details and tax components, and choose how invoice emails reach payers — so every invoice is compliant out of the box.

subFeatures.name: Template gallery
subFeatures.description: Choose from ready-made invoice templates and customize them; templates use placeholders like invoice number, line items, tax components and institute logo.

subFeatures.name: Institute branding
subFeatures.description: Invoices carry your institute logo, name and address automatically.

subFeatures.name: Country and currency defaults
subFeatures.description: Set your billing country and default invoice currency once; all new invoices inherit them.

subFeatures.name: Custom tax label and components
subFeatures.description: Name your tax (GST, VAT, Sales Tax) and split it into components with individual rates — e.g. CGST 9% + SGST 9% — that render as a tax table on the invoice, with different components possible per package type.

subFeatures.name: Tax registration fields
subFeatures.description: Store your GSTIN/tax ID, HSN/SAC code and place of supply so invoices meet local requirements.

subFeatures.name: Invoice email placement
subFeatures.description: Choose whether the PDF arrives in a dedicated invoice email or attached to the payment-confirmation email.

subFeatures.name: Internal notification recipients
subFeatures.description: Pick which admins are notified about invoice events.

features.name: Payment Links & Public Checkout
features.tagline: Anyone can pay from a link — no login needed
features.description: Share a link and get paid. Public, branded payment pages let learners, parents or guests pay an invoice, settle fee installments, or buy a course through a stepped catalogue-to-cart-to-payment flow — all without signing in, with live payment-status tracking and a clear result screen. Every signup captures campaign attribution automatically.

subFeatures.name: Public invoice payment page
subFeatures.description: Each invoice link opens a mobile-friendly page showing the institute's logo, invoice details and line items, with a pay button that launches the configured gateway.

subFeatures.name: Guest fee payment
subFeatures.description: Fee dues and full installment schedules can be viewed and paid through open links — ideal for parents paying school fees without an account.

subFeatures.name: Stepped course checkout
subFeatures.description: Visitors move through catalogue, cart and payment steps with a clear progress indicator; the starting step is set by the page owner.

subFeatures.name: Coupon entry at checkout
subFeatures.description: Buyers apply coupon codes that are validated live and reflected in the payable amount.

subFeatures.name: Enroll multiple learners at once
subFeatures.description: A multi-enroll form captures several learners — for example siblings — in one transaction.

subFeatures.name: Custom fields at signup
subFeatures.description: Any custom fields configured on the page are collected and stored with the enrollment or lead.

subFeatures.name: Automatic campaign attribution
subFeatures.description: UTM source, medium, campaign, content and term on the link are captured and attributed to the resulting lead or enrollment.

subFeatures.name: Instant account and access
subFeatures.description: Successful checkout enrolls the learner into the mapped courses immediately, with a configurable success page and login access to start learning.

subFeatures.name: Universal payment result page
subFeatures.description: After checkout, payers land on a result screen that confirms success, failure or cancellation, polling the gateway for the final status.

subFeatures.name: Multi-gateway checkout
subFeatures.description: The same public flow works across Stripe, Razorpay, PhonePe, Cashfree, eWAY and PayPal based on the institute's configuration.

subFeatures.name: Share via WhatsApp or email
subFeatures.description: Payment links can be copied or sent over WhatsApp or email straight from the admin screens that generate them.

features.name: Learner Payment Center & In-App Checkout
features.tagline: Learners see, manage and pay everything themselves
features.description: Learners and parents get self-service access to their entire financial relationship with the institute: enrolling and paying in-app under any plan type, tracking dues and installments, downloading receipts and invoices, and managing memberships and saved cards — on web, mobile and desktop.

subFeatures.name: Checkout for every plan type
subFeatures.description: Free enrollment, one-time purchase, subscription and donation checkouts, each with clear confirmation, success, pending and failure dialogs.

subFeatures.name: Approval-based enrollment
subFeatures.description: Courses that require institute approval show a pending-approval dialog with automatic status polling and a success dialog once approved.

subFeatures.name: Enroll by invite
subFeatures.description: Learners enroll through invite links sent by the institute, with a guided form and payment step where applicable.

subFeatures.name: Gateway-matched payment experience
subFeatures.description: Checkout adapts to the institute's gateway — inline card, hosted modal or redirect — across Stripe, Razorpay, PhonePe, Cashfree and eWAY, with a result page that routes redirect payments back into the course.

subFeatures.name: Live payment status polling
subFeatures.description: After paying, the app polls payment status and moves the learner from pending to success automatically — no manual refresh.

subFeatures.name: Coupon codes at checkout
subFeatures.description: Learners apply coupon codes during checkout with instant validation.

subFeatures.name: My dues
subFeatures.description: Pending and overdue installments across all fee heads, with amounts and due dates, payable online without visiting the office.

subFeatures.name: My receipts and invoices
subFeatures.description: Download past fee receipts and invoices anytime, and pay institute-issued invoices from a link.

subFeatures.name: Membership management
subFeatures.description: View active subscriptions and plans with validity, and cancel a recurring plan when needed.

subFeatures.name: Saved payment method and billing details
subFeatures.description: View the card on file, replace it securely, and keep billing name and address up to date for receipts.

subFeatures.name: Payment history and expiry visibility
subFeatures.description: A record of past payments with statuses and references, plus a list of enrollments nearing expiry so learners can renew in time.

features.name: Multi-Currency Pricing
features.tagline: Charge in 16 currencies with correct local formatting
features.description: Price courses, plans and invoices in the payer's currency. The platform supports 16 charge currencies and handles each one's symbol, formatting and minor-unit rules — including zero-decimal currencies like yen — correctly across checkout, invoices and reports.

subFeatures.name: 16 charge currencies
subFeatures.description: USD, EUR, GBP, INR, AED, SAR, QAR, AUD, CAD, SGD, HKD, NZD, CHF, JPY, ZAR and MYR available anywhere a price is set.

subFeatures.name: Per-currency prices
subFeatures.description: Payment plans and coupons carry explicit prices per currency rather than converted approximations.

subFeatures.name: Correct minor-unit handling
subFeatures.description: Gateways are charged in exact minor units per currency — paise, cents, zero-decimal yen — eliminating rounding surprises.

subFeatures.name: Localized symbols everywhere
subFeatures.description: Every dashboard, invoice and checkout screen renders the right currency symbol and formatting automatically.

subFeatures.name: Institute default currency
subFeatures.description: Set your default currency once and all new plans and invoices inherit it.

features.name: Per-Learner Price Markdowns
features.tagline: Case-by-case pricing without touching the public plan
features.description: Give an individual enrollment a special price without editing the published plan. Apply a percentage or fixed-amount markdown to a plan for specific enrollment links, look up current markdowns before quoting a family, and reset back to standard pricing at any time.

subFeatures.name: Percent or absolute markdowns
subFeatures.description: Reduce a plan's price by a percentage or a fixed amount for targeted enrollment invites.

subFeatures.name: Markdown lookup
subFeatures.description: Query which plans currently carry markdowns and by how much before quoting a price.

subFeatures.name: One-click reset
subFeatures.description: Remove a markdown and restore the standard published price instantly.

subFeatures.name: Enrollment-invite discounts
subFeatures.description: Attach discount options directly to specific enrollment invites so a particular admission link carries its own pricing.

features.name: Coupons & Discount Codes
features.tagline: Discount codes with caps, scopes and email locks
features.description: Create discount coupons that apply at any checkout: percentage or flat discounts with an optional maximum cap, usable institute-wide or scoped to specific courses and invite links, with usage limits and optional restriction to named email addresses. Coupon-driven promotions and campaigns pair with the Marketing & Website tools.

subFeatures.name: Coupon codes
subFeatures.description: Custom codes (e.g. SAVE20) with configurable percentage or flat discount value.

subFeatures.name: Maximum discount cap
subFeatures.description: Cap the monetary value of percentage discounts.

subFeatures.name: Usage limits
subFeatures.description: Limit total redemptions or leave a coupon unlimited.

subFeatures.name: Scope control
subFeatures.description: Run coupons institute-wide or scope them to specific courses or invite links.

subFeatures.name: Email-restricted coupons
subFeatures.description: Restrict a coupon to specific email addresses — perfect for negotiated or alumni discounts.

subFeatures.name: Live validation at checkout
subFeatures.description: Coupons are validated instantly at public and in-app checkout, with the discount reflected in the payable amount.

demo.intro: Follow the money — from the admin's fee collection dashboard to a parent paying an installment by UPI on their phone.

widgets.subtitle: Fee structure · 4 fee heads · attached to 2 batches
