steps.title: Every rupee, one dashboard
steps.text: Online course sales, school-style installments and front-office cash all land in one finance view. Money settles directly into your own gateway account — Stripe, Razorpay, PhonePe, Cashfree, eWAY or PayPal — never Vacademy's.

steps.title: Know exactly who hasn't paid
steps.text: The student fee ledger flags everyone Paid, Partial, Pending or Overdue with a collection progress bar. Filter by course, fee plan or status and drill into any student's full installment schedule.

steps.title: A real counter for offline payments
steps.text: The Fee Collection Desk is a guided four-step counter flow: find the student, pick installments, record cash, cheque, UPI or card — and a receipt is generated on the spot with a download link.

steps.title: School fees the way schools work
steps.text: Model fee heads like Tuition, Admission, Transport or Hostel — each with its own installment schedule, late-payment penalty percentage, refundable flag and built-in discounts. Templates cover Monthly, Quarterly, Term-wise and Annual.

steps.title: Maker-checker, then auto-inherit
steps.text: Structures need a separate approver before going live, and every concession or penalty later runs through the same audited approval queue. Attach the plan to batches so each new admission inherits the right fees automatically.

steps.title: Tax-compliant invoices, your brand
steps.text: Every online payment can auto-generate a branded PDF invoice, or raise one manually — even in bulk — with a pixel-accurate preview. GST splits like CGST 9% + SGST 9% render as a proper tax table with your GSTIN and place of supply.

steps.title: A payment link on every invoice
steps.text: Each invoice carries a shareable public payment page — no login needed to pay. Send it by email or WhatsApp, fire one-click reminders for unpaid invoices, and mark offline settlements paid so books stay accurate.

steps.title: Parents see dues, not spreadsheets
steps.text: Learners and parents check pending and overdue installments across all fee heads right in the app — with amounts, due dates and past receipts — and pay online without visiting the office.

steps.title: Checkout that matches your gateway
steps.text: The pay flow adapts to your configured gateway — UPI, cards, netbanking and wallets via Razorpay or PhonePe, international cards via Stripe. Coupon codes like SIBLING10 validate live and adjust the payable amount instantly.

steps.title: Confirmed, receipted, reconciled
steps.text: The app polls the gateway for the true payment status — no manual refresh — then issues the receipt and emails the invoice automatically. Webhooks are signature-verified, so no payment is ever lost or double-counted.

pillars.name: Institute ERP, HR & Operations
pillars.tagline: Enrollment, batches, branches, staff and payroll — run the institute
pillars.description: Run the entire institute — not just the teaching — from one platform. This pillar covers the operational backbone: a complete learner directory with every enrollment tool from single admissions to 10,000-row bulk imports, batch and session structures with live seat inventory, automated renewals, branch and franchise management, parent engagement, and a full HR suite spanning staff attendance, leave, approvals and payroll. Everything your registrar, HR team and branch managers do daily, unified with your academics.

features.name: Learner Directory & Profiles
features.tagline: Every learner — searchable, filterable, fully profiled
features.description: A central directory of every learner in the institute with fast search, deep filtering and a detailed profile panel for each person. Admins see enrollment details, contact and guardian info, custom fields, payment status and learning progress in one place, and can export any view to CSV.

subFeatures.name: Server-side search with auto-suggest
subFeatures.description: Paginated learner table with name search and type-ahead suggestions, scoped to your institute and academic session.

subFeatures.name: Rich filtering
subFeatures.description: Filter by batch, status (active, inactive, invited, pending approval), gender, session expiry window, payment status, approval status, abandoned cart, sub-organization, sub-org role and any custom field.

subFeatures.name: Side-panel profile
subFeatures.description: Open any learner's full profile — personal details, batch memberships, custom fields, payment plan and enrollment history — without leaving the list.

subFeatures.name: Learning progress drill-down
subFeatures.description: See study progress per subject, module, chapter and slide, including video watch percentage, pages read, quiz and assignment completion, and last activity.

subFeatures.name: Custom field values per learner
subFeatures.description: View and edit institute-defined custom fields captured at enrollment for each learner.

subFeatures.name: Edit learner details
subFeatures.description: Update a learner's name, contact, address, guardian details and other profile fields at any time.

subFeatures.name: CSV export
subFeatures.description: Export the full filtered list or a basic-details version to CSV, including an account-credentials export for offline distribution.

subFeatures.name: Learner statistics
subFeatures.description: Aggregate headcounts by status, batch and user type for instant reporting.

subFeatures.name: Multi-course memberships view
subFeatures.description: See every course and batch a learner is enrolled in, with expiry date and status per enrollment.

features.name: Enrollment Invite Links
features.tagline: Shareable enrollment pages with forms and payment built in
features.description: Create branded invite links that let learners self-enroll into chosen courses and batches. Each invite carries its own registration form, payment plans, discounts and referral programs, and every response is tracked, reviewed and approved before or after enrollment.

subFeatures.name: Invite builder
subFeatures.description: Pick the courses, sessions, levels and batches an invite covers; optionally let the learner choose from allowed options via dropdowns.

subFeatures.name: Custom registration form
subFeatures.description: Add your custom fields to each invite's form to capture exactly the data you need; a sensible default form is generated automatically.

subFeatures.name: Payment plans on invites
subFeatures.description: Attach free, one-time, subscription or donation payment plans with pricing per invite.

subFeatures.name: Discounts
subFeatures.description: Configure discounts on invite pricing through a dedicated discount setup.

subFeatures.name: Referral programs
subFeatures.description: Attach referral reward programs so existing learners bring in new ones through the same link.

subFeatures.name: Invite lifecycle management
subFeatures.description: List, edit, preview, copy and activate or close invites — closed links stop accepting registrations.

subFeatures.name: Response review queue
subFeatures.description: Every submission is stored with status; browse, filter and accept or reject registrations individually or in bulk.

subFeatures.name: Automatic registrant emails
subFeatures.description: Invitation and status update emails are sent to registrants automatically.

subFeatures.name: Default invite resolution
subFeatures.description: Bulk operations and enrollments can resolve a batch's default invite automatically, keeping pricing and forms consistent everywhere.

features.name: Manual & Assisted Enrollment
features.tagline: Enroll a learner in seconds, with or without payment
features.description: Multiple ways to get learners into courses: a step-by-step enrollment wizard, direct admin enrollment into any batch, and enrollment on a learner's behalf with recorded offline payment. Enrollment automatically sends welcome messages with login credentials.

subFeatures.name: Enrollment wizard
subFeatures.description: Guided form to add a single learner with personal details, guardian info, batch selection, expiry and custom fields.

subFeatures.name: Direct admin enrollment
subFeatures.description: Enroll an existing or new user straight into a batch, optionally attaching a payment plan and recording an offline payment amount and mode.

subFeatures.name: Add to more batches
subFeatures.description: Attach additional course batches to an existing learner without re-entering their details.

subFeatures.name: Automatic welcome messages
subFeatures.description: Send the learner their username and password by email or WhatsApp the moment they are enrolled.

subFeatures.name: Self-enrollment
subFeatures.description: Learners can join through institute pages and catalog checkout, feeding the same directory.

subFeatures.name: Re-enroll inactive learners
subFeatures.description: One click restores access for a learner whose registration ended.

subFeatures.name: Enrollment audit trail
subFeatures.description: Every learner add and update is captured in the admin activity log automatically.

features.name: Bulk Learner Import (CSV)
features.tagline: Onboard hundreds of learners from one spreadsheet
features.description: Upload a CSV to enroll whole batches at once. You control exactly which columns appear in the template — address, guardian details, expiry, status — and can auto-generate usernames, passwords and enrollment IDs so learners are login-ready immediately.

subFeatures.name: Configurable CSV template
subFeatures.description: Choose optional columns (address, city, region, pincode, parent name, parent mobile/email, linked institute, expiry days, status) before download so the sheet matches your data.

subFeatures.name: Auto-generated credentials
subFeatures.description: Toggle auto-generation of usernames, passwords and enrollment IDs during import.

subFeatures.name: Row-level validation
subFeatures.description: Uploads are validated with per-row results so bad rows can be fixed and re-uploaded.

subFeatures.name: Default expiry and status
subFeatures.description: Apply a default access expiry and enrollment status to every imported learner.

subFeatures.name: Credential distribution
subFeatures.description: Send imported learners their login credentials in bulk after import.

features.name: Bulk Assign & De-assign
features.tagline: Move thousands of learners between courses, safely
features.description: A bulk engine that assigns existing users, brand-new users or a filtered audience into one or more batches — or removes them — in a single operation. A dry-run preview shows exactly what will happen before you commit, with duplicate handling, offline payment capture and optional notifications.

subFeatures.name: Assign by list, new users or filter
subFeatures.description: Target explicit users, freshly created users with full profiles including guardian data, or a saved user filter — all in one operation.

subFeatures.name: Multiple destination batches
subFeatures.description: Each assignment specifies its batch, invite link, payment option, plan and access days, with per-assignment custom field values.

subFeatures.name: Dry-run preview
subFeatures.description: Simulate the whole operation and see the per-user outcome before committing anything.

subFeatures.name: Duplicate handling
subFeatures.description: Choose how already-enrolled users are treated (for example, skip) so re-runs are always safe.

subFeatures.name: Offline payment capture
subFeatures.description: Record a payment amount, mode, transaction ID and date against each bulk enrollment for fee reconciliation.

subFeatures.name: Installment overrides
subFeatures.description: Override installment schedules for bulk-enrolled users where payment plans apply.

subFeatures.name: Soft or hard de-assign
subFeatures.description: Remove learners from batches in recoverable soft mode or permanent hard mode, with optional notification and its own dry-run.

subFeatures.name: Optional notifications and credentials
subFeatures.description: Decide whether learners are notified and whether login credentials are sent as part of the bulk action.

features.name: Enrollment Requests & Approvals
features.tagline: Review and approve who joins, one by one or in bulk
features.description: A dedicated inbox of learners whose enrollment is pending approval or who were invited but not yet confirmed. Filter by gender, preferred batch, payment status and payment option, then accept or decline individually or across a whole selection.

subFeatures.name: Pending-request inbox
subFeatures.description: See every learner awaiting approval or confirmation, with their requested batch and payment details.

subFeatures.name: Accept / decline actions
subFeatures.description: Approve or reject a request in one click, with bulk accept and bulk decline across selections.

subFeatures.name: Approval with batch placement
subFeatures.description: Approving a request enrolls the learner into their requested batch immediately.

subFeatures.name: Triage filters
subFeatures.description: Filter requests by gender, preferred batch, payment status, approval status and payment option.

subFeatures.name: Outreach from the inbox
subFeatures.description: Share credentials or send WhatsApp and email to requestors without leaving the screen.

features.name: Learner Lifecycle Actions
features.tagline: Change batch, extend, renew, terminate — solo or in bulk
features.description: Day-to-day registrar actions available on any learner or any multi-select of learners: batch transfers, access extensions, next-session re-registration, termination and deletion, plus outbound actions like credential sharing, WhatsApp and email blasts, and certificate creation.

subFeatures.name: Change batch
subFeatures.description: Move one or many learners to a different course, session and level in one dialog.

subFeatures.name: Extend access
subFeatures.description: Push out session expiry dates individually or in bulk.

subFeatures.name: Re-register for next session
subFeatures.description: Roll learners into the next academic session with target packages and access days; study material can carry over from the previous session.

subFeatures.name: Terminate registration
subFeatures.description: End a learner's enrollment, optionally triggering a configured off-boarding workflow.

subFeatures.name: Re-enroll
subFeatures.description: Restore an inactive learner's access with a single click.

subFeatures.name: Delete learner
subFeatures.description: Remove learner records entirely, with confirmation and bulk support.

subFeatures.name: Share credentials
subFeatures.description: Send usernames and passwords to selected learners via your configured channels.

subFeatures.name: Bulk WhatsApp & email
subFeatures.description: Message any selection of learners straight from the list.

subFeatures.name: Create certificates
subFeatures.description: Generate course-completion certificates for selected learners from the same bulk menu.

features.name: Batch & Academic Session Management
features.tagline: Structure courses into sessions, levels and batches
features.description: Manage the institute's academic structure end to end: create academic sessions, levels and batches through guided steps, organize cohorts into hierarchies, and administer everything from one screen with learner counts always in view.

subFeatures.name: Create batch wizard
subFeatures.description: A step-by-step dialog creates the course, level and session in sequence, producing a ready-to-enroll batch.

subFeatures.name: Academic session administration
subFeatures.description: Add, edit and delete academic sessions, with guards against destructive deletes.

subFeatures.name: Batch listing & summary
subFeatures.description: Paginated batch lists per session with learner counts, start times, status, and search.

subFeatures.name: Parent-child batch hierarchies
subFeatures.description: Link parent batches to child batches for cohort hierarchies and franchise structures.

subFeatures.name: Sub-org association
subFeatures.description: Assign batches to sub-organizations so each branch sees only its own cohorts.

subFeatures.name: Learner grouping
subFeatures.description: Tie batches to named groups for organizing cohorts within a course.

subFeatures.name: Bulk batch lookup
subFeatures.description: Look up many batches at once for reporting or integration scenarios.

subFeatures.name: Safe deletion
subFeatures.description: Remove batches that are no longer needed, individually or in bulk, with confirmation.

features.name: Seat Inventory Management
features.tagline: Cap seats per batch and watch availability live
features.description: Set maximum seats for any batch and monitor capacity across the institute in real time. Seats are reserved and released automatically during enrollment, and dashboards flag batches that are nearly full — so sales can push urgency or admins can add capacity.

subFeatures.name: Per-batch capacity
subFeatures.description: Set maximum seats and available slots for each batch, or mark it unlimited.

subFeatures.name: Automatic reservations
subFeatures.description: Seats are reserved and released automatically as learners move through enrollment flows — no overselling.

subFeatures.name: Capacity stat cards
subFeatures.description: At-a-glance totals: total batches, limited vs unlimited, total capacity, seats remaining, and low-availability and critical batches.

subFeatures.name: Availability checks & filters
subFeatures.description: Check availability for one batch or many at once, and filter inventory by course, level, session, search text and availability status.

subFeatures.name: Table and card views
subFeatures.description: Switch between a dense table and visual cards over the same inventory data.

subFeatures.name: Quick capacity updates
subFeatures.description: Update seat counts from a dialog without leaving the inventory screen.

features.name: Enrollment & Renewal Automation
features.tagline: Expiries, reminders and renewals that run themselves
features.description: Define per-batch policies for everything around expiry: automated email, WhatsApp and push reminders before and on expiry, waiting periods, automatic renewal charges for saved payment methods, and re-enrollment rules. The scheduler executes these policies continuously without staff involvement.

subFeatures.name: Pre-expiry and on-expiry notifications
subFeatures.description: Configure templated reminders per channel (email, WhatsApp, push) triggered before expiry or the moment it arrives.

subFeatures.name: Expiry processing pipeline
subFeatures.description: Automated processing moves learners correctly through pre-expiry, waiting period and final expiry stages.

subFeatures.name: Automatic renewal charging
subFeatures.description: Subscription renewals are charged automatically, and the success or failure drives the learner's status.

subFeatures.name: Re-enrollment rules
subFeatures.description: Set re-enrollment gap validation and upgrade options, with invite links shown to expired learners.

subFeatures.name: Repurchase behavior
subFeatures.description: Choose whether a repurchase while still active stacks onto remaining time or overwrites it.

subFeatures.name: Workflow hooks & learner actions
subFeatures.description: Attach workflows and interactive elements — such as WhatsApp buttons — to each lifecycle stage.

subFeatures.name: Sub-org payment routing
subFeatures.description: The policy engine recognizes sub-organization-paid enrollments and routes renewal charges accordingly.

features.name: Sub-Organization (Branch & Franchise) Management
features.tagline: Run branches, franchises and partner orgs under one roof
features.description: Create and manage sub-organizations — branches, franchise partners or client companies — each with its own team, seat allocation and finances. Parent-institute admins see seat usage, a full financial ledger and subscription status per sub-org, while partners manage their own learner rosters without needing admin-portal access.

subFeatures.name: Create sub-orgs
subFeatures.description: Spin up a sub-organization directly, or create one bundled with a subscription — seats, validity and courses — in one step.

subFeatures.name: Seat usage tracking
subFeatures.description: Monitor seats consumed versus purchased for each sub-org subscription.

subFeatures.name: Financial ledger
subFeatures.description: Per-sub-org ledger with invoice, payment, waiver, adjustment and penalty entries; record payments and mark invoices paid from the UI.

subFeatures.name: Subscription status
subFeatures.description: See each sub-org's subscription state and pending installments at a glance.

subFeatures.name: Team roster
subFeatures.description: Add or remove sub-org team members, list them with filters, and view each member's installment history.

subFeatures.name: Scoped invite links
subFeatures.description: Enrollment invites can be scoped to a sub-org so its learners register under the right branch.

subFeatures.name: Analytics panel
subFeatures.description: Per-sub-org dashboard covering admin payments, invoices, member courses and learner lists.

subFeatures.name: Learner-to-sub-org linking
subFeatures.description: Learners link to sub-orgs as direct, inherited or partnership members, and the main directory filters by sub-org.

subFeatures.name: Member outstanding balances
subFeatures.description: Per-member financial summary of total accrued, paid, balance and overdue amounts in the sub-org's currency.

subFeatures.name: Partner self-serve roster
subFeatures.description: Partners get their own in-app screen to view their member roster, add learners individually with custom fields, or bulk upload many at once.

subFeatures.name: Partner member removal
subFeatures.description: Partners can select and terminate members from their own organization directly.

features.name: Sub-Org Self-Registration
features.tagline: Partners onboard themselves through a public link
features.description: Publish a registration link that lets a new branch or partner organization sign itself up end to end: fill a custom form, accept terms, verify by OTP, complete KYC, pay online and receive a ready-made workspace with admin access — with optional manual approval by the parent institute.

subFeatures.name: Registration templates
subFeatures.description: Design reusable templates defining form steps, custom fields, terms document and consent items, seat count, validity, allowed team roles, admin permissions and included courses.

subFeatures.name: Public multi-step flow
subFeatures.description: Applicants save their details, verify email or phone by OTP with resend, and can resume an interrupted registration later.

subFeatures.name: Built-in payments
subFeatures.description: Collect registration payment online with retry support and a configurable vendor and currency.

subFeatures.name: KYC verification
subFeatures.description: Integrated identity verification with a document checklist and live status updates.

subFeatures.name: Approval gate & caps
subFeatures.description: Optionally require parent-institute approval, and cap total registrations per link.

subFeatures.name: Completion experience
subFeatures.description: Custom completion message, button label and redirect so new partners land exactly where you want them.

subFeatures.name: Registrations pipeline
subFeatures.description: List every registration with status — including KYC status — and manage templates centrally.

features.name: Staff, Teams & Org Chart
features.tagline: Your whole staff, their teams, and who reports to whom
features.description: Manage every staff account centrally — invite by email with pre-assigned roles, create users in bulk, distribute credentials and reset passwords. Model your real organization with departments, nested teams, team heads and reporting lines, all visualized on an interactive org chart.

subFeatures.name: Institute users view
subFeatures.description: List all staff with role and status filters, enable or disable accounts, and edit roles in place.

subFeatures.name: Email invitations with roles
subFeatures.description: Invite admins, teachers, course creators, assessment creators and evaluators with roles pre-assigned; resend or edit pending invitations before acceptance.

subFeatures.name: Bulk user creation
subFeatures.description: Create many users in one operation — onboard an entire teaching staff at once.

subFeatures.name: Credentials & passwords
subFeatures.description: Send login credentials individually or in batches, and update or reset passwords when someone is locked out.

subFeatures.name: Search & profile management
subFeatures.description: Type-ahead search across all users, with editable profiles — name, email, mobile, photo — reflected across every app.

subFeatures.name: Teams & sub-teams
subFeatures.description: Create named teams, nest them under parent teams, order them for display, and manage each member's access.

subFeatures.name: Team heads & member roles
subFeatures.description: Designate a head for each team and give every member a role label, such as 'Senior Counsellor'.

subFeatures.name: Reporting lines & org chart
subFeatures.description: Link each member to the person they report to, and see the whole hierarchy on a visual, drag-and-drop org chart with permission-controlled visibility.

subFeatures.name: Hierarchy lookups
subFeatures.description: Trace any member's full chain of managers upward, everyone beneath them, and every team they belong to.

subFeatures.name: Sub-org scoped team views
subFeatures.description: Filter users by sub-org and view a per-sub-org team page with its own analytics.

subFeatures.name: Inactive-user export
subFeatures.description: Export a CSV of users inactive for a chosen number of days to drive re-engagement.

features.name: Roles & Granular Permissions
features.tagline: Decide exactly what each role sees and can do
features.description: Access is governed by roles — Admin, Teacher, Evaluator and Learner out of the box — plus unlimited custom roles you define yourself. Configure each role's entire portal experience: which sidebar sections, tabs, columns and dashboard widgets appear, and which sensitive actions are allowed.

subFeatures.name: Built-in role set
subFeatures.description: Admin, Teacher and Evaluator roles for staff plus the Learner role for students, each unlocking the right screens and actions.

subFeatures.name: Custom roles
subFeatures.description: Create, rename and delete institute-specific roles — such as 'Front Desk' or 'Lead Manager' — each with its own permission set and configuration screen.

subFeatures.name: Per-institute role scoping
subFeatures.description: The same person can be an Admin in one institute and a Teacher in another — roles are scoped to each workspace.

subFeatures.name: Role lifecycle management
subFeatures.description: Add or remove roles on users, view counts per role, filter by status (invited, active, disabled), and disable access without deleting the account.

subFeatures.name: Per-user permission grants
subFeatures.description: Grant individual users named permissions on specific resources, on top of what their roles provide.

subFeatures.name: Layout & navigation control
subFeatures.description: Toggle sidebar sections per role, and add custom tabs and sub-tabs — for example, links out to your own tools.

subFeatures.name: Course & slide permissions
subFeatures.description: Control access to All Courses, Authored Courses, Courses In Review and Course Approval, plus slide-level rights: copy, move, delete, download and read-only viewing.

subFeatures.name: Learner profile tab control
subFeatures.description: Show or hide each learner-profile tab per role — Overview, Progress, Tests, Membership, Payment History, Guardian, Enquiry, Lead Profile, Files, Badges, Reports and more.

subFeatures.name: Sensitive account permissions
subFeatures.description: Per-role switches for viewing learner passwords, sending password resets, accessing the learner portal on a learner's behalf, and editing institute details.

subFeatures.name: Audience & campaign access modes
subFeatures.description: Restrict a role to specific audience lists — ideal for counsellor teams working separate campaigns.

subFeatures.name: Column & filter pickers
subFeatures.description: Choose which learner-list columns and which lead-filter custom fields each role sees.

subFeatures.name: Concurrent login limit
subFeatures.description: Cap active sessions per account to prevent account sharing.

subFeatures.name: Role display names
subFeatures.description: Role labels shown across the portal respect your institute-configured display names.

features.name: Faculty & Teaching Assignment
features.tagline: Map every teacher to their subjects and batches
features.description: Assign teachers to the exact subjects and batches they teach, update assignments as timetables change, and browse the whole faculty with filters. Fine-grained access grants control what else each staff member can reach.

subFeatures.name: Assign subjects & batches
subFeatures.description: Attach a teacher — existing or newly created — to one or more batches with specific subjects per batch.

subFeatures.name: Update assignments
subFeatures.description: Revise a teacher's batch-subject mapping at any time as timetables change.

subFeatures.name: Faculty directory
subFeatures.description: Search and filter all faculty with their statuses and assignments; a flat batch-subject view supports auditing.

subFeatures.name: Course-creator lookup
subFeatures.description: Quickly list faculty who create content, for authoring workflows.

subFeatures.name: Per-user access grants
subFeatures.description: Grant staff named access to specific resources with a chosen permission level, viewable per user.

features.name: Parent & Guardian Linking
features.tagline: Connect parents to their children's learning accounts
features.description: Link parent and guardian accounts to learners so families stay connected to progress, fees and communication. Link existing accounts or create new ones on the spot, in either direction, and backfill guardian links and portal credentials from historical records in bulk.

subFeatures.name: Link existing or create new
subFeatures.description: Connect two existing accounts, or create a new guardian or student account on the spot with name, email and mobile.

subFeatures.name: Bidirectional linking
subFeatures.description: Works from either side — a parent adding their student or a student adding their parent — and supports multiple children per parent.

subFeatures.name: Family relations lookup
subFeatures.description: Look up a learner's parents or a parent's children from any profile, powering dashboards, notifications and fee communication.

subFeatures.name: Parent lookup by mobile
subFeatures.description: Find or match a parent account by phone number during admissions or messaging.

subFeatures.name: Bulk guardian backfill
subFeatures.description: Detect learners whose records contain parent details but no linked guardian account — including from leads — and create the links in one run.

subFeatures.name: Credential backfill
subFeatures.description: Send portal credentials to guardians of all existing students in one action, choosing who receives the notification.

subFeatures.name: Parent experience settings
subFeatures.description: Institute-level settings control how guardian details are collected and what parents can access.

features.name: Parent Portal
features.tagline: A dedicated portal for parents, from admission to results
features.description: Parents get their own portal — with a child selector for multi-child families — covering the entire journey: admission applications, interview and test scheduling, document verification, fee payments, attendance, progress and upcoming schedules. Ideal for schools running structured admission cycles and for keeping families engaged after enrollment.

subFeatures.name: Multi-child support
subFeatures.description: All children under one login, with one-tap switching between child profiles.

subFeatures.name: Parent dashboard
subFeatures.description: An overview per child of admission progress, attendance, scores, completion, certificates, payment status, schedule and pending actions.

subFeatures.name: Digital application form
subFeatures.description: Parents fill and submit the admission application online.

subFeatures.name: Interview & tests module
subFeatures.description: View and track scheduled interviews and entrance assessments.

subFeatures.name: Admission tracker
subFeatures.description: A step-by-step status tracker showing exactly where the child is in the admission pipeline.

subFeatures.name: Document verification
subFeatures.description: Upload required documents and track them through verification.

subFeatures.name: Fee payments
subFeatures.description: Pay admission and course fees online, with a clear breakdown of what is due.

subFeatures.name: Schedule view
subFeatures.description: The child's upcoming sessions and events, visible to parents.

subFeatures.name: Branded parent mobile app
subFeatures.description: A native mobile experience under the institute's own brand, with push notifications.

subFeatures.name: Structured faculty messaging
subFeatures.description: Parent-to-faculty messages routed through the platform, keeping staff personal numbers private.

subFeatures.name: Progress digests & alerts
subFeatures.description: Automatic progress digests and alerts delivered over WhatsApp, email and push.

subFeatures.name: Multi-language interface
subFeatures.description: Parents choose their preferred language for the portal.

features.name: Learner Attendance Reports
features.tagline: Learners and parents always know the attendance picture
features.description: Attendance captured in live classes rolls up into learner- and parent-facing reports. A weekly widget shows day-by-day status on the dashboard, and a full report page lets families review attendance history across batches.

subFeatures.name: Weekly attendance widget
subFeatures.description: A day-by-day present, absent or pending view of the current week, right on the dashboard.

subFeatures.name: Attendance report page
subFeatures.description: Detailed attendance history with session-level records across batches.

subFeatures.name: Attendance-driven stats
subFeatures.description: Attendance percentages feed dashboard stats and achievement badges.

features.name: Teacher Planning & Diary Logs
features.tagline: Lesson plans and daily diaries, shareable with students
features.description: Teachers record lesson plans and diary logs against a batch and subject for any interval — daily, weekly, monthly or yearly. Entries are rich documents with attachments, browsable as a table or timeline, and can be shared so learners and parents see what was planned versus what was done.

subFeatures.name: Plans and diaries
subFeatures.description: Create forward-looking planning entries or retrospective diary logs — two distinct record types.

subFeatures.name: Interval-based organization
subFeatures.description: Attach logs to daily, weekly, monthly or yearly periods, with quick pickers for today, tomorrow, this week, next month and more.

subFeatures.name: Rich content editor
subFeatures.description: Write plans in a rich-text editor with an automatic title generator and file attachments.

subFeatures.name: Batch & subject scoping
subFeatures.description: Every entry ties to a specific batch and subject so records line up with the timetable.

subFeatures.name: Share with students
subFeatures.description: Toggle any plan to be visible to learners.

subFeatures.name: Table & timeline views
subFeatures.description: Browse logs as a filterable table or a chronological timeline, and edit entries in place.

subFeatures.name: Learner-side today's plan
subFeatures.description: Learners see the current day's plan highlighted on their planning page for quick action.

subFeatures.name: Learner activity timeline
subFeatures.description: Learners and parents browse planning and activity logs on a timeline, filter by period and type, and open attachments on each entry.

features.name: Custom Fields & Data Model Builder
features.tagline: Capture exactly the data your institute needs
features.description: Define your own data fields — text, dropdowns, dates, files, multi-selects and more — and attach them to enrollment forms, live-session and assessment registrations, audience campaigns or institute-wide learner records. Map custom fields to built-in system fields and keep both in sync automatically.

subFeatures.name: 12 field types
subFeatures.description: Text, textarea, email, URL, number, date, phone, dropdown, radio, checkbox, file upload and multi-select — dropdown-style fields carry their own configurable option lists.

subFeatures.name: Attach fields anywhere
subFeatures.description: Scope fields institute-wide or per enrollment invite, live session, assessment or audience form — each context gets its own tailored set.

subFeatures.name: Reusable field library
subFeatures.description: Create fields once and reuse them across enrollment invites, audience forms and learner profiles.

subFeatures.name: Field groups & ordering
subFeatures.description: Organize fields into groups and control their order on forms.

subFeatures.name: File-upload answers
subFeatures.description: Forms can collect document and image uploads as answers to custom fields.

subFeatures.name: System-field mapping & sync
subFeatures.description: Map custom fields to built-in fields on students, users or enquiries, and sync values automatically in either direction.

subFeatures.name: Usage tracking & safe deletion
subFeatures.description: See everywhere a field is used before deleting; deletions are soft and can be done in bulk.

subFeatures.name: Custom fields in filters & columns
subFeatures.description: Expose chosen custom fields as lead filters and learner-list columns per role, and render them on public enrollment and enquiry pages.

features.name: Catalog Operations Console
features.tagline: Administer every course, price and batch from one table
features.description: A power-admin console over the entire course catalog. See every course and batch combination in a filterable table, edit course details, sessions, payment options and invites inline, and manage pricing at scale — including bulk offers and CSV-driven course creation.

subFeatures.name: Catalog table with filters
subFeatures.description: A filterable, paginated table of all courses and their batch variants, with a detail sidebar per batch.

subFeatures.name: Inline edit dialogs
subFeatures.description: Edit a course, its session, its payment option or its enrollment invite directly from the table row.

subFeatures.name: Bulk offer pricing
subFeatures.description: Select eligible batches by session, level and status and apply an offer price across all of them at once, with per-row eligibility reasons, a results summary and a reset-to-original option.

subFeatures.name: Bulk course creation from CSV
subFeatures.description: Import many courses at once — with type, tags, batches, seat inventory and payment configuration per row — including similar-course detection, preview and global defaults.

subFeatures.name: Payment configuration at scale
subFeatures.description: Set free, one-time, subscription or donation pricing, currency, validity days, strike-through price and approval requirements during bulk creation.

subFeatures.name: Publishing control
subFeatures.description: Choose per course whether it appears in the public catalogue.

features.name: Student Terms & Conditions
features.tagline: Digital T&C signing built into enrollment
features.description: Upload your institute's terms and conditions as a PDF and have learners sign digitally with their name during enrollment. Chosen staff are notified by email every time a learner signs.

subFeatures.name: T&C PDF upload
subFeatures.description: Upload the terms document learners must accept.

subFeatures.name: Named signature
subFeatures.description: Require the learner's name on the signature for a stronger record.

subFeatures.name: Sign notifications
subFeatures.description: Notify chosen email recipients whenever a learner signs.

features.name: HR: Employee Records
features.tagline: A proper HRIS for your staff, inside the platform
features.description: Maintain complete employee records for all staff: profiles, departments, designations, employment type and status, bank accounts for salary and a document vault. Employee state changes — probation, notice period, relieved — are tracked formally. Fully API-driven, so it plugs into your existing systems.

subFeatures.name: Employee profiles
subFeatures.description: Create and update employee profiles with filtering and search across the workforce.

subFeatures.name: Departments & designations
subFeatures.description: Define departments and designations and organize employees under them.

subFeatures.name: Employment types & statuses
subFeatures.description: Track full-time, part-time and contract staff through statuses: active, probation, notice period, relieved, terminated.

subFeatures.name: Bank details
subFeatures.description: Store one or more bank accounts per employee for salary payout, editable over time.

subFeatures.name: Document vault
subFeatures.description: Upload and manage employee documents — offer letters, appointment letters, ID proofs, PAN, Aadhaar, passport, degrees, experience and relieving letters.

subFeatures.name: Reporting-line view
subFeatures.description: See any employee's position in the org chart — their manager and their reports.

features.name: HR: Staff Attendance & Shifts
features.tagline: Check-ins, shifts, holidays and regularization
features.description: Track staff attendance with self check-in and check-out or admin bulk marking, sourced manually, from biometric devices or by geo-location. Define shifts and assign them to employees, maintain the holiday calendar, and let staff request regularization of missed punches with approval.

subFeatures.name: Check-in / check-out
subFeatures.description: Employees punch in and out; records capture the source — manual, biometric device or geo-location — and mode.

subFeatures.name: Bulk attendance marking
subFeatures.description: Mark attendance for many employees at once with statuses: present, absent, half day, on leave, holiday, weekend.

subFeatures.name: Records & summaries
subFeatures.description: Query attendance history and per-period summaries for one employee or across the institute.

subFeatures.name: Attendance configuration
subFeatures.description: Institute-level attendance settings, including the time-tracking mode.

subFeatures.name: Regularization requests
subFeatures.description: Staff raise requests for missed or incorrect punches; approvers act on them through the approval workflow.

subFeatures.name: Shift management
subFeatures.description: Create shifts, edit timings and assign shifts to employees.

subFeatures.name: Holiday calendar
subFeatures.description: Maintain holidays individually or via bulk upload, with edit and delete.

features.name: HR: Leave Management
features.tagline: Policies, balances, approvals and comp-offs, automated
features.description: A full leave system: define leave types and policies with monthly or yearly accrual, let staff apply — including half days — route approvals, and keep balances accurate with adjustments, scheduled accrual runs and year-end carry-forward processing. Compensatory off is supported end to end.

subFeatures.name: Leave types & policies
subFeatures.description: Create leave types and policy rules with monthly or yearly accrual, and update them as HR rules evolve.

subFeatures.name: Apply & track
subFeatures.description: Employees apply for full or half-day leave, follow the status — pending, approved, rejected, cancelled — and cancel when needed.

subFeatures.name: Approval queue
subFeatures.description: Managers see pending applications and approve or reject in one action.

subFeatures.name: Leave balances
subFeatures.description: Per-employee balances with manual adjustment for corrections.

subFeatures.name: Accrual & year-end runs
subFeatures.description: Run accrual processing and year-end carry-forward or lapse processing across the institute.

subFeatures.name: Compensatory off
subFeatures.description: Grant comp-off for extra days worked, approve or reject requests, and keep full comp-off history.

features.name: HR: Approval Workflows
features.tagline: Multi-step approval chains for every HR request
features.description: Configure who approves what: build approval chains where each step is the reporting manager, department head or HR admin. Chains govern leave applications, attendance regularizations, reimbursements and loans, with a unified pending queue and a complete history.

subFeatures.name: Approval chain builder
subFeatures.description: Define ordered approver steps by type: reporting manager, department head or HR admin.

subFeatures.name: Broad coverage
subFeatures.description: Chains apply to leave applications, attendance regularization, reimbursements and loans.

subFeatures.name: Unified pending queue
subFeatures.description: Approvers see everything awaiting them in one place and approve or reject per request.

subFeatures.name: Approval history
subFeatures.description: A complete audit trail of who approved what, and when.

features.name: HR: Payroll, Payslips & Disbursement
features.tagline: Salary runs from calculation to paid, with holds
features.description: Run monthly payroll end to end: create a run, auto-calculate every employee's entry from their salary structure, review component-level breakdowns, hold or release individual payouts, then approve and mark the run paid. Loans, salary advances and expense reimbursements flow into the same run, and payslips and bank-transfer files come out the other side.

subFeatures.name: Payroll runs
subFeatures.description: Create, process, approve, mark paid or delete runs; statuses move through draft, processing, processed, approved and paid.

subFeatures.name: Entry-level detail
subFeatures.description: Inspect each employee's payroll entry and every earning and deduction component behind it.

subFeatures.name: Hold & release
subFeatures.description: Put any employee's payout on hold within a run and release it later.

subFeatures.name: Loans & salary advances
subFeatures.description: Issue salary advances or personal loans, approve them, and track repayments that auto-deduct through payroll.

subFeatures.name: Reimbursements
subFeatures.description: Staff claim travel, medical, food, phone or internet expenses; approved amounts pay out through payroll.

subFeatures.name: Payslip generation
subFeatures.description: Generate payslips in bulk for a run, retrievable individually per employee.

subFeatures.name: Bank export files
subFeatures.description: Produce bank-ready disbursement exports for salary transfer, with a log of every export.

subFeatures.name: Payroll summary reports
subFeatures.description: Aggregate payroll cost reporting across periods for management and finance.

features.name: HR: Salary Structures & Employee Tax
features.tagline: Reusable salary templates with India-ready tax handling
features.description: Model compensation with earning and deduction components calculated as flat amounts or percentages of basic, CTC or gross. Combine components into reusable templates, assign structures per employee with overrides, and handle Indian income tax — investment declarations and old-versus-new regime computation — inside payroll so TDS deductions are correct.

subFeatures.name: Salary components
subFeatures.description: Define earning and deduction components as a fixed amount or a percentage of basic, CTC or gross, categorized fixed or variable.

subFeatures.name: Salary templates
subFeatures.description: Bundle components into templates for common pay grades, editable centrally.

subFeatures.name: Employee structures with overrides
subFeatures.description: Assign a structure to each employee with component-level overrides where needed.

subFeatures.name: Revision history
subFeatures.description: Every salary revision is recorded and listable for audits and increment cycles.

subFeatures.name: Tax configuration
subFeatures.description: Institute-level tax setup covering financial-year parameters.

subFeatures.name: Investment declarations
subFeatures.description: Employees submit and update declarations, and HR verifies them before they affect tax.

subFeatures.name: Regime-aware tax computation
subFeatures.description: A built-in engine computes each employee's liability under India's old or new tax regime, keeping TDS deductions accurate.

demo.intro: Run the whole institute from one place — follow a registrar's day from the learner directory through bulk enrollment, batches and branches, to payroll.

steps.title: Every learner, one directory
steps.text: Search 2,000+ learners with type-ahead, filter by batch, status, payment, session-expiry window or any custom field, and export any view to CSV — including a credentials export for offline distribution.

steps.title: Registrar problems surface themselves
steps.text: Live headcounts flag what needs action today: pending approvals to accept or decline, enrollments expiring within 30 days, and overdue payments — before parents call to complain.

steps.title: Act on any row, or any selection
steps.text: Open a side-panel profile — guardian info, batch memberships, per-chapter progress — or multi-select to change batch, extend access, re-register for the next session, or blast WhatsApp and email.

steps.title: Move thousands of learners at once
steps.text: Bulk-assign a CSV of new users, an explicit list, or a saved filter into one or more batches — with access days, offline payment capture (amount, mode, transaction ID) and optional credential delivery.

steps.title: Dry-run before you commit
steps.text: A simulation shows the per-learner outcome first: who gets enrolled, who's skipped by the duplicate rule, and which rows need fixes. Re-runs are always safe — nothing changes until you commit.

steps.title: Seat inventory, live
steps.text: Cap seats per batch and watch capacity institute-wide. Seats reserve and release automatically during enrollment — no overselling — and nearly-full batches are flagged so you add capacity or push urgency.

steps.title: Sessions, levels and batches
steps.text: A guided wizard creates course, level and academic session in sequence, producing a ready-to-enroll batch. Parent-child hierarchies and learner groups keep large cohorts organized.

steps.title: Branches and franchises under one roof
steps.text: Each sub-org gets its own team, seat allocation and financial ledger — invoices, payments, waivers, penalties. Partners manage their own rosters through a self-serve screen, even by public self-registration link.

steps.title: A real HR suite, built in
steps.text: Staff check in manually, by biometric device or geo-location; leave policies accrue monthly or yearly; and regularizations, leave and reimbursements route through multi-step approval chains.

steps.title: Payroll from calculation to paid
steps.text: Monthly runs auto-calculate every entry from salary structures with regime-aware Indian tax. Hold or release individual payouts, generate payslips in bulk, and export bank-ready transfer files.

pillars.name: Analytics & Reports
pillars.tagline: Dashboards and reports for learning, sales, fees and engagement
pillars.description: Every part of Vacademy — learning, sales, finance, communication and operations — feeds into a connected reporting layer, so leadership runs the institute on live data instead of end-of-month spreadsheets. Role-aware dashboards surface what matters to each team, AI turns raw activity into readable report cards for students and parents, and every report exports as branded PDFs or CSVs under your own letterhead.

features.name: AI Student Report Cards
features.tagline: A complete AI-written report on any student, on demand
features.description: Generate a comprehensive report card for any learner that pulls together everything the platform knows — attendance, marks, course progress, assignments, live-class participation, doubts asked, login habits, achievements and certificates — and adds an AI-written narrative with insights and topic-level confidence. Export it as a polished PDF or email it straight to parents, and let learners open their own reports in the app.

subFeatures.name: One-click report generation
subFeatures.description: Kick off an AI analysis for any student and track the run until the finished report is ready.

subFeatures.name: Comprehensive data sections
subFeatures.description: Overview, identity, attendance, academics and subject marks, course progress, assignments, live classes, doubts and engagement, study habits, login activity, achievements and certificates — all aggregated automatically.

subFeatures.name: AI narrative and insights
subFeatures.description: A readable, teacher-quality narrative plus AI insights and per-topic confidence ratings that explain how the student is really doing.

subFeatures.name: PDF export
subFeatures.description: Download any report as a polished, branded PDF report card.

subFeatures.name: Email delivery to parents
subFeatures.description: Send the report card by formatted email — ideal for keeping parents in the loop.

subFeatures.name: External data enrichment
subFeatures.description: Attach records from outside the platform to a student's profile so they are woven into future reports.

subFeatures.name: Learner reports hub
subFeatures.description: Learners and parents open every institute-generated report card from a dedicated 'My Reports' area, with report status per run.

subFeatures.name: Printable report view
subFeatures.description: Report cards render in a clean, print-friendly layout for sharing and filing.

features.name: Admin Home Dashboard
features.tagline: A role-aware command center with live KPIs
features.description: The landing dashboard adapts to each staff member's role — admins see institute-wide KPIs and finance, teachers see today's classes and their courses. Widgets cover enrollments, live classes, doubts, notifications, payments and real-time user analytics, with one-click quick actions for the most common tasks.

subFeatures.name: Role-based widget bundles
subFeatures.description: Admins, teachers, course creators, assessment creators and evaluators each get a curated default widget set, adjustable through display settings.

subFeatures.name: KPI band with deltas
subFeatures.description: Headline institute KPIs with change-over-period deltas so trends are obvious at a glance.

subFeatures.name: Quick actions strip
subFeatures.description: Role-relevant one-click actions: add student, new batch, announcement, payments, reports, today's classes, my courses, new course, assessments and evaluations.

subFeatures.name: Operational widgets
subFeatures.description: Widgets for enrolling learners, live classes with editable class links, unresolved doubts, recent notifications, pending actions, the learning center and the assessment center.

subFeatures.name: Finance widgets
subFeatures.description: A finance summary and recent transactions right on the home screen.

subFeatures.name: Real-time usage widgets
subFeatures.description: Live tiles for currently active users, hourly activity, daily trends, most active users, device usage and service usage.

subFeatures.name: User management tabs
subFeatures.description: Manage institute users, send invites and view learners without leaving the dashboard.

subFeatures.name: Guided onboarding tracker
subFeatures.description: New institutes see a step-by-step onboarding tracker that walks them through setting up their workspace.

subFeatures.name: Admin profile editing
subFeatures.description: Edit your own profile and account details directly from the dashboard.

features.name: Sales Dashboard
features.tagline: Your whole sales operation on one screen
features.description: A live command center for admissions sales: headline KPIs, the conversion funnel, source performance, call volume, follow-up risk and counsellor rankings — all filterable by team and date range. Auto-generated insights call out what changed and what needs attention.

subFeatures.name: KPI band
subFeatures.description: Headline numbers for the selected window — leads, conversions and other core sales metrics at a glance.

subFeatures.name: Conversion funnel
subFeatures.description: Stage-by-stage funnel showing exactly where leads drop off.

subFeatures.name: Conversion by source
subFeatures.description: Compare how each lead source — Meta, Google, website, walk-in — actually converts.

subFeatures.name: Calls-per-day trend
subFeatures.description: Daily calling volume charted over the selected window.

subFeatures.name: New vs existing leads
subFeatures.description: A time series separating fresh leads from returning ones.

subFeatures.name: Reassignment volume
subFeatures.description: Track how often leads move between counsellors over time.

subFeatures.name: Upcoming and missed follow-ups
subFeatures.description: Live widgets list follow-ups due soon and follow-ups already missed, so nothing slips.

subFeatures.name: Campaign cards
subFeatures.description: Per-campaign performance cards side by side for quick comparison.

subFeatures.name: Counsellor leaderboard
subFeatures.description: A team ranking embedded right on the dashboard.

subFeatures.name: Automatic insights strip
subFeatures.description: System-generated callouts highlight notable movements in your numbers.

subFeatures.name: Team and date scoping
subFeatures.description: 7/30/90-day presets or custom ranges plus a team picker; permissions control whether a manager sees their team or the whole institute.

features.name: CRM Reports Center
features.tagline: A dozen deep-dive sales reports in one hub
features.description: A tabbed analytics hub with shared date, team and counsellor filters feeding every report — from top-line overviews and source analysis to revenue, cohorts and forecasts. Each tab exports to CSV and every view is deep-linkable for sharing with the team.

subFeatures.name: Overview report
subFeatures.description: Top-line lead and conversion metrics for the selected window.

subFeatures.name: Sources report
subFeatures.description: Lead volume and conversion broken down by acquisition source.

subFeatures.name: Funnel report
subFeatures.description: Pipeline-stage funnel with drop-off analysis.

subFeatures.name: Dispositions report
subFeatures.description: How calls and leads are being dispositioned across the team.

subFeatures.name: Calling report
subFeatures.description: Call volume, connect rates and outcomes across human and AI calls.

subFeatures.name: Activity report
subFeatures.description: Team activity levels — notes, status changes, touches — with CSV export.

subFeatures.name: Follow-ups report
subFeatures.description: Follow-up completion and overdue analysis.

subFeatures.name: Counsellors report
subFeatures.description: Per-rep performance comparison across the team.

subFeatures.name: Manager report
subFeatures.description: Manager-level rollups across teams, with CSV export.

subFeatures.name: Revenue report
subFeatures.description: Revenue attributed to leads and campaigns.

subFeatures.name: Cohort report
subFeatures.description: How lead cohorts from different periods mature over time.

subFeatures.name: Forecast report
subFeatures.description: A forward-looking projection based on the current pipeline.

subFeatures.name: Custom reports
subFeatures.description: Build your own report views beyond the standard tabs.

subFeatures.name: CRM intelligence report
subFeatures.description: AI-assisted intelligence summaries of CRM performance when call intelligence is enabled.

subFeatures.name: Center heatmap
subFeatures.description: Center-level heatmap analytics of lead activity across locations.

subFeatures.name: Shared filter bar and deep links
subFeatures.description: Date presets or custom ranges, team scope and counsellor scope apply across every tab; the active tab lives in the URL for shareable deep links.

features.name: Admission Pipeline Dashboard
features.tagline: Your enquiry-to-admission funnel at a glance
features.description: A dedicated dashboard showing total enquiries, applications and admissions with conversion rates at every step — including how many admissions came from enquiries, from applications only, or arrived directly. Filter by batch and academic session, then drill into the actual people at each stage.

subFeatures.name: Funnel metrics
subFeatures.description: Totals for enquiries, applications and admissions plus enquiry-to-application, application-to-admission and overall conversion rates.

subFeatures.name: Admission origin split
subFeatures.description: See how many admissions started as an enquiry, came from an application only, or were direct admissions.

subFeatures.name: Batch and session filter
subFeatures.description: Scope the whole dashboard to a specific batch and academic session, or view institute-wide.

subFeatures.name: Pipeline people table
subFeatures.description: A drill-down table of the actual people sitting at each stage of the pipeline.

features.name: Learner Progress Reports & Email Digests
features.tagline: Automatic daily, weekly and monthly progress reports
features.description: Track every learner's study progress subject by subject, chapter by chapter and slide by slide — for individuals or whole batches — and export any view as a PDF. Automated daily, weekly and monthly email digests keep learners and parents informed without anyone lifting a finger, and the same reports are available in context right inside the study library.

subFeatures.name: Learner progress drill-down
subFeatures.description: Subject-wise, chapter-wise and slide-wise (date-wise) progress views per learner, including average daily time spent.

subFeatures.name: Batch reports and leaderboard
subFeatures.description: Batch-level subject and chapter progress plus a leaderboard ranking learners to drive healthy competition.

subFeatures.name: Scheduled email digests
subFeatures.description: Daily, weekly and monthly progress report emails, generated and sent automatically on schedule.

subFeatures.name: Institute and per-learner settings
subFeatures.description: Admins set the institute-wide report policy; individual learners can carry their own digest settings.

subFeatures.name: PDF exports
subFeatures.description: Export batch reports, learner reports, subject-wise reports, module progress reports and chapter-wise batch or learner reports as PDFs.

subFeatures.name: In-context study library reports
subFeatures.description: Batch, individual-learner and leaderboard views open directly inside the study library, so teachers spot who is falling behind without leaving the content area.

features.name: Learner Activity & Usage Analytics
features.tagline: Real-time visibility into who is learning right now
features.description: Live and historical analytics on learner behavior across the institute: who is online this minute, daily and hourly activity patterns, your most engaged learners, and which devices and platform areas they use most. Perfect for spotting engagement drops before they become dropouts.

subFeatures.name: Real-time active users
subFeatures.description: A live counter of learners on the platform right now, with a list of exactly who is online.

subFeatures.name: Daily and hourly activity patterns
subFeatures.description: Day-by-day trend charts and hour-of-day heat views reveal when your learners actually study.

subFeatures.name: Engagement trends over time
subFeatures.description: Activity summaries and trends over configurable time ranges — including a same-day snapshot — to spot momentum or drop-off.

subFeatures.name: Most active learners leaderboard
subFeatures.description: Rank learners by activity to identify champions and at-risk students.

subFeatures.name: Device usage breakdown
subFeatures.description: See the split of learners across web, mobile and desktop.

subFeatures.name: Feature usage breakdown
subFeatures.description: Which parts of the platform — learning, assessments, live classes and more — get used most.

subFeatures.name: Student login statistics
subFeatures.description: Login frequency and recency per student, feeding attendance-style regularity reports.

features.name: Assessment Analytics & Results
features.tagline: Leaderboards, question insights and AI performance reports
features.description: Every assessment gets a full analytics suite for staff — overview dashboard, ranked leaderboard, marks-vs-rank curve and question-level insights — with CSV and PDF export throughout. Learners get their own detailed results: score breakdowns, question-wise review, peer comparison and an AI-written performance report in plain language.

subFeatures.name: Overview dashboard
subFeatures.description: At-a-glance participation, completion and score statistics per assessment, plus institute-wide assessment counts.

subFeatures.name: Leaderboard
subFeatures.description: A ranked list of all participants by score, exportable to CSV and PDF.

subFeatures.name: Marks-vs-rank analysis
subFeatures.description: A graph and table mapping marks to ranks, exportable to CSV and PDF.

subFeatures.name: Question insights
subFeatures.description: Per-question charts of correct, incorrect, partially-correct and skipped responses to spot weak topics or bad questions, with PDF export.

subFeatures.name: Individual student report
subFeatures.description: Drill into any learner's attempt with question-wise performance, exportable as PDF.

subFeatures.name: Participant exports
subFeatures.description: Export registered-participant and respondent lists as CSV or PDF.

subFeatures.name: Learner attempt report
subFeatures.description: Learners see a score summary, marks obtained, accuracy and time-spent breakdown for each attempt, with a question-wise review of their response versus the correct answer.

subFeatures.name: Peer comparison
subFeatures.description: Learners see how their attempt compares to batch peers — ranks, percentiles and score distributions.

subFeatures.name: AI performance report card
subFeatures.description: An AI-generated narrative highlighting strengths, weak topics and recommended next steps, presented as a consolidated printable report card.

features.name: Challenge & Campaign Analytics
features.tagline: Measure campaigns from first touch to completion
features.description: A dedicated analytics suite tracks engagement challenges and messaging campaigns end to end: daily participation, engagement leaderboards, completion cohorts, churn, referrals, centre-wise heatmaps and lead funnels from ad to conversion. Filters slice everything by date range, campaign and centre.

subFeatures.name: KPI overview
subFeatures.description: Headline cards summarising participation, engagement and completion across the selected period.

subFeatures.name: Daily participation reports
subFeatures.description: Day-by-day view of active participants and who engaged with which message templates, with incoming/outgoing metrics and per-user drill-down including custom profile fields.

subFeatures.name: Engagement leaderboard
subFeatures.description: Rank participants by engagement over any date range to spot champions — ideal for gamified challenge campaigns.

subFeatures.name: Completion cohorts
subFeatures.description: Cohort analysis showing how far each intake progressed and exactly who completed a multi-day programme.

subFeatures.name: Churn analysis
subFeatures.description: Identify where and when participants drop off.

subFeatures.name: Centre heatmap and distribution
subFeatures.description: Compare performance across physical centres with heatmaps and distribution charts.

subFeatures.name: Referral tracking
subFeatures.description: Measure participant-driven referrals and their conversion.

subFeatures.name: Lead funnels
subFeatures.description: A daily funnel of Facebook ad leads flowing into the challenge, plus lead-journey funnels tracing prospects through sequential message touchpoints to spot drop-off.

subFeatures.name: Message template performance
subFeatures.description: Per-template outgoing metrics and template-to-day mapping so multi-day programmes can be measured stage by stage.

subFeatures.name: Flexible filters
subFeatures.description: Slice every view by date range, campaign and centre.

features.name: Communication Analytics Hub
features.tagline: Know who saw it, who clicked, who replied
features.description: One hub for the health and performance of every communication channel. See whether email and WhatsApp are set up and working, track each announcement's delivery down to the individual recipient, and follow every email through sent, delivered, opened, clicked or bounced — with exact timestamps and the specific link clicked.

subFeatures.name: Channel setup status
subFeatures.description: At-a-glance indicators for whether outbound email, inbound email and WhatsApp are configured and working.

subFeatures.name: Email funnel stats
subFeatures.description: Sent, delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, complained and inbound email counts for any chosen time window.

subFeatures.name: WhatsApp volume stats
subFeatures.description: Outgoing and incoming WhatsApp message counts for the selected window.

subFeatures.name: Announcement delivery statistics
subFeatures.description: Per-announcement stats covering pending, sent, delivered, failed and read counts across channels.

subFeatures.name: Recipient-level tracking
subFeatures.description: Drill into an announcement's full recipient list and see each person's delivery and read status.

subFeatures.name: Interactions and threaded replies
subFeatures.description: Read, dismissed, clicked, liked and shared interactions are captured per user per message; recipients can reply in nested threads that senders can browse and moderate.

subFeatures.name: Per-email event timeline
subFeatures.description: Each email shows a chronological history of delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, complaint and pending events with exact timestamps in the viewer's timezone.

subFeatures.name: Click and bounce detail
subFeatures.description: Click events record the specific link, device and browser; bounces carry type and sub-type so hard failures are distinguished from temporary ones.

subFeatures.name: Lookup and source attribution
subFeatures.description: Retrieve the complete email history of any user or address, search across all tracked emails, and trace every message back to the feature that sent it — announcement, campaign or automation.

subFeatures.name: Bulk send monitoring
subFeatures.description: Watch active and recently completed bulk send batches with per-batch status, alongside a live recent-activity feed across channels.

features.name: Fee Collection Dashboard
features.tagline: A live picture of expected vs collected fees
features.description: A visual dashboard that shows how fee collection is tracking across the institute: total expected, collected, due and overdue, a collection-rate gauge, a pipeline chart and class-wise breakdowns. Filter by batch, plan or period to find exactly where collections are slipping.

subFeatures.name: Summary cards
subFeatures.description: At-a-glance totals for expected fees, amount collected, outstanding dues and overdue amounts.

subFeatures.name: Collection rate gauge
subFeatures.description: A live gauge showing the percentage of expected fees actually collected.

subFeatures.name: Collection pipeline chart
subFeatures.description: Visualizes fees moving from upcoming to due to paid, making cash flow predictable.

subFeatures.name: Class-wise collection table
subFeatures.description: Breaks collections down by class and batch to spot which groups are behind.

subFeatures.name: Payment mode insights
subFeatures.description: See the split of collections across cash, cheque, UPI, card and online gateway payments.

subFeatures.name: Flexible filters
subFeatures.description: Slice the whole dashboard by batch, fee plan and date range.

features.name: Payment Logs & Reconciliation
features.tagline: Every transaction tracked, filterable and reconciled
features.description: A dedicated payment log records every payment attempt across all gateways with its live, reconciled status. Filter by time, status or plan, see revenue statistics at the top, and drill into any transaction's full details.

subFeatures.name: Revenue statistics
subFeatures.description: Instant totals for payment count, successful payments, failed payments and total revenue for the current filter.

subFeatures.name: Quick time filters
subFeatures.description: One-click views for the last hour, today, 7/30/90 days or all time, plus a custom date-time range.

subFeatures.name: Status filters
subFeatures.description: Filter by payment status (paid, failed, pending) and by learner plan status (active, payment failed, expired, inactive).

subFeatures.name: Rich transaction rows
subFeatures.description: Each row shows date, payer name and email, amount, color-coded status, payment method and vendor, plan status, course or membership, transaction ID and plan validity.

subFeatures.name: Reconciled status logic
subFeatures.description: Displayed status is derived from gateway confirmations, not just the initial attempt, so the table reflects reality.

subFeatures.name: Tracking updates
subFeatures.description: Payment records can be annotated with tracking information as follow-ups happen.

subFeatures.name: Built for scale
subFeatures.description: Configurable page sizes with newest-first sorting keep large institutes' logs fast to work through.

features.name: Membership Analytics & Expiry Tracking
features.tagline: Know who's new, who's renewing, who's about to lapse
features.description: Two dedicated dashboards track membership health: one analyzes new joiners versus retained members over time, the other surfaces memberships that have ended or are about to end — so your team drives renewals before revenue walks out the door.

subFeatures.name: New vs retained analysis
subFeatures.description: Membership stats split members into new users and retainers, with daily and weekly trend charts and filterable stat cards.

subFeatures.name: Expiring-soon pipeline
subFeatures.description: See memberships expiring in the next 30 days with member-level detail for proactive renewal outreach.

subFeatures.name: Recently expired list
subFeatures.description: Track memberships that ended in the last 30 days to run win-back campaigns.

subFeatures.name: Filterable member tables
subFeatures.description: Both dashboards include member tables with date-range, user-type and status filters.

subFeatures.name: Expiry trend charts
subFeatures.description: Expiry volume charted over time so leadership can spot churn spikes early.

features.name: Admin Activity Audit Log
features.tagline: Every admin action recorded, searchable and exportable
features.description: A complete audit trail of administrative actions across the platform — enrollments, settings changes, certificate updates, live-class edits, parent links and more. Compliance teams can filter the log, inspect exactly what changed with sensitive data automatically redacted, and export everything to CSV.

subFeatures.name: Filterable log viewer
subFeatures.description: Filter logs by actor, action, entity and time range in a dedicated screen.

subFeatures.name: Payload inspection
subFeatures.description: Open any entry to see the full details of what changed, with sensitive fields automatically redacted.

subFeatures.name: CSV export
subFeatures.description: Export filtered audit logs as CSV for external compliance archives.

subFeatures.name: Automatic capture
subFeatures.description: Actions across enrollment, settings, certificates, live sessions, bookings, courses and parent-link operations are logged asynchronously, without slowing the app.

subFeatures.name: Retention management
subFeatures.description: A retention policy automatically prunes old logs on your configured schedule.

features.name: Report Branding
features.tagline: Every exported report carries your letterhead
features.description: Brand the PDF reports your institute sends out: logo and letterhead, custom header and footer with full HTML control, report colors, and an optional watermark — with a live preview as you edit.

subFeatures.name: Logo and letterhead
subFeatures.description: Upload the logo and letterhead used across all generated reports.

subFeatures.name: Header and footer
subFeatures.description: Set footer text, or take full control with custom header and footer HTML.

subFeatures.name: Report colors
subFeatures.description: Primary and secondary brand colors applied to report styling.

subFeatures.name: Watermark
subFeatures.description: Optional watermark text across report pages.

subFeatures.name: Live preview
subFeatures.description: See the branded report layout before saving.

demo.intro: Run the institute on live data — from the admin command center through sales and learner analytics, down to an AI-written report card on a student's phone.
