steps.title: One command center, live all day
steps.text: The home dashboard adapts to each role — admins see institute-wide KPIs and finance, teachers see today's classes. Payments, doubts, live classes and real-time usage all land on one screen.

steps.title: KPIs with deltas, not spreadsheets
steps.text: Enrollments, fee collection, learners online this minute and unresolved doubts — every headline number carries its change over the period, so trends are obvious without opening a report.

steps.title: See when your learners actually study
steps.text: Real-time usage widgets chart hourly and daily activity, most active learners and the web/mobile/desktop device split — so you schedule live classes when students are genuinely online.

steps.title: A dozen sales reports, one filter bar
steps.text: Overview, sources, funnel, revenue, cohorts and forecast tabs share the same date, team and counsellor filters. The active tab lives in the URL, so any view is a shareable deep link.

steps.title: Know exactly where leads drop off
steps.text: The funnel report tracks every stage from first enquiry to admission. Here, 412 demo bookings became 148 admissions — the drop after application is where counsellors should focus.

steps.title: Revenue attributed to every source
steps.text: Meta, Google, website and walk-in leads are compared on volume, admissions and actual ₹ revenue. Every tab exports to CSV, and PDF reports go out under your own letterhead.

steps.title: Spot engagement dips before dropouts
steps.text: Daily activity trends per batch reveal momentum or drop-off early — like this mid-month slump. Drill from batch to subject, chapter and even slide-level progress per learner.

steps.title: At-risk learners flag themselves
steps.text: Login recency, study-time trends and leaderboard ranks combine into per-learner flags. Daily, weekly and monthly email digests then keep parents informed automatically — no one lifts a finger.

steps.title: An AI report card, one click away
steps.text: For any student, AI pulls attendance, marks, course progress, assignments, live-class participation, doubts and login habits into one report — readable in the app or emailed to parents as a branded PDF.

steps.title: Insights a teacher would write
steps.text: The AI adds a plain-language narrative with per-topic confidence ratings — what's strong, what needs work, and the habits behind the numbers. Learners open every report from their own 'My Reports' hub.

pillars.name: Community & Gamification
pillars.tagline: Shared question banks, leaderboards, XP and badges
pillars.description: Community & Gamification turns your institute into a place learners want to show up to every day. Built-in chat with a full safety toolkit keeps every conversation on-platform, while XP, streaks, badges and leaderboards convert study time into friendly competition. A network-wide community library of question papers, ratings and reviews rounds it out — so your teachers reuse the best content and your learners broadcast the social proof.

features.name: In-App Chat & Messaging
features.tagline: DMs, batch groups and community chat — no phone numbers shared
features.description: A built-in messenger connects admins, teachers and learners without anyone exchanging phone numbers. It covers one-to-one direct messages, automatic per-batch group chats and an institute-wide community channel, with text, image and file messages delivered in real time. Read receipts, unread counts and offline push notifications keep every conversation current, and a role-based permission matrix puts the institute in full control of who can message whom.

subFeatures.name: Direct messages
subFeatures.description: Start one-to-one conversations with anyone the institute's role matrix permits; a people search finds members by name or role.

subFeatures.name: Batch group chats
subFeatures.description: Every batch gets its own group conversation whose membership syncs automatically with enrollment, plus a searchable batch directory for admins.

subFeatures.name: Community channel
subFeatures.description: An institute-wide channel for all members that the institute can enable or hide.

subFeatures.name: Text, image and file messages
subFeatures.description: Send text, images and file attachments, with attachment permissions configurable per institute.

subFeatures.name: Read receipts and unread counts
subFeatures.description: Per-conversation mark-as-read with unread counters across the conversation list.

subFeatures.name: Real-time delivery with offline push
subFeatures.description: Messages reach online members instantly; offline members get a push notification so nothing is missed.

subFeatures.name: Role-based permission matrix
subFeatures.description: Control exactly which role may message which role — student-to-teacher, student-to-student and more — plus who may post in batch groups and the community channel.

subFeatures.name: Message deletion
subFeatures.description: Senders and moderators can remove messages from a conversation.

subFeatures.name: Member, Moderator and Owner roles
subFeatures.description: Conversations distinguish members, moderators and owners for management actions.

subFeatures.name: Per-institute opt-in
subFeatures.description: Chat is off by default and switched on per institute, so every school adopts messaging on its own terms.

features.name: Chat Moderation & Safety
features.tagline: Rules, filters and reporting keep student conversations safe
features.description: Community and group chats ship with a complete safety toolkit built for education. Publish channel guidelines that members must acknowledge, calm busy channels with slow mode, restrict links and attachments, and hold new joiners read-only. Banned-keyword filters and a report-and-review workflow give moderators everything they need to act fast on problem messages.

subFeatures.name: Channel rules and guidelines
subFeatures.description: Publish titled guideline lists per channel; institutes set defaults and individual channels can override them.

subFeatures.name: Mandatory acknowledgement
subFeatures.description: Optionally require members to acknowledge the rules before they can post.

subFeatures.name: Slow mode
subFeatures.description: Enforce a minimum number of seconds between posts per member to calm busy channels.

subFeatures.name: Link and attachment controls
subFeatures.description: Allow or block links and attachments on a per-channel basis.

subFeatures.name: New-member read-only period
subFeatures.description: Keep new joiners read-only for a configurable number of minutes before they can post.

subFeatures.name: Banned-keyword filters
subFeatures.description: Maintain a banned-keyword list per channel and choose the action: block the message outright or flag it for review.

subFeatures.name: Message reporting
subFeatures.description: Members report messages for spam, abuse, harassment or inappropriate content; auto-moderation flags create reports too.

subFeatures.name: Moderation review queue
subFeatures.description: Admins work an Open, Reviewing, Actioned or Dismissed queue of reports from a dedicated review screen.

features.name: Gamification: XP, Streaks & Badges
features.tagline: XP, levels, streaks and badges make studying addictive
features.description: Learners earn experience points for studying, attending live classes and scoring well on assessments, and XP rolls up into levels with visible progress. Daily streaks reward consistency, while achievement badges unlock automatically from configurable triggers or are awarded manually by admins. Institutes design their own badges and scoring rules — or switch the whole system off with one toggle.

subFeatures.name: XP and levels
subFeatures.description: Points earned across learning activities roll into levels, with an XP-to-next-level progress display and a breakdown of where every point came from.

subFeatures.name: Daily streaks
subFeatures.description: A streak counter rewards consecutive days of learning activity.

subFeatures.name: Achievement badges
subFeatures.description: Badges unlock automatically from configurable triggers — course progress, assessment scores, live-class attendance — and admins can also award them manually.

subFeatures.name: Custom badge designer
subFeatures.description: Create your own badges with a name, an icon from a built-in library and a description, then edit or retire them as your program evolves.

subFeatures.name: Configurable unlock criteria
subFeatures.description: Choose the activity- or achievement-based rule that unlocks each badge.

subFeatures.name: Institute-controlled scoring
subFeatures.description: Institutes define the badge and scoring rules, and a master toggle disables badges entirely when they are not wanted.

subFeatures.name: Play theme
subFeatures.description: A gamified, kid-friendly dashboard theme with progress rings, XP pills and badge showcases.

features.name: Leaderboards
features.tagline: Friendly competition that keeps learners coming back
features.description: Leaderboards rank learners everywhere they compete: within their batch, across the whole institute, and live during quiz sessions. Learning-activity leaderboards are driven by study time, attendance and badges earned, while live-session leaderboards score every answer in real time with configurable points, optional negative marking and speed-aware ranking. Standings can be shared publicly and exported for prize-giving.

subFeatures.name: Batch leaderboard
subFeatures.description: Rankings within a learner's batch, driven by real learning activity such as study time, live-class attendance and badges earned.

subFeatures.name: Institute leaderboard
subFeatures.description: An institute-wide leaderboard that ranks learners across all batches.

subFeatures.name: Public shareable leaderboard
subFeatures.description: A public leaderboard view that can be shared outside the app for recognition and marketing.

subFeatures.name: My rank card
subFeatures.description: Each learner sees their own rank and badge summary on their profile.

subFeatures.name: Live session leaderboard
subFeatures.description: Every live quiz session ranks the whole audience in real time; both the presenter and participants can view the standings, with results revealed on the final slide.

subFeatures.name: Configurable scoring with negative marking
subFeatures.description: Set the points each correct answer is worth when creating a session, and optionally deduct a chosen number of marks per wrong answer.

subFeatures.name: Speed-aware ranking
subFeatures.description: Total response time is recorded alongside score, so faster correct answers rank higher among ties.

subFeatures.name: Full performance breakdown
subFeatures.description: Each leaderboard row shows rank, name, total score, total time, correct, wrong and unanswered counts, and total questions.

subFeatures.name: CSV export
subFeatures.description: Download the complete session leaderboard as a spreadsheet for records or prize distribution.

features.name: Course Ratings & Reviews
features.tagline: Learner reviews that become your best social proof
features.description: Learners rate and review courses and batches with a star score and text, and ratings roll up into averages and distributions shown on course pages, library cards and the public catalogue. Readers can mark reviews helpful so the best feedback rises to the top, and admins get a filterable console over every review for moderation and insight.

subFeatures.name: Submit and edit reviews
subFeatures.description: Learners leave a star rating with text for a course or a specific batch, and can update it later.

subFeatures.name: Rating summaries
subFeatures.description: Aggregate star ratings and rating distributions per course and per batch, ready for display anywhere.

subFeatures.name: Review feed
subFeatures.description: Read individual reviews with reviewer name, photo, date, star score, text and like counts.

subFeatures.name: Ratings on cards and public catalogues
subFeatures.description: Star ratings appear on library course cards and public catalogue listings, so prospective students see social proof before enrolling.

subFeatures.name: Like / dislike on reviews
subFeatures.description: Readers mark a review helpful or not — or withdraw their reaction — surfacing the best feedback first.

subFeatures.name: Admin review console
subFeatures.description: Browse all ratings for any course or batch with filters, for moderation and insight.

features.name: Community Question Paper Library
features.tagline: A shared library of ready-made question papers and practice content
features.description: A community hub inside the admin portal where teachers browse question papers and practice resources shared across the Vacademy network. Content is presented as a visual card gallery with instant search, academic filters and topic tags, and any paper can be previewed question by question — with answers toggled on or off — before you adopt it. It turns every institute's best assessments into a reusable, network-wide resource pool.

subFeatures.name: Browse card gallery
subFeatures.description: Scroll a paginated grid of community question papers presented as visual cards; click any card to open the full paper.

subFeatures.name: Instant search
subFeatures.description: Search question papers by name from the hub header, with results refreshing as you type.

subFeatures.name: Cascading academic filters
subFeatures.description: Narrow the library by level or grade, then stream, then subject — each dropdown shows only options relevant to the previous choice.

subFeatures.name: Difficulty and content-type filters
subFeatures.description: Filter by Easy, Medium or Hard, and by resource kind — the library is built to hold questions, full question papers, PDFs, videos and PPTs.

subFeatures.name: Topic tag chips
subFeatures.description: One-click topic chips stack on top of the dropdown filters for precise discovery.

subFeatures.name: Combined multi-filter results
subFeatures.description: Search text, dropdown selections and tag chips all combine into a single filtered, paginated result set.

subFeatures.name: Question paper preview
subFeatures.description: Read every question in order with rich formatting, images and math rendered correctly.

subFeatures.name: Show / hide answers toggle
subFeatures.description: Reveal or hide the answer key with one click while previewing, to judge quality before adopting a paper.

subFeatures.name: Paper detail sidebar
subFeatures.description: Every paper shows its full tag set — level, stream, subject, topic and difficulty — so you know exactly what it covers.

subFeatures.name: Share a paper
subFeatures.description: A share action on each community paper lets you pass it along to colleagues.

features.name: Cross-Institute Content Sharing
features.tagline: Publish your papers to the network, import theirs into yours
features.description: Institutes share question papers with the wider Vacademy community and pull any public community paper into their own private question bank with one click. Imported papers become fully editable copies inside your institute, ready to use in your own assessments, while a public/private access setting keeps you in control of what leaves your walls.

subFeatures.name: Add to my Question Bank
subFeatures.description: One button copies a public community question paper into your institute's private collection, confirmed the moment it lands.

subFeatures.name: Publish to the community
subFeatures.description: A Share-and-Explore publishing flow pushes your own papers into the community library for other institutes to discover.

subFeatures.name: Public / private access control
subFeatures.description: Every question paper carries an access setting, so only content deliberately marked public is visible to other institutes.

subFeatures.name: Authorship and history preserved
subFeatures.description: Shared papers keep their title, description, creator and creation dates, so provenance is always visible.

features.name: Academic Taxonomy & Smart Tagging
features.tagline: Every shared resource organized the way syllabi actually work
features.description: A structured academic catalogue — Levels, Streams, Subjects, Chapters and Topics — underpins the community library, so every shared resource is findable by exactly where it fits in a curriculum. Content also carries free-form tags, difficulty ratings and type labels, and the taxonomy itself grows as new chapters and topics are added.

subFeatures.name: Five-level academic hierarchy
subFeatures.description: Content is organized by Level → Stream → Subject → Chapter → Topic, mirroring how real syllabi are structured.

subFeatures.name: Structured tag dimensions
subFeatures.description: Resources are tagged across six dimensions: level, stream, subject, topic, difficulty and content type.

subFeatures.name: Free-form tags
subFeatures.description: Beyond the structured taxonomy, contributors attach custom tags to any question, paper, PDF, video or PPT.

subFeatures.name: Tag lookup per resource
subFeatures.description: View all tags attached to any resource — or a batch of resources — grouped by category, to understand its coverage at a glance.

subFeatures.name: Growable curriculum catalogue
subFeatures.description: Add new chapters under any subject and new topics under any chapter, including bulk additions, so the taxonomy keeps pace with new syllabi.

subFeatures.name: Always-current filter options
subFeatures.description: The community hub loads live filter options — levels, streams, subjects, difficulties, types and topics — so dropdowns always reflect the current catalogue.

subFeatures.name: Rich-content questions
subFeatures.description: Question text, options and explanations are stored as rich content, so shared questions keep images, tables and math notation intact.

demo.intro: Borrow the network's best question papers, share your own, then see how XP, leaderboards and batch chat keep learners showing up daily.

Doubt-clearing at 6 PM today — bring your Kinematics mock corrections. — Meera Ma'am
Ma'am, is Q12 from the mock inside the reduced syllabus?
Yes — projectile motion. I'll solve it on the whiteboard today. 📎 Q12_solution.pdf

steps.title: A network-wide paper library
steps.text: The Community hub inside the admin portal pools question papers and practice content shared by institutes across the Vacademy network — with instant search that refreshes results as you type.

steps.title: Filters that mirror real syllabi
steps.text: Cascading dropdowns narrow by Level, then Stream, then Subject — each showing only relevant options. Stack on difficulty (Easy/Medium/Hard), content type and one-click topic chips for precise discovery.

steps.title: Provenance on every paper
steps.text: Each paper keeps its creator, dates and full tag set — level, stream, subject, topic, difficulty — so you know exactly what it covers and who built it. Click any paper to open the full preview.

steps.title: Preview before you adopt
steps.text: Read every question in order with images, tables and math rendered correctly, then toggle the answer key on or off with one click — judge a paper's quality before it touches your question bank.

steps.title: One click into your question bank
steps.text: 'Add to My Question Bank' copies the paper into your institute's private collection as a fully editable copy, ready to drop into your own assessments — confirmed the moment it lands.

steps.title: Share yours, on your terms
steps.text: The Share & Explore flow publishes your papers to the network with authorship preserved. Every paper carries a public/private access setting, so nothing leaves your walls unless you mark it public.

steps.title: XP and streaks make study a habit
steps.text: Learners earn XP for studying, attending live classes and scoring well on assessments, rolling up into levels. Daily streaks reward consistency, and badges unlock from triggers you configure — or design your own.

steps.title: Batch and institute leaderboards
steps.text: Rankings run inside each batch and across the whole institute, driven by real activity — study time, attendance, badges earned. Standings can be shared publicly and exported to CSV for prize day.

steps.title: Every batch gets its own group chat
steps.text: Membership syncs automatically with enrollment — no phone numbers exchanged. DMs, batch groups and an institute-wide channel carry text, images and files in real time, with push for offline members.

steps.title: Safety tools built for education
steps.text: Slow mode, banned-keyword filters, link controls and a new-member read-only period keep channels calm. Reported messages land in an Open → Reviewing → Actioned moderation queue, and a role matrix decides who can message whom.

pillars.name: Platform, Apps & White-Label
pillars.tagline: Your brand, your domain, your apps — on enterprise-grade rails
pillars.description: The foundation that makes Vacademy feel like your own product, not someone else's software. Run every portal on your own domains with your own branding, ship your own Android, iOS, Windows and Mac apps, rename the platform's vocabulary to match yours, and operate multiple brands or branches from one account. Underneath sits serious infrastructure — flexible sign-in, device security, cloud file storage, open APIs, data migration tooling and a support and status operation that keeps your institute running.

features.name: Custom Domains & White-Label Portals
features.tagline: Your domain, your brand — Vacademy invisible
features.description: Run the learner, teacher and admin portals on your own domains (e.g. learn.myschool.com) with zero Vacademy branding. A guided setup wizard provisions domains automatically — DNS and SSL included — and every domain carries its own logo, colors, fonts, browser-tab identity, sign-in rules and legal links, so learners only ever see your brand.

subFeatures.name: One-click domain setup
subFeatures.description: A setup wizard creates DNS records and SSL certificates automatically and wires the domains to your institute. For domains you host elsewhere, it surfaces the exact CNAME record to add and reports live provisioning status.

subFeatures.name: Separate domains per portal
subFeatures.description: Attach distinct domains or subdomains for the learner, teacher and admin portals. Multiple domains can serve the same portal, with one marked primary.

subFeatures.name: Per-domain branding
subFeatures.description: Each domain sets its own theme color, font family, logo dimensions, browser tab title and tab icon — and can hide the institute name entirely when the logo already carries it.

subFeatures.name: Per-domain login rules
subFeatures.description: Choose which sign-in methods (password, email OTP, phone, Google, GitHub) are available on each domain, and whether open self-signup is allowed or access stays invite-only.

subFeatures.name: Navigation, redirects & legal links
subFeatures.description: Set the after-login landing route, after-logout route and home-icon destination per domain, and point privacy policy and terms & conditions links to your own pages.

subFeatures.name: App download links
subFeatures.description: Attach your Play Store, App Store, Windows and Mac app links so each branded portal promotes your own apps.

subFeatures.name: Sub-organization branded domains
subFeatures.description: Bind a domain to a specific sub-organization so each branch or partner brand gets its own branded login and signup entry point.

subFeatures.name: Regional & terminology preferences
subFeatures.description: Set preferred country lists for phone-number inputs per domain, and choose whether your custom naming terminology applies on each white-labeled domain.

subFeatures.name: White-label status dashboard
subFeatures.description: See at a glance which portals are configured, their URLs, domain types and provisioning state — verify what is live at any time.

features.name: Branded Mobile & Desktop Apps
features.tagline: Your own Android, iOS, Windows and Mac apps
features.description: The learner experience ships as installable apps for Android, iOS, Windows and Mac — each buildable as a fully branded app published under your institute's own name, icon and store listing. Mobile-native touches like push notifications, privacy screens and offline handling make it feel truly native, and admins get a companion mobile app to run the institute on the go.

subFeatures.name: White-label Android & iOS apps
subFeatures.description: Tenant-specific builds carry your institute's own app name, icon, theme and app-store listing, published under your developer account.

subFeatures.name: Windows & Mac desktop apps
subFeatures.description: Desktop builds of the learner app for exam centers, office-based training and distraction-free home study.

subFeatures.name: Admin mobile app
subFeatures.description: A mobile flavor of the admin dashboard so owners and staff can manage the institute from their phone.

subFeatures.name: Native social sign-in
subFeatures.description: Apps include native Sign in with Apple on iOS and Google sign-in, meeting app-store sign-in requirements.

subFeatures.name: White-label push notifications
subFeatures.description: Each institute can plug in its own Firebase project so push notifications are delivered under the institute's own app identity.

subFeatures.name: Privacy screen protection
subFeatures.description: Blocks screenshots and screen recording of protected content on mobile.

subFeatures.name: Offline resilience
subFeatures.description: Network status detection, offline message queuing and cached preferences keep the app usable on poor connections.

subFeatures.name: Mobile-native UX
subFeatures.description: Pull-to-refresh, in-app browser, network awareness and mobile-first layouts throughout — no cut-down web wrapper.

subFeatures.name: iOS purchase compliance
subFeatures.description: Purchase flows automatically adapt on iOS to meet App Store rules.

features.name: Over-the-Air App Updates
features.tagline: Ship app fixes instantly — no app-store wait
features.description: Push new versions of the mobile app straight to users' devices, skipping app-store review for content and UI updates. Releases can target specific institutes' branded apps, be marked as forced updates for critical fixes, and be rolled back instantly if something goes wrong.

subFeatures.name: Instant OTA releases
subFeatures.description: Publish a new app bundle with version, release notes and integrity checksum; devices pick it up on their next update check via an in-app update banner.

subFeatures.name: Targeted rollouts
subFeatures.description: Aim a release at specific branded apps, specific platforms, or every app at once.

subFeatures.name: Forced updates
subFeatures.description: Mark a release as mandatory so devices must update before continuing — critical for security fixes.

subFeatures.name: Native-version gating
subFeatures.description: Each bundle declares the minimum native app version it supports, so older installs are never broken by an incompatible update.

subFeatures.name: One-click rollback
subFeatures.description: Deactivate a bad release and reactivate a previous one; devices revert on their next check.

subFeatures.name: Release history
subFeatures.description: A full log of every published version with size, publisher, notes and active status.

features.name: Multi-Tenant Institute Workspaces
features.tagline: Isolated, branded workspaces for every institute and sub-org
features.description: Every institute runs in its own secure workspace with its own users, roles, settings, branding and data — fully separated from every other tenant. Larger organizations operate sub-organizations (branches, franchises, partner academies) under one umbrella, each with its own branded entry point, while people who belong to several institutes switch between them from a single account.

subFeatures.name: Isolated institute workspaces
subFeatures.description: Each institute's data, users and settings are fully separated from every other tenant on the platform.

subFeatures.name: Sub-organizations & multi-brand operations
subFeatures.description: Run branches or franchise partners as sub-orgs under a parent institute, each with its own domain routing, branding and self-registration entry points.

subFeatures.name: Multi-institute membership
subFeatures.description: One person can belong to several institutes with different roles in each, choosing the workspace at login and switching anytime — branding, terminology and content reload instantly without re-login.

subFeatures.name: Batch selection for learners
subFeatures.description: Learners enrolled in multiple batches choose which one to enter after login.

subFeatures.name: Per-institute security settings
subFeatures.description: Institute-level controls, such as the maximum concurrent sessions per learner, are configured per workspace.

subFeatures.name: Instant workspace signup
subFeatures.description: New organizations sign up and get a workspace with an owner account created immediately — including via Google or GitHub signup.

features.name: Naming Settings — Custom Terminology
features.tagline: The whole platform speaks your institute's language
features.description: Rename every user-facing term per institute, with independent singular and plural forms. Call a Course a 'Program', a Batch a 'Cohort', a Learner a 'Student' or 'Trainee' — and the change flows through menus, buttons, page titles, dialogs and reports everywhere, including your white-labeled domains. Ideal for schools, coaching institutes and corporate academies that each have their own vocabulary.

subFeatures.name: Content & structure terms
subFeatures.description: Rename Course, Level, Session, Subject, Module, Chapter, Slide, Live Session, Batch, Package and the 'Popular' tag — 16+ configurable terms in total.

subFeatures.name: Role terms
subFeatures.description: Rename user roles — Admin, Teacher, Course Creator, Assessment Creator, Evaluator and Learner (e.g. 'Learner' becomes 'Student' or 'Trainee').

subFeatures.name: Other terms
subFeatures.description: Rename Audience List (campaigns), Invite (enrollment links) and Inventory to match how your team talks.

subFeatures.name: True singular and plural forms
subFeatures.description: Configure each term's singular and plural independently — 'Faculty/Faculty', 'Child/Children' — not naive 's' appending.

subFeatures.name: Plain-language explanations
subFeatures.description: Each term shows a description of what it means in the platform, so admins rename with confidence.

subFeatures.name: Applies across the product
subFeatures.description: Custom names appear in sidebars, tabs, dialogs, table headers, toasts and page titles across admin and learner apps, and can apply on white-labeled domains and per-domain overrides.

subFeatures.name: Session vs Batch taxonomy
subFeatures.description: Distinguishes academic Session (semester or year) from Batch (learner group), so schools and corporate L&D both get natural language.

features.name: Flexible Login & Single Sign-On
features.tagline: Every sign-in method your learners and staff prefer
features.description: Learners and staff sign in the way that suits them — password, one-time codes by email or WhatsApp, phone number, or one-tap social sign-in with Google, GitHub and Apple. Institutes choose exactly which methods are enabled on each portal, first-time social sign-ins are registered automatically, and sessions renew silently so users stay signed in without interruption.

subFeatures.name: Email / username + password login
subFeatures.description: Classic sign-in for both admin and learner portals, with optional automatic lowercase normalization of usernames to avoid typo lockouts.

subFeatures.name: Email OTP login
subFeatures.description: Passwordless sign-in with a one-time code sent to the user's email — no password to remember or reset.

subFeatures.name: WhatsApp & phone OTP login
subFeatures.description: One-time codes delivered on WhatsApp for phone-first audiences, including a verify-only flow for confirming phone numbers and a verify-and-login flow.

subFeatures.name: Extended 10-day OTP session
subFeatures.description: A special OTP login keeps the learner signed in for ten days — ideal for exam-prep apps where daily re-login kills engagement.

subFeatures.name: Social sign-in (Google, GitHub, Apple)
subFeatures.description: One-tap Google and GitHub OAuth login for admin and learner portals, plus native Sign in with Apple on the learner iOS app.

subFeatures.name: WordPress single sign-on
subFeatures.description: A secure webhook logs users who sign in on your WordPress website straight into their learner account — one login for website and LMS.

subFeatures.name: Auto account creation with welcome email
subFeatures.description: First-time social sign-ins get an account created automatically and receive a welcome email with fallback credentials.

subFeatures.name: Cross-app auth handoff
subFeatures.description: After login, users are returned to the exact app and page they started from — including white-label custom domains — without re-authenticating.

subFeatures.name: Per-portal login controls
subFeatures.description: For every branded portal, independently switch password login, email OTP, phone login, Google and GitHub sign-in, and self-signup on or off.

subFeatures.name: Credential recovery & distribution
subFeatures.description: Users request their credentials by email in one click; admins can push login credentials to individual users or in bulk.

subFeatures.name: Silent session renewal
subFeatures.description: Sessions refresh securely in the background, so users stay signed in without interruption while security is preserved.

subFeatures.name: Account identifier & duplicate detection
subFeatures.description: Choose the identifier (such as email) that uniquely identifies users at registration and login; enrollment automatically detects existing accounts instead of creating duplicates.

features.name: Device & Session Security
features.tagline: Stop account sharing with per-learner device limits
features.description: Cap how many devices a learner can be signed in on at once to stop account sharing. When the limit is hit, the learner sees their active devices and can log one out to free a slot — no support ticket needed. Revoked sessions are killed within minutes, and every session records its device type for visibility.

subFeatures.name: Concurrent device limit
subFeatures.description: Admins set a maximum number of simultaneous active sessions per learner for their institute (e.g. 2 devices); zero keeps it unlimited.

subFeatures.name: Active device list
subFeatures.description: When the limit is exceeded, the learner sees every active session with its device type and last activity.

subFeatures.name: Remote logout of a single device
subFeatures.description: The learner can end one specific session — say, the shared family tablet — and immediately sign in on the new device.

subFeatures.name: Session heartbeat & instant revocation
subFeatures.description: Apps validate the session every few minutes; a terminated session is signed out on its next request, so revocation takes effect fast.

subFeatures.name: Clean logout everywhere
subFeatures.description: Normal logout terminates the session server-side, not just locally, keeping the device count accurate.

subFeatures.name: Device-type tracking
subFeatures.description: Each session records whether it came from web, mobile app or desktop, giving admins visibility into how learners access content.

features.name: Learner Portal Designer
features.tagline: Design the learner app without writing code
features.description: Shape everything a learner sees — sidebar layout, navigation style, custom tabs and widgets, sign-up options, notifications and post-login redirects. Preview how course navigation will look before saving, and control which profile fields learners can see and edit. Institutes effectively compose their own learner app.

subFeatures.name: Layout & navigation
subFeatures.description: Toggle, rename and reorder learner sidebar sections, and add custom tabs, sub-tabs and even custom widgets to the learner dashboard.

subFeatures.name: Course navigation style
subFeatures.description: Choose between a full expandable course tree or compact breadcrumb dropdowns, with a live visual preview of both.

subFeatures.name: Learning experience defaults
subFeatures.description: Set the default tab learners land on and how content outlines open.

subFeatures.name: Learner side-view tabs
subFeatures.description: Choose which side panels and tabs appear inside the learner content view.

subFeatures.name: Login & signup options
subFeatures.description: Control sign-up availability and account options for learners, including settings exposed to public enrollment pages.

subFeatures.name: Notifications & post-login redirect
subFeatures.description: Configure learner notification behavior and where learners land after login.

subFeatures.name: Profile field visibility
subFeatures.description: Choose which profile fields learners can see and which they can edit.

subFeatures.name: Language selection
subFeatures.description: A language dropdown lets learners switch the app language where enabled.

features.name: Feature & Tab Visibility Controls
features.tagline: Turn whole product areas on or off per institute
features.description: Switch entire product areas on or off so your team only sees what you actually use. Hide the Community Centre, Evaluation Centre, Doubt Management or Reports — down to individual sub-items under each area — and restore the standard layout in one click.

subFeatures.name: Top-level tab toggles
subFeatures.description: Show or hide major areas such as Community Centre, Evaluation Centre, Doubt Management and Reports.

subFeatures.name: Sub-item toggles
subFeatures.description: Within a visible area, toggle individual sub-items; at least one sub-item always stays visible as a safety net.

subFeatures.name: Reset to defaults
subFeatures.description: One click restores the standard tab layout.

subFeatures.name: Module entitlements
subFeatures.description: Institutes are provisioned with product modules (Assessment, LMS, Volt, Vsmart) and their sub-modules, controlling which product areas appear at all.

features.name: Branded Sender Email
features.tagline: Send from your own domain, not ours
features.description: Verify your own sender email addresses and domains so all platform email goes out under your brand. The product triggers verification, hands you the exact DNS records to publish, and tracks verification status separately for marketing, transactional and notification email.

subFeatures.name: Self-serve sender verification
subFeatures.description: Start verification of a custom from-address directly from the product; the platform handles the email-provider setup behind the scenes.

subFeatures.name: DNS record guidance
subFeatures.description: The verification flow returns the DNS records needed for domain authentication and reports live verification status.

subFeatures.name: Per-purpose sender identities
subFeatures.description: Configure distinct verified senders for marketing, transactional and notification emails — each independently managed, testable and restorable to defaults.

subFeatures.name: Sender configuration management
subFeatures.description: Create, update, delete and test per-institute email configurations, including from-name display and default templates.

features.name: Webhooks & Open API
features.tagline: Connect Vacademy to anything you build, buy or use
features.description: Real-time webhooks for platform events and a REST API covering the platform's core entities let you connect Vacademy to your own systems. Pre-built connectors cover your WordPress website, lead-ad platforms and payment gateways — included with the platform, no enterprise upsell.

subFeatures.name: Real-time webhooks
subFeatures.description: Signed webhook events across the learner lifecycle — enrollment, payments, exams, certificates, leads and more — delivered to your endpoints as they happen.

subFeatures.name: REST API coverage
subFeatures.description: Programmatic access to courses, batches, learners, exams, payments, certificates and leads for your own integrations.

subFeatures.name: Reliable delivery
subFeatures.description: Webhook deliveries retry automatically on failure so transient outages on your side don't lose events.

subFeatures.name: Native connectors
subFeatures.description: Ready-made integrations for WordPress sites, Meta and Google lead ads into the CRM, and payment-gateway webhooks.

subFeatures.name: External LMS connections
subFeatures.description: Manage connections to external learning systems from a single settings screen, with optional custom fields mapped across each connection so records stay in sync.

features.name: Institute Profile & Settings Engine
features.tagline: Your identity and configuration, all in one place
features.description: Maintain the institute's public profile — name, address, contact, website and type — plus branding assets like theme color and letterhead used across portals, certificates and invoices. A per-institute settings engine underneath lets you define reusable custom fields, customize role display names, and configure dozens of behavior settings across the product.

subFeatures.name: Institute details editing
subFeatures.description: Update name, address, email, website and other profile fields; separate learner-portal and admin-portal URLs are stored per institute.

subFeatures.name: Institute types
subFeatures.description: Classify your organization as a college, school, online coaching or offline coaching institute.

subFeatures.name: Theme & letterhead branding
subFeatures.description: Set the institute theme color (including role-based multi-hue themes) that skins both portals, and upload a letterhead used on generated documents.

subFeatures.name: Custom field library
subFeatures.description: Create institute-wide custom fields (text or dropdown), see where each field is used before changing it, and rename fixed system fields.

subFeatures.name: Role display settings
subFeatures.description: Customize how each role name appears to your team.

subFeatures.name: Settings catalog
subFeatures.description: Dozens of setting groups — course, LMS, lead, doubt management, live session, AI calling, content protection, theme and more — configured per institute from one place.

subFeatures.name: Public discovery & branding endpoints
subFeatures.description: Public search across institutes powers discovery experiences, and branding resolves by subdomain to serve white-labeled public pages.

features.name: Cloud File Storage & Secure Media Delivery
features.tagline: Every file stored safely, delivered fast, under your control
features.description: Every image, video, PDF, recording and document across the platform is stored securely in the cloud and delivered through smart links you control. Uploads go straight from the user's device to cloud storage via secure one-time links, so even very large lecture videos upload fast, and protected content is served through expiring links that can't be reused forever.

subFeatures.name: Direct-to-cloud uploads
subFeatures.description: Files upload straight from the user's device to cloud storage using secure, time-limited upload links — no size bottlenecks, with public-page flows accepting uploads from visitors who aren't logged in.

subFeatures.name: Public and private storage tiers
subFeatures.description: Open content like thumbnails and catalogue images lives in a fast public tier; sensitive files sit in a private tier reachable only via authorized links, and a private file can be promoted to public when you choose.

subFeatures.name: Encrypted storage for sensitive recordings
subFeatures.description: Sensitive media such as phone-call recordings is stored with encryption at rest and is only reachable via expiring authorized links.

subFeatures.name: Permanent and expiring links
subFeatures.description: Open content gets stable always-on links suitable for websites and emails; protected content is served through links that expire after a chosen number of days.

subFeatures.name: Automatic file cataloguing
subFeatures.description: Each upload records its name, type, size, dimensions and originating feature, so every file stays organized and traceable to its source — and can be looked up by what it belongs to.

subFeatures.name: Smart caching for speed
subFeatures.description: Delivery uses browser caching and change-detection so repeat views load instantly without re-downloading, while access rules stay intact.

subFeatures.name: Instant links & bulk lookups
subFeatures.description: Uploads return a ready-to-use viewing link immediately, and pages with lots of media resolve many file links in one request to stay fast.

subFeatures.name: Safe deletion
subFeatures.description: Files can be removed individually or in batches, with soft-delete protecting user-library files from accidental permanent loss.

features.name: File Library & Sharing
features.tagline: The right files, shared with exactly the right people
features.description: A central library of files, links and rich notes that can be shared with exactly the right audience — a single user, a batch, a role or the whole institute, each with view or edit rights. Learners get a dedicated My Files area listing every report, note and document shared with them, organized into browsable folders.

subFeatures.name: Multi-format entries
subFeatures.description: Store uploaded files, external web links or rich notes; media is classified as video, audio, PDF, document, image or note.

subFeatures.name: Fine-grained sharing
subFeatures.description: Grant access at user, batch, role or institute level, with separate view and edit permissions per grant.

subFeatures.name: Access review & editing
subFeatures.description: Inspect who can see any file and update its access list at any time; withdrawn shares disappear from learner views automatically.

subFeatures.name: Personal folders with icons
subFeatures.description: Each user's files are organized into named folders with custom icons — certificates, reports, notes — browsable one folder at a time.

subFeatures.name: Learner My Files area
subFeatures.description: Learners see everything shared with them with type icons and shared dates: links open in a new tab, rich notes read in an in-app preview, and files download via secure links — ideal for report cards, forms and study packs.

subFeatures.name: Email asset library
subFeatures.description: Upload and browse images used inside email campaigns, kept separate from learning content.

features.name: Smart Document Conversion Engine
features.tagline: PDFs and docs become clean, editable web content
features.description: Behind features like question import and AI content generation sits a conversion engine that turns PDFs and Word documents into clean web text. It tracks every conversion's status, hosts extracted images automatically, and tidies messy formatting so the result is ready to use.

subFeatures.name: PDF and document to web text
subFeatures.description: Documents are converted to rich web text through professional conversion services, preserving structure and content.

subFeatures.name: Conversion status tracking
subFeatures.description: Every conversion job records its progress and finished result, so long conversions can be checked and retrieved when ready.

subFeatures.name: Embedded images auto-hosted
subFeatures.description: Images buried inside documents are extracted, uploaded to cloud storage and swapped for fast-loading hosted links.

subFeatures.name: Legacy image format rescue
subFeatures.description: Old Windows metafile graphics (WMF/EMF) common in older question banks are converted to modern images that display everywhere.

subFeatures.name: Formatting cleanup
subFeatures.description: Redundant styling and clutter produced by word processors is stripped so converted content looks clean and consistent.

features.name: Background Task Tracker
features.tagline: Watch long-running jobs finish without babysitting them
features.description: Long-running jobs like AI content generation and document processing are tracked per institute with live statuses. Users see their institute's recent tasks, check progress messages, and pick up results — including generated files — the moment a job completes.

subFeatures.name: Per-institute task history
subFeatures.description: Each institute sees its own recent tasks with name, type, status and timestamps.

subFeatures.name: Live status and messages
subFeatures.description: Tasks report progress states and human-readable status messages while they run.

subFeatures.name: Results with attached files
subFeatures.description: Finished tasks deliver their output — structured results plus any generated file with a ready download link.

subFeatures.name: Linked task chains
subFeatures.description: Related jobs, like a re-run or follow-up step, stay linked so their history reads as one connected story.

features.name: Platform Data Migration
features.tagline: Bring users, enrollments and payment history with you
features.description: Move your existing business onto the platform without losing history. A general importer takes bulk users and enrollments complete with payment history, subscriptions, tags and custom fields, while specialized CSV pipelines migrate members from legacy CRMs with staging, validation and per-row result files — so billing continuity survives the cutover.

subFeatures.name: Bulk user import
subFeatures.description: Import users in bulk with per-item results and defaults, including custom fields and tags.

subFeatures.name: Bulk enrollment import
subFeatures.description: Import enrollments including one-time payments, payment history, subscriptions and gateway references, so billing continuity is preserved.

subFeatures.name: Legacy CRM pipelines
subFeatures.description: Staged CSV pipelines migrate individual and organization members across active, cancelled and expired segments, each returning a results file.

subFeatures.name: Staging & validation
subFeatures.description: Records land in staging with validation and status tracking before final migration.

subFeatures.name: Migration status monitoring
subFeatures.description: Check migration progress and per-record status throughout a cutover.

features.name: Transparent Platform Billing & Flat-Fee Pricing
features.tagline: Flat pricing, no revenue share — keep what you collect
features.description: Vacademy is sold on flat annual pricing with no revenue share, no learner caps hidden in the fine print, and no percentage of your fee collections. Everything your institute buys from Vacademy — plans and credit packs — runs through a clean billing pipeline with itemized, tax-compliant invoices and verified payment confirmation.

subFeatures.name: Flat-fee, no-revenue-share model
subFeatures.description: A flat annual platform fee instead of a percentage of collections — institutes keep 100% of what they collect from learners.

subFeatures.name: Included white-label add-ons
subFeatures.description: Branded Android and iOS apps published on your developer accounts, payment-gateway integration and setup assistance are included in the plan rather than sold as upsells.

subFeatures.name: Pay-per-use AI credits
subFeatures.description: Core AI features are included, with metered AI usage billed through reviewable, controllable credits and a basic allowance included for normal academic use.

subFeatures.name: Itemized platform invoices
subFeatures.description: Each purchase produces an invoice with line items, tax breakup and totals tied to the exact payment record, with multi-currency price display for international buyers.

subFeatures.name: Verified payment fulfillment
subFeatures.description: Payments are confirmed via signed gateway callbacks, and support can manually fulfill a payment that verifiably succeeded but missed its callback.

subFeatures.name: Full payment lifecycle audit
subFeatures.description: Every platform payment tracks its complete lifecycle — created, paid, fulfilled, failed — for clean reconciliation.

subFeatures.name: Data ownership & export
subFeatures.description: Your institute owns its data outright, with full export capability.

features.name: Support Help Desk with SLAs
features.tagline: Built-in ticketing with response-time guarantees
features.description: Raise support tickets right from your dashboard and chat with the support team in a threaded conversation with attachments. Tickets carry priority, category, status and a client-visible ETA, and each account sits on a support plan with defined response-time SLAs — up to a dedicated named engineer.

subFeatures.name: In-portal ticket creation
subFeatures.description: Raise tickets from the dashboard with a category (bug, question, billing, feature request, other) and priority.

subFeatures.name: Threaded conversations with attachments
subFeatures.description: Customer and support messages flow in one thread per ticket, with file attachments and system events recorded.

subFeatures.name: Full ticket lifecycle
subFeatures.description: Statuses run Open, In Progress, Waiting on Customer, Resolved and Closed, updatable by both sides.

subFeatures.name: Client-visible ETA
subFeatures.description: Support sets an expected-resolution time on each ticket that your team can see.

subFeatures.name: Support plans & SLAs
subFeatures.description: Tiered plans from standard support up to 24/7 coverage with fast major-incident response and a dedicated named engineer; SLA due-by times are computed automatically per ticket.

subFeatures.name: On-behalf ticket logging
subFeatures.description: Requests that arrive by email, WhatsApp or phone are logged by the support team, so every request is tracked in one place.

subFeatures.name: Engineer assignment & board
subFeatures.description: Tickets are assigned to named support engineers and managed on a Kanban-style board with an inbox, counts and filters.

subFeatures.name: SLA breach alerts
subFeatures.description: Automatic alerts fire when tickets approach or breach their first-response SLA.

features.name: Public Status Page & Platform Health Monitoring
features.tagline: Transparent uptime, monitored around the clock
features.description: A public status page tells customers when something is wrong and when it's fixed, with severity-classified incidents and dated timeline updates through investigation, monitoring and resolution. Behind it, an operations dashboard continuously checks every service, database, cache and live-class server so problems surface before customers feel them.

subFeatures.name: Public incident feed
subFeatures.description: Anyone can view current and past incidents on the status page without logging in.

subFeatures.name: Severity levels
subFeatures.description: Incidents are classified Minor, Major, Critical or Maintenance so customers gauge impact instantly.

subFeatures.name: Incident lifecycle & timeline updates
subFeatures.description: Statuses progress Investigating, Identified, Monitoring, Resolved — with dated updates posted under each incident building a full chronological record, including planned maintenance notices.

subFeatures.name: Full-stack health dashboard
subFeatures.description: Aggregated health of all backend services with quick and deep check modes, plus per-service response-time tracking to catch slowdowns early.

subFeatures.name: Database & cache diagnostics
subFeatures.description: Dedicated checks on databases and caches, including slow-query surfacing before it hurts users.

subFeatures.name: Live-class server pool manager
subFeatures.description: Monitor and manage the pool of live-classroom servers powering online classes.

subFeatures.name: Accurate server time service
subFeatures.description: A trusted universal time source with timezone validation keeps exam timers and schedules exact on every device.

features.name: Dashboard Widgets & Broadcasts
features.tagline: Onboarding trackers and announcements on every dashboard
features.description: The platform team places live widgets on institute dashboards: an implementation tracker showing onboarding milestones with statuses and ETAs, and announcement cards for maintenance notices or launches. Widgets target one institute or broadcast to every account with a given tag, and institutes can comment and confirm milestones — a two-way channel during onboarding.

subFeatures.name: Onboarding tracker widget
subFeatures.description: A milestone checklist (Not Started / In Progress / Blocked / Done) with ETAs, so the institute always knows where its implementation stands; a ready-made template speeds setup.

subFeatures.name: Announcement cards
subFeatures.description: Severity-styled cards (Info / Warning / Critical) with optional image and call-to-action button for maintenance notices, feature launches or alerts.

subFeatures.name: Two-way interaction
subFeatures.description: Institute admins comment on widgets (even per milestone) and confirm milestones, with all interactions visible to the platform team.

subFeatures.name: Targeted or broadcast delivery
subFeatures.description: Send a widget to one institute, or broadcast to every institute carrying a given account tag.

subFeatures.name: Draft, publish, archive lifecycle
subFeatures.description: Widgets are drafted privately, published to dashboards, and archived when done — only published widgets appear to institutes.

features.name: In-Product Guides, Assist Dock & Roadmap
features.tagline: Help and product news, right where you're working
features.description: A floating assist dock in the admin portal offers page-aware tutorials, support access and product news without leaving your workflow. Guides are matched to the exact screen you're on, new walkthroughs are published centrally with no app update, and a 'What's new' panel keeps every institute up to date on the product roadmap.

subFeatures.name: Route-aware tutorials
subFeatures.description: The Guides tab lists step-by-step tutorials relevant to the exact page — even the exact tab — you have open, viewed in-app.

subFeatures.name: Assist and Issues tabs
subFeatures.description: The same dock gives one-click access to assistance and to raising or tracking support tickets, keeping all help in one place.

subFeatures.name: Centrally published guides
subFeatures.description: New walkthrough guides are published by the platform team, targeted to specific screens, and appear for customers instantly — no software update, with full create/update/activate management.

subFeatures.name: In-app roadmap viewer
subFeatures.description: Read the latest published roadmap and release highlights in a rich formatted panel without leaving the dashboard.

subFeatures.name: New-update indicator
subFeatures.description: An unread dot lights up on the dock whenever the roadmap changes, and clears once you open the panel.

features.name: Platform Owner Console (Super Admin)
features.tagline: Run the whole platform from one command center
features.description: A dedicated operations console for the platform owner: browse every institute with usage summaries, tag accounts by lifecycle stage, inspect courses and users inside any institute, grant or deduct AI credits with an audit trail, and watch platform-wide activity dashboards. A built-in file manager finds any file on the platform in seconds.

subFeatures.name: Institute directory
subFeatures.description: A searchable, paginated list of all institutes with key stats and a drill-down summary per institute.

subFeatures.name: Lifecycle account tags
subFeatures.description: Tag each institute by lifecycle stage (production, trial, churn-risk) to segment accounts for broadcasts and prioritization.

subFeatures.name: Platform-wide dashboard
subFeatures.description: Cross-institute growth, usage and engagement metrics in a single view, with per-institute session lists, currently-active user counts and activity trends.

subFeatures.name: Per-institute course inventory
subFeatures.description: See every course an institute runs, with paging and search.

subFeatures.name: Credit grants & deductions
subFeatures.description: Grant promotional AI credits to an institute or deduct balances, always with an auditable reason.

subFeatures.name: User administration
subFeatures.description: List any institute's users and deactivate an account when needed for offboarding or abuse.

subFeatures.name: Platform file manager
subFeatures.description: Search every file on the platform by name with filters for type, feature, owner and date; preview images, copy fresh access links, upload replacements and safely delete — all restricted to authorized platform staff.

features.name: Embeddable AI Content Player
features.tagline: Share AI-generated lessons anywhere with an embed link
features.description: AI-generated content — videos, quizzes and storybooks — plays through a clean, full-screen embed page with synchronized audio and captions. Share AI lessons or embed them on external sites without giving anyone access to the admin portal.

subFeatures.name: Public embed pages
subFeatures.description: Each piece of AI content gets an embeddable player page suitable for iframes and link sharing.

subFeatures.name: Captions and audio sync
subFeatures.description: The player supports an audio track and word-level captions for accessible playback.

features.name: Learner Profile & Account Control
features.tagline: Self-service profile, credentials and account safety
features.description: Learners manage their own profile details, photo and password, and see progress stats and earned badges on their profile page. Account safety features include graceful session-expiry handling and a full in-app account-deletion flow that meets app-store privacy requirements.

subFeatures.name: Profile view & edit
subFeatures.description: Edit personal details, contact info and profile photo, within the field-visibility rules the institute sets.

subFeatures.name: Progress stats on profile
subFeatures.description: Learning statistics and a badges-and-rank card displayed on the profile page.

subFeatures.name: Change password
subFeatures.description: Self-service password change and forgot-password recovery.

subFeatures.name: Account deletion
subFeatures.description: An in-app account-deletion request flow meeting app-store privacy requirements.

subFeatures.name: Graceful session handling
subFeatures.description: Clear session-expiry prompts and a dedicated screen when access is revoked or the account signs in elsewhere.

subFeatures.name: Terms & privacy pages
subFeatures.description: Built-in terms-and-conditions and privacy-policy pages.

demo.intro: Turn Vacademy into your own product — your domain, your vocabulary, your branded apps, your sign-in rules.

widgets.title: Naming Settings
widgets.subtitle: Rename what the platform calls things — changes apply everywhere

fields.label: What it means
fields.value: A staff member who teaches and manages content

steps.title: Your platform, not ours
steps.text: Everything a learner or parent touches runs on your domains under your brand — Vacademy stays invisible. This is the control room where Prakash Career Institute makes the platform its own.

steps.title: One-click domain, DNS and SSL
steps.text: Point learn.prakashinstitute.in at your learner portal and the wizard provisions DNS and SSL automatically. Each domain carries its own logo, theme color, fonts, tab title and legal links.

steps.title: Separate domains per portal
steps.text: Run distinct domains for learner and admin portals, and give each branch or partner brand its own sub-org entry point. Attach your Play Store and App Store links so every portal promotes your apps.

steps.title: The platform speaks your language
steps.text: Rename 16+ terms — Course, Batch, Learner, Session, Module and more — per institute. Call a Course a Program and a Batch a Cohort; the change flows through menus, dialogs, reports and your white-label domains.

steps.title: Real plurals, not just an 's'
steps.text: Every term has independent singular and plural forms — 'Faculty/Faculty', 'Child/Children' — plus a plain-language explanation of what it controls, so you rename with confidence.

steps.title: Your own app in the stores
steps.text: The learner app ships as a branded Android and iOS build under your institute's name, icon and store listing — published on your developer account. Windows and Mac desktop apps too.

steps.title: Instant updates, protected content
steps.text: Over-the-air releases push fixes straight to devices — no app-store wait, with one-click rollback. Push notifications go out under your app identity, and privacy screens block screenshots of paid content.

steps.title: Roles across every branch
steps.text: Staff carry roles like Admin, Faculty, Evaluator and Course Creator — renamed to your terms. One person can work across the main campus and the Kota branch, switching workspaces without re-login.

steps.title: Sign-in rules you control
steps.text: Per portal, switch on password, email OTP, WhatsApp OTP, Google or GitHub sign-in — and keep access invite-only. A 2-device limit stops account sharing; students log out an old device themselves.
